name: Southern Comfort  Black (750 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts

name: Tamnavulin  Double Cask Speyside single Malt Scotch Whisky (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
The first official bottling of Tamnavulin for more than two decades, Double Cask has been finished in sherry butts. The result is a whisky with notes of dried orange, ginger and wood spice.

Awards :

Gold Single Malt No Age Statement - 2020 : International Spirits Challenge

Silver Scotch Single Malt - Speyside - 2019 : International Wine & Spirit Competition

name: Bushmills  Single Malt aged 12 years (700 ml)
Sexton  Single Irish Malt Whiskey (700 ml)
Cutty Sark  Prohibition Blended Scotch Whisky (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts

name: Tamdhu  12 Year Old Speyside Single Malt Whisky (700 ml)
Lower East Side  Blended Malt Scotch Whisky (700 ml)
desc_en_short: This smooth, complex blended malt whisky from Lower East Side has a sweet balanced character, initially offering notes of vanilla and bitter almonds. Supple, fruity flavours build alongside sweet honey and a mild smoky element that builds into a smooth finish.

name: Glen Moray  Classic Sherry Cask Finish Single Malt Whisky (700 ml)
Jura  Seven Wood Single Malt Scotch Whisky (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
AN INGENIOUS APPROACH REVEALS A FRUITY & SPICY SINGLE MALT SCOTCH WHISKY MADE FOR SAVOURING

The ability of Jura’s tiny island community to reimagine and reinvent has allowed our distillery to thrive. Such vision has brought to life this complex single malt - a fitting tribute to our Master Blender’s skill. Thanks to the forestry commission, sawmill and cooperage in France, we use the finest virgin French oak casks to enhance our whisky.

Layers of complexity and flavour emerge from a maturation journey that begins in American White Oak ex bourbon casks before a portion of the whisky is split between six different virgin oak casks sourced from across various regions of France.

The result is a fruity and spicy whisky with flavours of crème caramel, baked peach and sweet liquorice.

Awards :

Gold Single Malt No Age Statement - 2020 : International Spirits Challenge

Silver Scotch Single Malt - Island - 2019 : International Wine & Spirit Competition

name: Kyoto Whisky  Aka-Obi (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts

name: Tomintoul  Tawny Port Cask Finish (700 ml)
The Glenlivet  Licensed Dram (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: A spiritual successor to the fantastic Illicit Still, the Licensed Dram celebrates a period slightly later in the long history of the Glenlivet, when George Smith was granted royal assent to the production of whisky. So synonymous with the style that malt whisky was sometimes generically known as "Glenlivet" for some time! First-fill ex-Bourbon and ex-sherry casks and a higher-than-usual proof come together for a dram that emphasizes the rounded, slightly fruity baking-spice signature taste of the Glenlivet. Like the Illicit Still before it, this one's also a limited edition.

name: ET.51  Premium Whisky 10 Year (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts

name: Glendalough  Double Barrel Irish Whiskey (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Glendalough Double Barrel Irish Whiskey is a single grain Irish whiskey, initially matured in American bourbon barrels before enjoying a finishing period of six months in Spanish Oloroso Sherry casks. This comes bottled at 42% ABV, brought down to this strength by Wicklow mountain water. A rather tasty release presented by Glendalough, rich in vanilla, caramel, Christmas spices and dried fruit notes.

Awards : Silver- Irish Single Grain - Premium - 2019 The Irish Whisky Masters (The Spirits Business)

name: Glendalough  Canteiro Aged Madeira Cask Finish Single Cask Irish Whiskey (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Glendalough Single Cask - Canteiro Aged Madiera Finish is a premium single malt Irish whiskey produced by Glendalough Distillery, located in Wicklow, Ireland. The whiskey is made using 100% malted barley and aged in ex-bourbon casks before being finished in Canteiro Aged Madiera casks, giving it a unique and complex flavor profile. This release is a single cask release, meaning each bottle comes from a single cask, making each bottle unique in terms of flavor and character.

name: Wolfburn  Single Malt Whisky Small Batch No.458 (Limited Edition) (700 ml)
desc_en_short: The seventh small-batch release from Wolfburn, Batch 458 has been crafted from a 50/50 combination of whisky matured for seven years in first-fill Pedro Ximénez sherry butts, married with lightly-peated spirit matured in first-fill bourbon barrels. These casks produced 5,100 bottles in total and the result is a rich, sweet single malt with an exceptional depth of flavour.

name: Royal Salute  21 years Richard Quinn Roses Edition II (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Elevate your whisky collection with the Royal Salute 21 Year Old Blended Scotch Whisky - Richard Quinn Roses Edition, a collaborative masterpiece between Royal Salute and esteemed fashion designer Richard Quinn. This 70cl bottle embodies 21 years of expert blending and exceptional design, marrying the worlds of whisky and fashion. Immerse yourself in the rich aromas of red apple, creme brulee, and rosehip, leading to a palate adorned with exquisite notes of ginger, apricot, and mango.

name: Royal Salute  21 years  Richard Quinn Daisy Edition II (700 ml)
desc_en_short: This exceptional 21-Year-Old blend was co-created by Richard Quinn and Royal Salute Master Blender, Sandy Hyslop, during an experimental blending session in Strathisla Distillery, in Scotland. Hand-selecting a range of the finest Scotch whiskies from Braeval, Strathisla and Caperdonich distilleries, together Richard and Sandy crafted a rich, fruity whisky with hints of spice and soft smoke. A reflection of Richard’s personal palate, the blend is balanced and opulent with a remarkable depth of flavour and a lingering finish.

name: Jameson  Cold Brew Whiskey & Coffee (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: Jameson Cold Brew is a meeting of Arabica beans from Brazil and Colombia with triple-distilled Jameson Irish Whiskey. You may know the Irish Coffee, but this is different. Jameson Cold Brew is best served chilled, over ice, with cola and a twist of orange. Some cracking tunes in the background, optional. Enjoy the perfectly balanced combination of the smoothest whiskey with the richness of coffee.

Sober Spirits  Whisky Non-Alcoholic Beverage (500 ml)
desc_en_short:
Crafted from an authentic 3-year-old Whisky, this spirit has been 'bourbonized' by redistilling it with torrefied wood bark. The aroma of Sober Spirits W 0.0% - Whisky Bourbon alternative is typical of an American Bourbon, woody and intense in flavor with a gourmand Toffee note (chocolate & caramel) sublimated by a delicious hint of vanilla.

For all your cocktails, our Whisky Bourbon Alternative is to be used in the same way and with the same dosage as an alcoholic whisky (4 to 5cl per cocktail).

Although some love it neat, it is a mixology product, and its full potential is revealed in cocktails.

Awarded Non-Alcoholic Spirit of the Year at the prestigious London Spirits competition, it joins his older brother Sober Spirits R 0.0% - Rum alternative, which has already been acclaimed as the best in its category.

name: Lark  Tasmanian Peated Single Malt (500 ml)
desc_en_short:
Tasmanian Peated shows that where there's smoke, there's feeling. This is a new frontier, our island's own peat bog & post malt smoking process, creates a lightly peated whisky for a bold palate. A delicately smoky dram to ignite the senses, best enjoyed by anyone, any way they like.

Awards

2024 Global World Whisky Master - Gold Medal

2023 Global World Whisky Master - Master Medal

name: Compass Box  Nectarosity (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Process

Special American oak barrels are deployed twice. First to impart sweet spice to grain spirit, which finishes maturing in other casks. Once 'prepared', the barrels age malt whisky. We expertly blend these two characterful whiskies with selected others to dial up the fruit and toffee notes.

Flavour profile

Zesty with honey, poached pears, nectarine and lychee, then juicy apricot and pineapple excite the palate. Toffee, vanilla and butterscotch sauce follow, with a lasting flavour of cinnamon bun.

Serving recommendations

Nectarosity will bring an irresistible dynamism everywhere it goes, from classic cocktails to boilermakers. Partner with a dry pilsner to create a soft centre of fruity caramel notes.

Technical details

Bottled at 46% ABV.

Natural colour.

Not chill-filtered.

Blended Scotch Whisky.

name: Compass Box  Orchard House (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Process

Harvest a fruitful selection of malt whiskies at just the right time, then blend to showcase their bright fruit characteristics. With a light oak influence, a gentle honey sweetness comes through from first-fill bourbon barrels.

Flavour profile

Aromas of apple and pear dominate, with hints of pineapple, lemon and lime zest, and Earl Grey tea. Take a sip and note the malty and gingery flavours. These are soon joined by honey, wild strawberries and vanilla shortbread.

Serving recommendations

Vibrant when neat, syrupy when enjoyed on the rocks. Enjoy as a boilermaker alongside a crisp pale ale or pilsner for a delightful pairing

Technical details

Bottled at 46% ABV.

Natural colour.

Not chill-filtered.

Blended Scotch Whisky.

name: Nikka YOICHI Discovery - Non-Peated (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
For 2021, Nikka's limited edition showcases a unique unpeated variation of Yoichi's single malt, crafted by Master Blender Masashi Watanuki. This blend includes the oldest unpeated malt cask from 1989, presenting a completely different facet of the typically peaty Yoichi.

Nose : Fruity notes of banana and green apple mingle with spicy and herbaceous undertones.

Palate : Vibrant citrus aromas transition to roasted coffee and creamy vanilla flavors.

Finish : Dried fruits, creamy vegetal notes, and a hint of cinnamon and clove spice complete the experience.

name: Nikka MIYAGIKYO Discovery - Peated (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short:
In 2021, Nikka unveiled a limited-edition single malt from Miyagikyo, crafted by Master Blender Yumi Ozaki. This rare expression blends heavily peated malt with lightly peated malts, creating a bold yet elegant interpretation of the distillery's signature style.

Nose : Fruity aromas of red and exotic fruits paired with woody, lightly smoked oak notes, with peat subtly in the background.

Palate : Smooth peat emerges, complementing fruity flavors with surprising iodine and salt notes.

Finish : Persistent iodine and salt tones transition into retro olfaction with hints of bitter cocoa.

name: Nikka  Yoichi Discovery Aromatic Yeast (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short:
Introduced in 2021 as part of Nikka's Discovery Series celebrating its 90th anniversary, the 2022 edition highlights the influence of yeast in shaping the flavor profile of Yoichi and Miyagikyo single malts.

Nose : Saline peat dominates, blending with fruity notes of apple, pear, and yellow melon, alongside floral hints of lily and carnation.

Palate : Enhanced peat is accompanied by fruity tones of mirabelle plum and greengage, and floral notes of tulip and cyclamen.

Finish : A long-lasting profile featuring plum, licorice, and evolving peat that transitions into smoky nuances.

name: Nikka MIYAGIKYO Discovery Aromatic Yeast (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Launched in 2021 to celebrate Nikka Whisky's 90th anniversary, the Discovery Series highlights key aspects of the creation of Yoichi and Miyagikyo single malts.

Nose : Fruity notes of pear, peach, and apricot are complemented by unique hints of lavender, marshmallow, and meringue.

Palate : Cereal flavors of malt and barley are enriched by brioche bread and acacia honey.

Finish : Long and silky, with herbal undertones of cut grass, sage, verbena, and chamomile.

Heritage : Renowned for its fruity single malts, Miyagikyo embodies the expertise passed down from Masataka Taketsuru, the pioneer of Japanese whisky.

name: Kavalan Solist Port Single Cask Strength Single Malt Whiskey (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Port is a Portuguese fortified wine that is robust and sweet with a full and rich body. It is therefore usually served as a dessert wine or digestif. Kavalan Solist Port Cask is fully matured in Portuguese Port barriques in Taiwan's subtropical climate to create multiple fruity flavours such as plum, blueberry, blackberry and strawberry, with chocolate as the main background note.

name: Glen Scotia  Festival Scotch Whisky (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short:
Glen Scotia was born in a place like no other – the smallest whisky region on the west coast of Scotland that was to become the Victorian Whisky Capital of the World. We’re once again delighted to be opening our distillery doors to friends from near and afar, in a celebration of both Campbeltown and its rich whisky-making heritage.

The Campbeltown Malts Festival takes place for one week every May, and allows those few distilleries that have endured, to step away from their stills and fully open their doors to the local community and visitors from afar. For the workers at our Glen Scotia Distillery, the festival represents their favourite and most anticipated moment of the year – a time for celebration and raising a dram with old and new friends alike.

name: Kilchoman Sauternes Cask (Limited) (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
The Sauternes Cask Matured limited edition has spent its full maturation in ex-sauternes wine casks. Anthony Wills, Kilchoman Founder, selected a combination of fresh and refill Sauternes barriques from two separate years, the youngest being from 2018, creating an extraordinary balance of buttery sweetness, barbecued pineapple, candied ginger and floral peat smoke.

“After a six year absence, the Sauternes Cask Matured Kilchoman is back! The previous edition was a Sauternes finish, now it’s time for a return to the full power that complete maturation in these wine casks brings. Waves of sweet fruits and butterscotch balanced with our Islay peat smoke, a delicious dram.” Anthony Wills, Kilchoman Founder

name: Prakaan  Single Malt Whisky Tribura Series Double Cask (700 ml) (Special Pack)
desc_en_short:
DOUBLE CASK

Aged in Ex-Bourbon & Ex-Sherry Oak Cask

Kamphaeng Phet is one of the most ancient cities of Thailand, a prestigious connecting point in the prosperous era, famous for its impressive fortified walls. For centuries these walls have stood strong in defense of the Kingdom of Thailand. Honoring the social and cultural significance of this proud history, PRAKAAN single malt whisky pays respectful tribute to this iconic city with its venerable walls and keeps the legacy alive.

PRAKAAN single malt whisky was born in Kamphaeng Phet amidst unspoiled natural abundance where pure spring water is slowly filtered into underground reservoirs; an ideal environment for making fine quality whisky.

Our whisky is crafted by our proud craftsmen and women who combine their passion about nature and centuries old whisky making methods. PRAKAAN single malt whisky is expertly distilled and matured with great pride in the Kingdom of Thailand.

Blended from rare whiskies aged a full 21 years, it delivers a smooth, honeyed richness with gentle spice and soft smoke—an elegant choice for New Year celebrations and collectors.

name: Talisker 14 Year Old (700 ml) (F26 Special Releases 2025)
desc_en_short:
SWEET-SMOKY AND SALT SPRAYED SPICE NOTES RISE LIKE MAGMА

Finished in American oak casks toasted by the heat of volcanic rocks from Skye.

Journey beyond convention to fiery volcanic frontiers, where ocean meets magma.

Below wild unchartered seas deep volcanoes rumble. From the Isle of Skye, a land once sculpted by lava and ice, comes an expression with eruptive flavour. Experience taste as powerful as the moment the sea meets magma.

This Talisker expression was finished with an innovative process: new American oak casks toasted by the radiant heat of volcanic rocks from Skye. This finish, combined with the initial maturation in ex-bourbon casks, brings an elemental rush of maritime sweet smoke and spice.Wilder frontiers of flavour for fearless explorers.

name: Fever-Tree  Premium Refreshingly Light Indian Tonic Water (200 ml) (Pack 24 Bottles)
Fever-Tree  Premium Pink Grapefruit Soda Water (200 ml) (Pack 24 Bottles)
Mont Étoile  Natural Mineral Water (500 ml) (24 Bottles/PET)
desc_en_short:
The Story Behind Every Drop

Deep within the virgin forest of Khao Soi Dao, where mountain mist meets ancient granite, lies one of Thailand’s last untouched water sources.

Filtered naturally through 360 meters of subterranean rock layers, every drop of Mont Étoile is protected from modern contamination, emerging crisp, soft, and perfectly balanced.

This is water born in silence — unhurried, unseen, and refined by nature itself.

Bottled at source under ultra-filtration technology that preserves its natural mineral profile, Mont Étoile carries the serene energy of Thailand’s eastern highlands in every sip.

 

Why It Feels Different

Naturally Silica-Rich (SiO₂) – supports radiant skin and hair health.

Fluoride-Free & Low Sodium – gentle on the body, ideal for daily wellness.

Award-Winning Purity – honored with Monde Selection Grand Gold Award 2025, placing Mont Étoile among the world’s finest waters.

Close your eyes as you sip — notice how the texture feels softer than ordinary water, how your mind associates that softness with calm. That’s not coincidence; it’s neurosensory comfort, proven to increase perceived luxury and relaxation.

 

Taste Profile

Aroma: Clean mountain air, faint hint of mineral stone.

Palate: Silky texture, medium-light body, with subtle sweetness from natural minerals.

Finish: Lingering freshness — like mist dissolving at sunrise.

 

Perfect For

Daily hydration rituals and wellness routines.

Fine-dining service and wine pairing tables.

Hotels, spas, and offices seeking a statement of refinement.

Travelers and health-conscious families who prefer purity in every moment.

 

Sustainability Promise

Mont Étoile is bottled using eco-certified PET and energy-efficient production at the source in Chantaburi.
Each case you choose supports local employment and our mission to preserve the Khao Soi Dao watershed — ensuring Thailand’s natural purity flows for generations.

name: Monin  Tangerine (700 ml)
desc_en_short: The tangerine, also known as a mandarin, is an orange or red coloured citrus fruit, similar to  a clementine but with a slightly sourer taste.  They are traditionally given and eaten at Christmas, as they harvested from November to January.  During Chinese New Year, they are considered symbols of abundance and good fortune.

name: Monin  Falernum (700 ml)

Ride the Tiki cocktail revival and plunge into Polynesian drinks with MONIN Falernum syrup – the real taste of paradise!

name: Graham's  fine ruby

Ideal in combination with pastry or as an ingredient for delicious dishes.

desc_en_short: A medley of quince, fig, honey, crème brulee and citrus marmalade with a refreshing acidity which offsets the richness and lusciousness to give a deftly balanced finish. Nutty oak adds to the tactile layers of this wine adding to the impressive length and style.

name: Cantine Pellegrino  Marsala Fine Rubino (500 ml)
desc_en_short:
Fruity, in which the primary
perfumes of the grapes of origin
are exalted by hints of cherry
and plum, Sweet, warm and
harmonious, with elegantly tannic
finish.

name: La Spinetta   Bricco Quaglia Moscato D'Asti
desc_en_short: This wine is Yellow with green reflections. Aroma of Sweet and sexy, with aromas of apple and honeysuckle. On the palate Full bodied with sherbet, pair and peach flavors and a hint of sweet caramel.

name: Castellare Di Castellina  Vin Santo S.Niccolò IGT  (375 ml)
Fontanafredda  Moscato D'Asti Briccotondo DOCG
desc_en_short:
The fragrance of its aroma wich comes direct form the grapes, imbues this wine with an intense nose of
musk, black locust and orange flowers, sage and honey, and the lingering of its carefree flavour brings out the brightest of spirits. The warmth arid light that the sun has shed on the vineyards are reproduced in the glass, where this clear, straw-yellow wine has a pleasantly sweet taste that is very well-balanced and features honey
and just-picked grapes.

name: Michel Lynch  Bordeaux Rose
wine_color: Bold Raspberry Pink, Limpid And Bright
desc_en_short: A bold raspberry pink, limpid and bright colour; a delicate nose of red fruit and pomegranate; a hint of menthol when swirled around the glass. It is both soft and fresh in the mouth, offering fruit drop and tangy aromas, with a long fruity finish.

name: Baron Philippe de Rothschild  Mouton Cadet Bordeaux Rose
desc_en_short: Full and round, dominated by fresh fruit. A pleasant and succulent wine, it has a supple and elegant tannin structure and a fresh, remarkably long finish that lingers on red fruit flavour.

name: Pascal Jolivet  Attitude Rose
wine_color: A brilliant, pure pink in color.

name: Fantini  Gran Cuvee Rose
desc_en_short: Fresh and aromatic wine, good also as aperitif. Pomegranate pink, with intense and persistent aroma, fruity, with hints of ripe cherry, red currant, wild strawberry and raspberry. In the mouth is pleasantly aromatic, well-balanced and fresh. Elegant and persistent perlage. It matches perfectly with all kinds of seafood. Good also served as aperitif. Charm and elegance of authentic SWAROVSKI diamond in a classy bottle of a limited edition.

name: Gerard Bertrand  Gris Blanc Rose
wine_color: A very pale pink colour plus grey and whitish tints.
desc_en_short: An original rosé with a very pale pink colour plus grey and whitish tints. The bouquet reveals delightful red berry scents. A slight sparkle on the palate gives the wine all its freshness and brings out its fruit to the full. The elegant finish is pleasantly fresh and mineral.

name: Batasiolo  Moscato Rose
desc_en_short: A sweet, sparkling wine treat bringing well-perfumed aromatics and bursting with the fresh flavors of strawberry pie, peach cobbler, nutty desserts, or summer salads that are a little lighter on the acidity. Remember to serve well chilled to keep the bubbles and flavors at their peak.

name: Marques de Caceres  Satinela Rosado
wine_color: Bright, coral pink colour of medium intensity.
desc_en_short: Bright, coral pink colour of medium intensity. Notes of redcurrants, a touch of aniseed and white flowers come through o the nose. Deliciously full and fleshy in the mouth, luscious, versatile and very fresh. Perfect for spicy food, chicken, pizza, pasta, tomato salads, pork (basically mediterranean food), manchego cheese, cold cuts.

name: Conti Zecca  Donna Marzia Rosato - Tentazione Rose
desc_en_short: Bright and luminous cherry pink in colour. Delicate and pleasantly fruity aroma. Fresh, harmonious and well-structured. Paring with Italian and seafood appetisers, first courses in general, fish soup, baked fish and white meats.

name: Tasca D'Almerita  Regaleali Le Rose
desc_en_short: This is not simply a rosé, but a wine dedicated to roses, the ones at Regaleali that are plentiful and gorgeous. The wine is floral on the nose when drinking; this wine is made with Nerello Mascalese that preserves the integrity of the fruit thanks to the use of only steel. It is a lighthearted glass, like a white wine might be, but with body that reminds us of the red berries.

name: Zenato  Bardolino Chiaretto DOC
wine_color: Intense coral pink with purplish highlight.
desc_en_short: This wine is produced in the zone overlooking the southeast coast of Garda lake, between Bardolino and Peschiera; the pink colour derives from the partial contact with the skins of red Corvina, Rondinella and Molinara grapes.

name: Clarendelle  Bordeaux Rose Inspired by Haut-Brion AOC
desc_en_short: Thanks to very short maceration in a controlled atmosphere and direct pressing, the wine has a beautiful pale pink colour as well as a rich, smooth flavour. The powerful bouquet features floral aromas such as rose, as well as fruity overtones of blood orange, apricot, and grapefruit. The aromatic complexity on the nose carries over onto the palate, which includes lovely flavours of ripe fruit like redcurrant. The wine is suave and concentrated, while remaining tremendously fresh. A truly elegant vintage for Clarendelle Rosé!

name: Jacob's Creek  Le Petit Rose (750 ml)
desc_en_short:
Australian Rosé with a little French style. A fresh and delicate Rosé by Jacob's Creek showcasing a modern Australian approach and premium fruit from selected blocks of Pinot Noir, Grenache and Mataro. Taste of vibrant varietal flavours and a lovely textural, chalky acidity lead to a soft, generous yet restrained finish.

Award : TROPHY (Rosé Wine of the Year), China Wine & Spirits Awards 2018

name: Famille Perrin  La Vieille Ferme Rose
wine_color: Pretty pale pink color with pastel undertones.

name: Mirabeau  Pure Provence Rosé
wine_color: An ethereal ballet slipper pink with silver nuances

name: Matua  Rose
desc_en_short: Packed with deliciously ripe summerfruits -we’re talking about wild strawberry, rhubarb and cranberry backed up by a zesty herbal twist, all flowing through to a juicy, refreshing finish.

name: Minuty  M Rosé
desc_en_short: A splendid, pleasurable wine : The Grenache and Cinsault blend form an aromatic harmony offering notes of peach and candied orange. The flavor is crisp and round on the palate.

name: Gerard Bertrand  Cote des Roses Rose
wine_color: Tender, pale and brilliant rosé with bluish reflections evolving with time to more orange nuances

name: Chateau Maris  Rose Syrah Grenache (Organic)
desc_en_short: A subtle and balanced wine, elegant and tasty, floral and fruity, fresh and round. A wine to drink chilled with friends. Nice minerality that is in balance with the orange and raspberry notes.

name: Notte Rossa  Primitivo Rosato Salento IGP
wine_color: Raspberry pink, very clean and bright.
desc_en_short: Softly rosé, intense and persistent aroma of Mediterranean maquis, with cherry and raspberry notes. A fresh and elegant wine, balanced in the mouth.

name: Frescobaldi  Alie Rose Ammiraglia Tuscany IGT (Syrah, Vermentino)
Yellow Tail  Pink Moscato
wine_color: Strawberry, fairy floss, musk lollies and freshly crushed grapes.

name: Maison Castel  Côtes de Provence Rosé
wine_color: Pale pink robe with blue-ish hints

name: Domaine de la Mordorée  Vin de France "La Reine des Bois Tavel" - Rosé
Fantini Calalenta Merlot Rosato
wine_color: Strong ruby red with garnet highlights.
desc_en_short: This "Provence style" rosé has a very pale pink blush colour. fresh and flinty aromas of strawberry, fresh -cut watermelon and rose petals on the nose with mineral notes on the palate. The wine has a refreshing acidity that’s in harmony with the fruit and well-rounded with good length. Its long and intense finish is the signature of a rosé with incomparable elegance.

name: Le Puy Rose-Marie
desc_en_short: The Amoreau family,15 generations of winemakers since 1610. Located at the top of the same clay and fossil-rich limestone plateau as Saint-Emilion, overlooking the districts of Pomerol and Saint-Emilion, le Puy dominates the Dordogne Valley. At an altitude of 107m, it is the second-highest geodesic point of the Gironde department. This position lent its name to the site as of Roman times; le Puy means a high place, a podium, or a mountain peak.

name: De Bortoli Emeri's Garden Pink Moscato
style: White Frontignac / Muscat Gordo Blanco / Shiraz
desc_en_short: Seductive pastel pink in colour. The nose displays freshly crushed grapes, with a hint of strawberries. The palate is lively and fresh as one would expect from a frizzante style wine. The palate tastes of freshly crushed grapes and pink lady apples.

name: Sunnycliff Rose
desc_en_short: The Sunnycliff Rosé is typically made from Shiraz (Syrah) — a variety known in Australia for its juicy red‑fruit flavors and spiced personality.

name: Palazzo Grimani by Allegrini  Valpolicella Ripasso DOC
desc_en_short: Full and satisfying. The harmonious balance struck by an excellent structure and vibrant acidity renders this wine both smooth and vivacious. Pairings : Pot roast and braised meats accompanied with polenta (corn meal), grilled filet, quail, sliced beef with mushrooms, lamb spare ribs and mediummatured cheeses.

name: Castello Banfi  Chianti
desc_en_short: Celebrating the best Tuscan tradition Banfi offers a family of Chianti wines varied and complementary, unique in its style. Banfi Chianti Classico perfectly interprets the unique personality of this historic appellation with its alluring bouquet, rich flavours, supple tannins and good acidity.

name: Castello Banfi  Chianti Classico DOCG
desc_en_short: Celebrating the best Tuscan tradition Banfi offers a family of Chianti wines varied and complementary, unique in its style. Ruby red color. Intense bouquet with varietal notes of cherry, plum and violet , rich flavours, supple tannins and good acidity. Fresh, balanced, typical.A wine for every dish, matches meat dishes superbly.

name: Chateau Villa Bel Air  Rouge
desc_en_short:
Villa Bel-Air Rouge is refined and harmonious, with a balance between ripe fruit, earthy minerality, and integrated oak. Aromas of blackcurrant, red berries, roasted coffee, and wet stone make this wine both approachable and layered.

Its silky tannins and moderate acidity allow for both early enjoyment and mid-term aging, making it a versatile red for food pairing and relaxed sipping alike.

name: Seghesio  Sonoma Old Vin Zinfandel
desc_en_short:
Bold and spicy with rich, briary fruit, our Old Vine Zinfandel showcases the complexity
and intensity that only truly old vines can yield. For us, “Old Vine” means that the vines are at least 50 years
old, and we source grapes for this wine from exceptional vineyards that are closer to 75 years old on
average.

name: Carta Vieja  Limited Release Syrah
desc_en_short: Dark red colour with blue tones. Great aromatic intensity in which cerise, bilberries, chocolate, coffee bean and tobacco are revealed. Generous on the palate, with great balance and solid structure. Abundant mature black fruit is interwoven with notes of vanilla, bitter coffee.

name: Castello Banfi  Centine
desc_en_short:
Centine Rosso is fruity, fresh, and smooth, designed to be enjoyed on any occasion. With aromas of ripe cherry, violet, red plum, and soft herbs, it’s both versatile and refined.

A perfect introduction to Tuscan reds or a go-to wine for Mediterranean cuisine, Centine is balanced and welcoming in every sip.

name: Chateau du Courlat  Cuvee JB AOC Lussac Saint Emilion
desc_en_short: "Clean, intense nose with elegance and complexitty. Full, dense, good ripeness"  This is the wine for one who is seeking for a blended of intense flavour of Cabernet Sauvignon and fruity aroma Made from Merlot makes it ideal for beginner wine drinkers.

name: Sunnycliff  Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: This Cabernet from Sunnyclliff is one of those wines that you’ll find hard to resist and the perfect thing to pair with a mid-week barbecue. Expect black currant and dark chocolate aromas with a core of dark fruit flavours and subtle oak. The finish is soft yet persistent and the right foil for a chargrilled lamb steak.

name: Villa Girardi  Valpolicella Classico Superiore
desc_en_short: Very fresh and fruity, with lots of cherry notes. Fairly intense, sweet cherry flavours. Well balanced and full of flavours. Recommended with  pasta, pizza, vegetables, white and red meats, fresh cheeses.

name: Villa Girardi  Amarone delta Valplicella Classico
desc_en_short: Warm and refined aromas of ripe fruits on the nose. Complex, smooth, and full-bodied on the palate with cherry and plum notes that continue on to the finish. Pairs well with red meat,game, and aged cheeses. Also an excellent after-dinner wine.

name: Zonin  "Ventiterre" Nero d'Avola / Merlot
desc_en_short: This encounter between international Merlot and Sicilian Nero D’Avola produces a vigorously characterful wine: sanguine ruby-red in colour with a dark core of purple highlights, it reveals a powerful scent of black and red berries, both fresh and preserved, and more nuanced notes of tobacco. The palate is broad and very complex, with a decisive mouthfeel, elegant tannins, robust body and very persistent finish. It is best enjoyed with roasts, braised meats, kebabs and grilled meats.

name: Zonin  Ripasso Valpolicella Superiore DOC
desc_en_short: Elegant and medium bodied revealing stewed mixed berries, smoking tobacco and exotic spice that leads to plush and moderate tannins. The finish is long and reveals the wines complexity.

name: Montes  Alpha Merlot
desc_en_short: Montes Alpha Merlot from Chile's Colchagua Valley delivers a lush, ruby-hued wine brimming with black cherry, red berries, and black pepper, rounded out by a velvety mid-palate with vanilla, toast, and a long, elegant finish.

name: Baron Philippe de Rothschild  Mapu Reserva Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: “Beautiful dark red. Aromas of black currant, blackberries and blueberries. The taste is fresh and elegant, with round and soft tannins that gives the wine excellent balance. The long and expressive finish rounds off a wonderful fruity and powerful wine.”

name: Baron Philippe de Rothschild  Mapu Cabernet Sauvignon (Screw Cap)
desc_en_short: Mapu Cabernet Sauvignon is made by Baron Philippe de Rothschild in Chile. Cabernet Sauvignon gives balanced wines with well-rounded tannins and blackcurrant, pepper and liquorice flavours. This dry, medium-bodied and fruity red displays a simple and medium nose. On the palate, its refreshing acidity, fleshy tannins, and broad texture precede a medium finish.

name: San Pedro  Gato Negro Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Gato Negro Cabernet Sauvignon from Chile's Central Valley delivers ripe berries, cassis, and a touch of vanilla and chocolate, backed by smooth tannins and a satisfying finish — an everyday Chilean red that punches well above its price point.

name: San Pedro  Gato Negro Merlot
wine_color: Ruby red colour with purples tones.
desc_en_short: Gato Negro Merlot from San Pedro delivers ripe blackberry and plum aromas lifted by sweet vanilla and gentle toast, flowing into a smooth, medium-bodied palate with supple tannins — an approachable everyday Chilean red that over-delivers for its price.

name: Talamonti  Moda' Montepulciano D'Abruzzo Doc
wine_color: An intense ruby-red color with violet undertones.
desc_en_short: An intense ruby-red color with violet undertones. Intense bouquet of ripe red fruit. Rich in fruit, lively, elegantly framed by oak spices. A vibrant red wine that matches superbly cured meats, poultry, vegetable.

name: Conte Placido  Placido Chianti DOCG
desc_en_short: Ruby red in color. Intense aroma that hints of violets. Dry and well balanced with black-fruit flavors followed by a long finish. Excellent with meats, pastas and spicy foods.

name: Bodegas Palacios Remondo  La Vendimia Rioja
wine_color: Clean and bright ruby red colour with maroon reflections.
desc_en_short: Clean and bright ruby red colour with maroon reflections.Some nuances provided by the carbonic maceration appear first and give way to subtle notes of fresh orchard fruit, wild berries and ripe blood oranges and light spicy hints provided by the oak during the ageing. Young wine with a good intensity, the hints of red and black fruit provided by the carbonic maceration are dominant. It shows a fresh and fun attack, a light mid palate and a medium, very nice finish. Meant to drink now through the next four years, this consumer-friendly wine can be served slightly chilled and is the perfect accompaniment to any dish.

name: Domaine L'Ostal Cazes  Estibals Minervois AOC
desc_en_short: Powerful, generous and elegant, L’Ostal Cazes-Estibals is the very expression of the great wines of the Languedoc. With a strong purple colour, it offers aromas of garrigue scrubland, morello cherries and blackberries. On the palate, the tannins are present in very fine grain accompanied by an understated oakiness.

name: Bodegas Palacios Remondo  Camins del Priorat
desc_en_short: Red Wine Made from Priorat, Spain by Bodegas Palacios Remondo. Made from grape combination of Garnacha, Cariena, Cabernet Sauvignon and Syrah. This wine is bright purple. Aromas and flavors of ripe red berries, cola and spicecake, with a deeper note of licorice emerging with air. Lush and seamless, with very good finishing breadth and spicy persistence.

name: Langmeil  Three Gardens, Shiraz-Mourvedre - Grenache
desc_en_short: Medium depth crimson in color. Lifted, fresh and bright fruit leaps out of the glass with dark cherries, Turkish delight and white pepper dominating the aroma. The bright and juicy fruit coats the palate and is well balanced with peppery and sweet spice. Medium bodied in structure with great complexity and lovely silky tannins which flow through the lengthy and savoury finish.

name: Concha Y Toro  Marques de Casa Concha Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Marqués de Casa Concha Cabernet Sauvignon is a benchmark Chilean red from Concha y Toro, delivering a deep, richly structured wine with a deceptively silky texture that gives way to firm, lingering tannins — a classic expression of Puente Alto fruit at its finest.

name: Carpineto  Vino Nobile di Montepulciano Riserva
wine_color: Brilliant ruby red with a tendency to garnet.
desc_en_short: Brilliant ruby red with a tendency to garnet. Ethereal, extraordinarily elegant with hints of violet and wood. The flavor dry, harmonic, fruity and velvety, with an elegant texture and long finish.

name: Catena Zapata  Catena Alta Melbec
wine_color: A deep violet color, with blue reflections.
desc_en_short: Catena Alta Malbec shows a deep violet color, with blue reflections. The nose is elegant and complex with ripe red and black berry fruits, notes of violets and lavender and a touch of leather, spice and vanilla falvors. The palate is full and rich with soft and sweet tannins and a silky, smooth structure. Mulitple layers of rich cassis, black currant and blackberries are interwoven with hints ofl icorice and black pepper. Its lengthy finish is marked by wonderful minerality, finely grained tannins and lively acidity.

name: Concha Y Toro  Don Melchor
desc_en_short:
Don Melchor

After more than 30 years, Don Melchor has reached a solid position that enables it to face new challenges, highlighting its maturity and ability to express its own identity through Viña Don Melchor.

This identity is built upon a base of three fundamental pillars—its impeccable heritage and history, the peerless conditions of its terroir, and the deep understanding and expertise in the making of the Don Melchor wine.

name: Castello Banfi  Brunello di Montalcino DOCG Poggio alle Mura
desc_en_short: Deep ruby red with garnet reflections. Bouquet are rich and ample, with hints of prune jam, coffee, cacao and a light balsamic note. The palate is full and powerful, with ripe and gentle tannins making it velvety and harmonious. This wine is particularly suited to accompany red meat, savory game and aged cheeses. Meditation wine.

name: Cantine Leonardo Da Vinci  Monna Lisa Toscana Rosso IGT
wine_color: Purple-red in colour, it is very clear.

name: San Polo  Brunello Di Montalcino DOCG
wine_color: Intense ruby-red in color with garnet hues
desc_en_short: Intense ruby-red in color with garnet hues, San Polo Brunello offers classic aromas of violets, small red berries, and more subtle notes of coffee and tobacco. It is warm and full-bodied on the palate, with ripe, firm tannins balanced by a lively acidity, and the flavors unfold into a long, well-rounded finish.

name: Antinori  Chianti Classico Riserva "Marchese" Tignanello DOCG
flavor_tags: Mineral, Leather, Tobacco, Cherry, Earthy, Cedar, Plum
food_matching: Pasta, Pizza, Roasted Chicken, Pork, Medium Cheese
desc_en_short: The Marchese Antinori Chianti Classico Riserva is one of Tuscany's most prestigious single-estate Riservas — deep, complex Sangiovese from the historic Tignanello estate with concentrated dark cherry, tobacco, cedar, and the firm mineral backbone of Chianti Classico at its finest.

name: La Braccesca By Antinori  Rosso di Montepulciano "Sabazio" DOC
food_matching: Pasta, Pizza, Roasted Chicken, Pork, Medium Cheese
desc_en_short: Sabazio is the fresh, approachable Rosso di Montepulciano from Antinori's La Braccesca estate — a joyful, early-drinking Sangiovese (Prugnolo Gentile) with vibrant cherry, spice, and earthy warmth, ready to enjoy now with classic Tuscan food.

name: Castello Della Sala By Antinori  Pinot Nero Umbria IGT
flavor_tags: Raspberry, Mushroom, Cherry, Earthy, Rose, Oak
food_matching: Pasta, Pizza, Roasted Chicken, Pork, Medium Cheese
desc_en_short: This Pinot Nero from Antinori's Castello della Sala estate in Umbria is a refined, elegant red — light-to-medium bodied with cherry, raspberry, earthy spice, and silky tannins, showing how well Burgundy's great grape adapts to central Italy's cooler hillside terroir.

name: Tenuta Guado al Tasso By Antinori  Il Bruciato Bolgheri
flavor_tags: Blackberry, Rosemary, Cherry, Violet, Cedar, Thyme, Oak
food_matching: Red Meat, Grilled Steak, Lamb, Hard Cheese, BBQ
desc_en_short: Il Bruciato is the approachable entry point into Antinori's prestigious Guado al Tasso estate in Bolgheri — a warm, generously fruited coastal Tuscan red with dark cherry, Mediterranean herbs, spice, and smooth polished tannins.

name: Batasiolo  Barolo Vigneto Boscareto
desc_en_short: The color is deep garnet red with orange reflections accented with shades of pink and purple. Intense and persistent, ethereal with notes of fruit and dried flowers. It has evident aromas of sweet spice, toast and leather. Of remarkable structure, enhances tannins but remain soft and pleasant with typical austerity; full-bodied and very charming.

name: Batasiolo  Barolo Riserva
wine_color: Intense garnet red color with delicate orange highlights.
desc_en_short: The taste test showed that soft notes, accompanied by a good alcohol and a harmonious union of tannins and freshness, offering pleasant feelings of completeness and body. Ideal in combination with dishes based on red meats, game, roasts and cheeses and cured meats.

name: Velenosi  Roggio Del Filare
wine_color: Brilliant, gleaming ruby red with a hint of garnet.
desc_en_short: This wine is mainly made with Montepulciano and Sangiovese grapes, then refined in French oak barriques. This wine has a luminous and concentrated colour, a wide and elegant aroma which recalls sour black cherries and the small red fruits. Also its taste is wide, soft, varied with a successful balance of fruit and wood.

name: Vigneti Del Vulture  Piano Del Cerro Aglianico Del Vulture DOC
desc_en_short: Intense deep ruby red with ample and complex aromas of sour cherry, aromatic herbs, vanilla and thyme. A strong personality with silky and highly persistent tannins that are nonetheless never invasive. Hints of chocolate with persistent creamy and fruity finale.

name: Vigneti Del Vulture  Tufarello Nero Di Troia IGT
desc_en_short: Ruby red with garnet highlights. Intense, longlasting and fruity perfume. Wine of great structure, tannic and well balanced. It's matches with salami, first courses, red meat, and seasoned cheese.

name: Batasiolo  Langhe Rosso
wine_color: A wine of intense ruby red color, limpid and transparent.
desc_en_short:
A wine of intense ruby red color, limpid and transparent. The bouquet has hints of fruitiness marked with pleasant sensations of red berry fruits, herbs and spices. The sensation of the aromatic wood completes this truly enjoyable wine. In the mouth, tannius, a delicate freshness and pleasant wine 
alcohol content make it round, fruity, pleasantly full and enveloping. Perfect drinks with appetizer, pasta and risotto, white and red meats, and medium-aged cheeses.

name: Allegrini  Valpolicella Classico DOC
desc_en_short: Ruby red in color, with purplish-blue highlights; the nose exhibits fragrant fruit with prominent notes of cherries, echoed by fresher hints of pepper and aromatic herbs, typical of Corvina and Corvinone, the historic varietals of this appellation. Whilst young it is impressively lively and playful on the palate whereas some two years on it expresses greater delicacy and finesse.

name: Allegrini  La Poja IGT
desc_en_short: The premium quality viticultural techniques yield grapes with great personality and maturity. After over 4 years of ageing, the wine is still extraordinarily fresh and crisp with a full spectrum of aromas ranging from fruit to spices and officinal herbs. Full bodied and luscious, with a long, lingering finish.

name: Corte Giara by Allegrini  Merlot del Veneto
desc_en_short: Bright and intense ruby red. Vinous and brimming with red fruit with just discernible vegetal notes in the background. Full and embracing on the palate, succulent, medium-bodied, with a good acidic backbone and texture of soft, evenly-woven tannins. Try with pasta with beans, roast pork with sauerkraut, liver with green peppers, Creole cuisine and selected goat’s milk cheeses.

name: Corte Giara by Allegrini  Bardolino DOC
wine_color: Ruby red of medium intensity with purplish highlights.
desc_en_short: Ruby red of medium intensity with purplish highlights. Intense and fragrant, with dominant notes of small woodland berries accompanied by the characteristic spiciness of pepper and rose-hip blossom. Dry and harmonious, it captivates the palate with its elegance and succulent easy-drinking style. Pairs well with simple Mediterranean cuisine, especially pasta and seasonal soups.

name: Bodegas Salentein  Portillo Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Portillo Cabernet Sauvignon from Bodegas Salentein delivers classic Mendoza depth — dark fruit, black pepper spice, and a smooth, fruit-forward palate with firm tannins that make it an effortless match for grilled red meats and hearty weekend dinners.

name: Sileni Estates  Cellar Selection Pinot Noir Hawke's Bay
desc_en_short: This ripe, deeply coloured food wine has concentrated black cherry aromas which follow through to the palate where dark berry flavours are supported by soft tannins. Perfect for early drinking but capable of cellaring for up to 6 years.

name: Marques De Riscal  Gran Reserva, DOC Rioja
desc_en_short: Marqués de Riscal Gran Reserva is a benchmark Rioja built from Tempranillo, Graciano, and Mazuelo, aged to develop its signature garnet-brick hue alongside deep layers of black cherry, marzipan, dark chocolate, and a long, refined finish that defines classic Rioja elegance.

name: Marques De Riscal  Riscal 1860
wine_color: Intense, black cherry colour, with violet glints.
desc_en_short: A vibrant everyday Rioja from the iconic Marqués de Riscal house, blending Tempranillo with Syrah, Merlot, and Cabernet Sauvignon for a fresh, fruit-forward red with aromatic spice, smoky oak, and a satisfying finish that punches well above its price point.

name: Torres  Salmos
wine_color: Dark in hue and almost opaque.
desc_en_short:
Winemaker

Wonderfully intense on the nose, with predominant notes of dark cherry and plum jam, against a mentholated eucalyptus backdrop and notes of toast. Sweet on entry, very velvety palate, and well structured, culminating in an elegant, fresh finish.

name: Torres  Gran Coronas Reserva Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: The rich, sensual aroma is typical of the grape varieties recalling small red and black berries (cherries and blackcurrants), green coffee beans, liquorice and the characteristic vanilla and leather notes from ageing. On the palate the wine is full and silky with dense, well-structured tannins.

name: Torres  Coronas
desc_en_short: The traditional Tempranillo variety is the basis of Coronas, ennobled with a small proportion of Cabernet Sauvignon. Its intense colour and lush aromas of cherry and black plums on a background of green coffee. It is aged in oak barrels to achieve a soft, rounded sensation on the palate with a big finish.

name: Domaines Barons de Rothschild (Lafite)  Blason d' Aussieres
desc_en_short: The attack is clean and well-balanced. There is plenty of freshness with plump tannins that are already well integrated. The high proportion of Mourvèdre makes its mark in the slightly peppery finish.

name: Louis Latour  Pinot Noir Domaine de Valmoissine
E.Guigal  Gigondas AOC
desc_en_short: Purple colour. Intense nose dominated by peach and apricot with liquorice and notes of undergrowth Generous, powerful and full- bodied with a long elegant finish. Food matching with red meat, game and cheese.

name: Chateau Cissac  Cru Bourgeois
style: Cabernet Sauvignon, 20% Merlot And 5% Petit Verdot
desc_en_short: A classic Médoc from the reliable Cru Bourgeois estate of Château Cissac, this Cabernet Sauvignon-dominant blend delivers lifted cassis, cedar, and pencil-shaving aromas with a rich, smooth palate of blackberry and blackcurrant framed by elegant structure and a refined finish.

name: Wolf Blass  Yellow Label Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Cabernet Sauvignon from South Australia's finest Cabernet regions is expertly blended to create a generous wine with rich varietal flavours of cassis, blood plum, a hint of leafiness and sweet spicy oak. Great matches well with chargrilled, braised or roasted red meats.

name: Two Oceans  Cabernet Sauvignon/Merlot
desc_en_short:
*Minimum Qty Allowed in Shopping Cart 3 Bottles.

Ruby red, beautifully soft and easy-drinking, its lovely ripe plum and red fruit flavours almost jump out of the glass. A great match with red meats like roast lamb, stews, grilled meat, carpaccio and kidneys.

name: Frescobaldi  Castiglioni Chianti DOCG
wine_color: The color is a purple red with violet reflections.

name: Frescobaldi  Remole Toscana IGT
desc_en_short: A Tuscan everyday classic from the Frescobaldi estate, Remole blends Sangiovese and Cabernet Sauvignon into a luminous, fruit-driven red brimming with blackberry, cherry, and warming spice — versatile enough to grace any table, any night of the week.

name: Luce Della Vite  La Vite Lucente Toscana IGT
desc_en_short: Lucente 2020 shows a brilliant ruby red color. The nose is rich in black fruits such as blueberries and blackberries, accompanied by a light balsamic and pan brioché note. The palate is soft supported by a nice freshness, with enveloping tannins and a long fruity aftertaste.

name: Pala  I Fiori Centosere  Cannonau Di Sardegna DOC
Tommasi  Ripasso Valpolicella Classico Superiore IGT
desc_en_short: Tommasi's Ripasso Valpolicella Classico Superiore is a richly layered Italian red, re-fermented over Amarone grape skins to deliver concentrated dark fruit, warming spice, and a smoky depth — a compelling step between everyday Valpolicella and the grandeur of Amarone.

name: Umani Ronchi  San Lorenzo Rosso Conero DOC
wine_color: Brilliant ruby red colour with garnet tints.

name: Gerard Bertrand  Cigalus Rouge
wine_color: Intense ruby color with a mahogany hue.
style: Cabernet Sauvignon, Cabernet Franc, Merlot, Syrah, Grenache, Carignan And Caladoc.

name: Haras de Pirque By Antinori  Cabernet Sauvignon Albis
flavor_tags: Blackcurrant, Dark Fruit, Eucalyptus, Graphite, Mineral, Cedar, Plum, Game, Oak
food_matching: Red Meat, Grilled Steak, Lamb, Hard Cheese, BBQ
desc_en_short: Albis is the flagship wine of Haras de Pirque, Antinori's prestigious Chilean estate in the Maipo Alto — a powerful, refined Cabernet Sauvignon blend showing the best of the Andes' influence: dark fruit concentration, elegant structure, and mineral depth.

name: Gerard Bertrand  Naturalys Syrah
wine_color: A lovely garnet-red colour with violet tints.
desc_en_short: Gérard Bertrand's Naturalys Syrah is a sun-drenched Languedoc red delivering supple blackberry fruit, garrigue-kissed aromatics, and firm yet polished tannins — a Mediterranean expression of Syrah at its most generous and food-friendly.

name: Yalumba  Y Series Shiraz Viognier
desc_en_short: Yalumba's Y Series Shiraz Viognier is a signature South Australian blend delivering exotic aromas of Turkish delight, violets, and black cherry, with a generous, spiced palate of rhubarb and blueberry fruit that finishes beautifully round and soft.

name: Yalumba  Organic Shiraz
wine_color: Magenta in colour with purple hues.

name: Chateau Ste. Michelle  Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: 86 points in Wine Enthusiast - "Appealing aromas of leafy green herb and cherry lead to plump fruit flavors that paint around the edges. The concentration is light, particularly through the middle, but what's there is pleasant."

name: Chateau Ste. Michelle  Syrah
desc_en_short: The Columbia Valley Syrah is a soft, ripe Syrah with ripe berry fruit aromas and flavors with hints of vanilla and brown sugar spice. Syrah was co-fermented with Viognier for an even more accessible and fruit forward style of Syrah. This is an enjoyable red.

name: Millaman  Estate Reserve Merlot
desc_en_short: A plush, fruit-forward Merlot from Chile's Curico Valley, Millaman Estate Reserve delivers ripe plum and cherry flavours with soft vanilla notes, round tannins, and a warm, lingering finish that makes it effortlessly approachable.

name: Millaman  Limited Reserve Zinfandel
wine_color: Intense red color with violet tinges.
desc_en_short: A bold Maipo Valley Zinfandel from Millaman, delivering intense red fruit, spice, and seamlessly integrated oak with a full-bodied palate, soft mature tannins, and a long, fruity finish — a rare and expressive example of this Italian-origin variety thriving in Chilean terroir.

name: Santa Carolina  Cabernet Sauvignon Reserva
desc_en_short: Deep, voluptuous violet. Classic cassis and cocoa overtones on aromas. A hint of acidity to balance out its full body and weighty tannins. Ideal with roasted meat, caramelized onions, and barbecued lamb.

name: Lindeman's  Bin 50 Shiraz
desc_en_short: A medium to full bodied Shiraz, packed with intense plum flavours, touches of dark chocolate and spice. Creamy vanillin oak characters frame the long, Soft tannins on the finish create a very approachable wine.

name: Ricasoli  Chianti Classico Gran Selezione Castello di Brolio DOCG
Ricasoli  Rocca Guicciarda Chianti Classico Riserva DOCG
Fattoria dei Barbi  Brunello Di Montalcino DOCG
Joseph Drouhin  Beaujolais Villages
wine_color: A lovely raspberry colour and a brilliant hue.

name: Nederburg  Duet Shiraz Pinotage
desc_en_short: A blend of Shiraz and Pinotage, its juicy berry fruit is offset by alluring notes of spice and smokiness. Medium to full-bodied with velvety fruit, cinnamon and integrated oak flavours. Fantastic with Mediterranean meat dishes such as spicy lamb, kebabs or traditional roasts, oxtail and barbecued steaks.

name: Nederburg  Winemaster's Reserve Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: A rich and full-bodied wine with ripe fruit, cherry and delicate oak spice flavours, firm tannins and a lingering aftertaste. Excellent served with robust dishes such as pâtés and steaks, as well as full-bodied dishes such as beef stroganoff, winter stews, roasts and mature cheeses.

name: Louis Jadot  Beaujolais Villages
desc_en_short: Strong red purple colour. Fresh red fruits on the nose with a hint of dark cherry. Slightly spicy with a touch of grey pepper, liquorice and a touch of rose flower. The whole wine is very well balanced with a nice acidity and the tannins presence on the finish invites food pairing such as with Terrines, Charcuteries, Grilled red meat, white fish, cheese or simply as the sole wine of a meal.

name: Sutter Home  Zinfandel
desc_en_short: Bright yet full of juicy blackberry flavors, followed by a hint of spicy black pepper, it has a smoothness and zest that work in glorious harmony. Kick back with casual, everyday foods such as grilled chicken, barbecue, pizza, pastas, and burgers.

name: E.Guigal  Cote-Rotie Brune Et Blonde De Guigal
desc_en_short: This wine is refined, textured and chiseled. It has notes of sweet berries, charred bark, sandalwood and chocolate. Medium- to full-bodied, with finely grained tannins. Velvety texture, with a bright, structured core of red berries at the center. The whole is balanced and refined. The power is controlled and the finish precise.

name: Castello Colle Massari  Montecucco Riserva DOC
desc_en_short: A wine produced from vineyards at 300 m asl and of varying expositions, where the soil is characterized by tufaceous clays and calcareous marl, alluvial pebble and conglomerate, ferrous and calcareous clays. Some of the grapes come from old vineyards. Vinification in stainless steel vats for 25 to 30 days with maceration at 27°C to 30°C. Malolactic fermentation in stainless steel tanks. Ages for 18 months in vats, barrique and tonneaux, 50 % new and 50 % in second and third passage. Bottle refinement 12 months minimum.

name: Marques de Caceres  Crianza
desc_en_short: Dark ruby red colour. Fresh notes of red berries on the nose enriched by a depth of vanilla and sweet spice. Clean and lively on tasting with ripe tannins that blend with balanced structure. Fleshy in the mouth with delicious flavours, this is a wine for pleasure.

name: Bottega  Valpolicella Superiore Ripasso DOC
wine_color: Intense ruby red with purplish highlights.

name: Cordero Di Montezemolo  Barbera d'Alba DOC
Nicolis  Seccal Valpolicella Classico Superiore Ripasso DOC
Terrazas  Grand Malbec
wine_color: Intense purple color with violet shades.
desc_en_short: Originating from 12 Malbec plots from three of our best regeneratively grown vineyards, located at the foothills of the Andes in Luján de Cuyo and the Uco Valley. The grapes from each plot are destemmed and gravity-fed into tanks. A blend of plots is made and aged in first-use oak barrels for 12 months, in oak tanks, and in second-use barrels to maintain the freshness and purity of the fruit.

name: Nicolis  Amarone della Valpolicella Classico DOCG
wine_color: Deep dark ruby red which gradually turns into garnet.

name: Chateau Ducru-Beaucaillou  Le Petit Caillou, St Julien
desc_en_short: A Saint-Julien countercurrent, produced by the team of Château Ducru-Beaucaillou, prestigious Cru Classé of Saint-Julien . With Le Petit Caillou, Bruno Borie declines his legendary wine in a vintage accessible from his earliest youth, coming from vineyards located on the western part of the Saint-Julien appellation . Blend of cabernet-sauvignon (50%), merlot (40%) and cabernet franc , matured in barrels with a third of new wood, Le Petit Caillou offers elegant aromas of black fruits, tobacco and cedar with tannins sweet.

name: Torres  Ibericos Crianza La Rioja DOC
desc_en_short: Opaque cherry red color. Floral (Damascus rose) and fruit (strawberry, raspberry) aromas with spicy and smoky notes imparted by oak aging. Velvety, smooth, with fine, juicy tannins.

name: Casanova di Neri  Irrosso Toscana Rosso
desc_en_short: Intense ruby red, hints of wild cherry, violets and red fruits ample and easy to drink with excellent persistence. Serve at a temperature of 16° - 17° opening the bottle a few hours previously or decant delicately. Paring with Tuscan cold cuts, pasta with tomato sauce, roast white meats.

name: Conti Zecca  Donna Marzia Primitivo IGP Salento Primitivo Rosso
desc_en_short: Intense ripe fruit and spicy notes. Soft with ripe fruit. Velvety and well-structured. Goes well with rich first courses, red meat in general and mature cheeses.

name: Conti Zecca  Primitivo Zinfandel Rifugio IGT
desc_en_short: Intense ruby red colour. Aroma of matured fruit with hint of spice. Velvety and well-structured. Very good with first courses, red meats and matured cheeses.

name: Corte Rugolin  Valpolicella Classico Superiore Ripasso DOC
desc_en_short: The Ripasso wine is produced by fermenting the Valpolicella Classico on the pressed Amarone grapes, soaking in wine. The result is a highquality, long-lasting wine with a strong and bold character and an intense bouquet of cherries, plums and jam. Serve at 18-20°C.

name: Orma by Tenuta Sette Ponti  Bolgheri IGT
desc_en_short: Orma epitomizes the style of wine that has made Bolgheri a household name among enthusiasts of the 'Super-Tuscan' phenomenon.  Bordelaise grape varieties achieve superlative expression in Bolgheri, but they do so in a style that is unique to this low-lying, sun-drenched, and breezy zone near the Tyrrhenian Sea. Orma's composition of 50% Merlot, 30% Cabernet Sauvignon, and 20% Cabernet Franc blends the ripeness and density that one might associate with Napa's sunny skies with earthiness and power similar to that for which Bordeaux is the benchmark.  A backbone of vibrant acidity and aromas of dusty earth keep Orma's identity firmly Italian.

name: Tenuta Sette Ponti  Crognolo
desc_en_short:
Winemaker Notes

The  harvest was a winemakers dream in terms of quality. Quantity however was down from the previous season due to a rough growing season. The season saw cooler then average temperatures that led to a slight reduction in yields. This was followed by a very warm and dry summer - with only one rainfall in August to help the vines. Harvesting began in the beginning of October and the resulting wines have wonderful flavors with exceptional profiles.

name: Tenuta Sette Ponti  Chianti Vigna di Pallino DOCG
desc_en_short: A bouquet of rich, red fruits melds with hints of spice imparted by the oak ageing in large barrels. This intense ruby coloured wine is smooth and velvety on the palate, yet well structured with a deep flavour. This is a pleasant, balanced wine, which should be served at 18°C, and pairs well with roast meats and medium cheeses.

name: Fontodi  Flaccianello della Pieve
desc_en_short: Flaccianello combines all the wild and old-world characteristics of the Sangiovese grape with the modern vinification techniques of what may be the top winemaking house in Tuscany today. The vineyards from which this wine takes its name continues to produce a Sangiovese of superior quality year on year. Made with 100% Sangiovese.

name: Fontodi  Chianti Classico DOCG
desc_en_short: Fontodi is located in the heart of Chianti Classico precisely in the valley which lies south of the town of Panzano and is called the "Conca d'Oro" (the golden shell) because of its amphitheatre shape. A genuine and characteristic "Terroir", famous for centuries for its tradition of quality wine cultivation, thanks to a unique combination of high altitude, calcar clayschist soil, lots of light, and a fantastic micro-climate – warm and dry with a marked difference in day and night-time temperatures.

name: Framingham  Pinot Noir
desc_en_short: This wine is Complex nose with some attractive, savoury, “smoky bacon”, meat and spice notes. Cherry, plum and sweet, light red fruits. Flavors is Slightly dusty tannins and balanced acid create an approachable palate with a juicy, structured finish.

name: Salisbury 1848  Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Juicy sweet dark berries and plum provide the richness to the refined and elegant tannins that provide a structure to the wine. Delicious with game meat dishes.

name: Carta Vieja  Cabernet Sauvignon
wine_color: Attractive red color with soft purplish tones.
desc_en_short: Attractive red color with soft purplish tones. Fruity and typical nose of this variety. Black cherries and berries aromas are mixed with sweet notes of chocolate and mocha. On the palate, it is balanced and with a velvety texture. Blueberries, cassis and mature blackberries appear, supported by soft and elegant tannins that leave a long and pleasant sensation.

name: Vina El Principal  Memorias
desc_en_short: The season was characterized by a warm spring and normal rainfall according to the historical average and 20% higher compared to the previous season. The summer had high temperatures which led in an earlier harvest and similar to the harvested by hand since march 16th. Clusters and grains were selected and were brought into the tanks gravitationally.

name: Chateau Pey la Tour  Reserve Bordeaux Superieur
desc_en_short: Characterised by intense, appealing, fresh fruit aromas (strawberry), of great finesse. Lovely rounded character from the outset. The wine is complex and concentrated, while superbly generous and underpinned by silky tannins. The delicious fresh fruit remains a constant throughout the tasting, until the long, flavour-filled finish. This harmonious wine is particularly appealing.

name: Chateau Timberlay  Prestige Red
desc_en_short: Chateau Timberlay Prestige Red is a fine wine with a deep colour and an elegant bouquet of ripe fruit, overlaid with hints of vanilla, spice and fresh toast. This full-bodied, rich and well-balanced wine has silky, soft tannin, and a delicious long aftertaste with just the right touch of oak.

name: Dourthe  Grands Terroirs Medoc
desc_en_short: This Médoc wine boasts a beautiful, deep garnet-red colour and a nose dominated by red berry fruit aromas. Initially powerful on the palate, the wine reveals good structure, with perfectly ripe, delicious tannins leading into a long, aromatic finish.

name: Chateau Belgrave  Haut-Medoc Grand Cru
desc_en_short: The nose opens with an intense, complex bouquet, unveiling aromas of blackcurrant and blackberry. These black-fruit notes are joined by nuances of cedar and licorice, enhanced by subtle touches of spice and toasted oak. On the palate, the attack is powerful and generous, carried by a full structure and refined, velvety tannins. The palate reveals a fine concentration of ripe fruit, supported by balanced acidity that brings freshness and elegance. The finish lingers with persistence, leaving a harmonious, complex impression.

name: Dourthe  Grands Terroirs Saint-Emilion
desc_en_short: A classic Saint-Émilion from Dourthe's Grands Terroirs range, this Merlot-dominant blend delivers ripe fruit, warming spice, and the appellation's signature rounded elegance — approachable yet structured, with supple tannins and a satisfying length.

name: Coli  Chianti Classico DOCG
wine_color: Lively ruby-red, beautifully intense, evolving to garnet with ageing.
desc_en_short: Lively ruby-red, beautifully intense, evolving to garnet with ageing. Intense, yet delicate; sometimes with a hint of violets and a tendency to become more complex by ageing. Dry, supple, well balanced between a full body and a good structure of tannins.

name: Coli  Chianti Classico Riserva DOCG
wine_color: Lively ruby-red, beautifully intense, evolving to garnet with ageing.
desc_en_short: Lively ruby-red, beautifully intense, evolving to garnet with ageing. Intense, yet delicate; sometimes with a hint of violets and a  tendency to become more complex by ageing. The palate is dry, supple, well balanced between a full body and a good. The Chianti Classico Riserva matches very well with game.

name: Freixenet  Mia Tinto (Tempranillo)
desc_en_short: Wine of darker ruby-red colour with red rim and medium viscosity. In its intense and opened aroma we can sense blackberries with dominance of blackcurrants, enriched by barrique tones of oak wood and sweet pepper. Taste is fuller with nicely incorporated tannins.

name: Solar Viejo  Crianza
desc_en_short: After gentle agitation, dominated by aromas of ripe red fruit and black liquorice. They are also chocolates and spicy white pepper in particular. In mouth sweet, fruity and intense flavors from the barrel. Balanced acidity, alcohol and structure, typical of a good tempranillo. Friendly tannins and medium persistence.

name: Oak Vineyards  Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Captures the very best qualities of this variety, with its hints of bell pepper and spice aromas. This wine is full-flavored and hearty yet soft on the palate with a smooth, long finish. This is a perfect wine to serve with hearty beef dishes, leg of lamb and chocolate desserts.

name: Oak Vineyards  Merlot
desc_en_short: Oak Vineyards Merlot from California is a deep, dark-maroon red brimming with plum, fresh cherry, and ripe raspberry fruit, layered with enticing notes of coffee and dark chocolate — an approachable yet full-bodied wine that delivers bold California character in every glass.

name: Crane Lake  Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Crane Lake Cabernet Sauvignon This wine is Rich color with notes of blackberry, cherry, raspberry and vanilla. Tannins are soft and layered. This wine pairs well with aged cheddar and gouda cheeses. Also try it with leg of lamb, rib eye steak or pastain a marinara sauce.

name: Coastal Ridge  Merlot
desc_en_short: Coastal Ridge Merlot This wine is Crafted to promote the marvelous intrinsic qualities of this grape, you will find flavors of raspberry, strawberry, and plum in abundance. Silky tannins highlight a long and pleasing finish

name: Coastal Ridge  Pinot Noir
desc_en_short: Coastal Ridge Pinot Noir this wine is Ruby color. Aromas and flavors of cherry and apple butters with a supple, fruity-yet-dry medium body and a honeyed, crunchy tannin finish. Soft tannins harmonize with flavors of black cherry, plum, and strawberry.

name: Bogle  Merlot
desc_en_short: Gorgeous in the glass with rich hues of garnet, the first impressions entice with aromas of sandalwood, vanilla and black cherry. The mouthwatering entry is full of red plums and cherries, while the middle palate of the wine softens with touches of cola and a smooth and silky mouthfeel. Notes of baking spices and mocha are left behind by the 12 months in American oak, leading to a lingering, luxe finish.

name: Duckhorn  Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon
style: Cabernet Sauvignon, 10% Merlot, 6% Petit Verdot, 2% Cabernet Franc
desc_en_short: Duckhorn's signature Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon blends estate and top-grower fruit into a rich, seamlessly balanced red with dark fruit depth, polished oak, and firm tannins — expressive enough to enjoy now, yet structured for years of rewarding cellaring.

name: Francis Coppola  Director's Cut Zinfandel
desc_en_short: The Director’s Cut Zinfandel demonstrates a lush full body and velvety palate. Scents of blackberries, cherries, cloves, black pepper and oak are followed by flavors of black currants and raspberries that are enlivened with intriguing notes of bramble, anise, and spices.

name: McManis  Zinfandel
desc_en_short: The hue of the medium dark purple The McManis Family Vineyards Zinfandel, displays all the attractive qualities of a young wine. Odoriferous, pleasant ripe red currants and fresh Strawberry immediately come to mind, while after some contemplation caramelized sugar and toast become incontrovertible. The savoriness of bright red fruits are enveloped in the succulent, juicy wine which possesses soft, supple tannins.

name: Domaines Barons de Rothschild (Lafite)  Legende Bordeaux Rouge
desc_en_short: Lovingly cared for by a multitude of winegrowers, the common characteristic of Bordeaux’s vineyards is the elegance and freshness of their wines which, while they reflect a rich culture and are are surrounded by a certain grandeur, are nonetheless easy to drink.

name: Dominus Estate 2016
style: Cabernet Sauvignon, 8% Petit Verdot, 8% Cabernet Franc
desc_en_short: Filled with notes of deep forest berries, juniper and truffle, Dominus 2016 is restrained and compact. The tightly woven structure promises to reveal fine tannins, earth, lavender and dark chocolate and will improve over many years.

name: Altos Las Hormigas  Reserve Malbec
wine_color: Impenetrable black colour with a bright purple rim.
desc_en_short: A benchmark Uco Valley Malbec from Altos Las Hormigas, grown on limestone-rich soils across Altamira, Vista Flores, and Gualtallary, then aged 18 months in large untoasted foudres — delivering layered mineral complexity, fine-grained tannins, and a signature chalky finish that sets this apart from fruit-forward Malbec conventions.

name: Grosset  Gaia
desc_en_short: An outstanding Gaia from an outstanding Clare Valley vintage. This single vineyard red is a blend of cabernet sauvignon and cabernet franc from a rocky, isolated, wind-swept two hectare block close planted by Grosset. It’s a remarkable blend with voluminous red berry aromatics, deep opulent blackcurrant, dark plum and redcurrant characters with hints of licorice, chocolate and wild brambles. It has layer after layer of concentrated flavours, power and density, balanced by substantial fine-grain tannins. Complex, arresting and satisfying.

name: Glaetzer  Wallace
desc_en_short: 91 points in International Wine Cellar - "Expressive aromas of black raspberry, woodsmoke, violet and cracked pepper. Intensely flavored but light on its feet,with good spicy lift to its dark berry and floral pastille flavors. Finishes with supple tannins and very good, floral-dominated persistence."

name: Glaetzer  Anaperenna
desc_en_short: The wine is a seamless fusion of two varieties: Shiraz and Cabernet Sauvignon. Bright and vibrant dark purple color with an expressive nose of black currant, liquorice and anise. A finely structured and elegant tannin structure supports luscious flavors of chocolate and dark berries with fresh acidity. A wine that will evolve very well with long term cellaring .

name: Heritage  Shiraz
desc_en_short: This flavoursome wine has intense colour, showing loads of syrupy blackberry & spice on the nose. The palate is full-bodied, with toasty oak & sweet fruit in good harmony. Twelve months maturation in American oak barriques has added a subtle depth to the varietal characters.

name: Heartland  Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: This densely coloured wine displays lifted aromas of blackberry and cassis on the nose. Richly textured, the palate offers opulent sweet fruit flavours with a hint of mint and a long velvety finish.

name: Heartland  Shiraz
desc_en_short: The dark colour preempts a wine of dense, layered black fruit.  The aromas of anise and cracked pepper are enveloped in classic blackberry.  The glass coating texture gives way to freshness on the finish resulting in a fine balance.  The structure imparted by oak and skin contact integrates well with the bright, but intense fruit.

name: Montgras  Intriga
wine_color: Deep ruby red with purple notes in colour.
desc_en_short: A powerful, concentrated, daring wine, and with an enigmatic character: this is Intriga. Aged for more than 20 months in French barrels, the final blend is enhanced with a touch of Cabernet Franc and Petit Verdot.

name: Chateau De Fieuzal  2020
wine_color: Bright cherry red colour with purple highlights.
grape_variety: Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, Cabernet Franc, Petit Verdot
desc_en_short:
Chateau de Fieuzal is named in honour of the family that owned it at the start of the nineteenth century. After that, the Bordeaux wine property was owned by the Griffon family. The Griffon’s, who were lucky to have connections to Pope Léon XIII in Bordeaux, were able to fill the Vatican’s cellars with their wines from Pessac Leognan. de Fieuzal was purchased by the Ricard family. The Ricard’s owned multiple Bordeaux wine estates including Domaine de Chevalier and Malartic-Lagravière. Today, Chateau de Fieuzal is owned by Lochlann Quinn, the chairman of Allied Irish Banks. 

The Bordeaux wine vineyards are planted on sand and gravel soils. The 39 hectare vineyard is planted to red and white grape varietals. For the reds, 60% Cabernet Sauvignon, 33% Merlot, 4.5% Cabernet Franc and 2.5% Petit Verdot.

name: Chateau Smith Haut Lafitte  Pessac-Leognan
grape_variety: Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, Cabernet Franc, Petit Verdot

name: Chateau Lynch Bages  AOC Pauillac 2018
wine_color: Medium to deep garnet-purple in color.

name: Chateau Quinault L' Enclos  2018
wine_color: This wine is a beautiful crimson red color.
desc_en_short:
Winemaker Notes

Thanks to the restructuring of the vineyards and the major renovation of the vat room and cellar at Quinault, as well as the meticulous efforts of the Cheval Blanc team, Quinault L'Enclos has affirmed its position as an emerging estate. The 2018 vintage nose displays black fruit aromas of blackberry and cherry, going on to reveal spicy notes such as black pepper and gingerbread, combined with rose and peony overtones. The wine starts out rich and straightforward on the palate, becoming full-bodied and broad-based. It is incredibly smooth and well-balanced thanks to beautiful acidity. The aftertaste is wonderfully long, culminating in a crunchy finish.

name: Dal Forno Romano  Amarone della Valpolicella 2017
wine_color: Inky ruby-black, dense and opaque with serious depth
brand: Dal Forno Romano  Amarone della Valpolicella
desc_en_short:
Dal Forno Amarone is the perfect fusion of power and precision. With a richness comparable to vintage Port, yet a striking balance of acidity and elegance, this is a wine that commands attention without losing grace.

Its structure is firm, its tannins are refined, and its complexity unfolds slowly and steadily. The finish is extraordinarily long—more like an epic than an afterthought. It’s a wine for connoisseurs who seek intensity, but also poetic nuance in every glass.

name: Castello di Fonterutoli  Fonterutoli Chianti Classico DOCG
desc_en_short: A well proportioned, elegant body, dark berry, fresh spice flavors, intense, smooth taste. Great ability to pair: dark sauce pastas, BBQ, boiled meats with spicy sauces, aged cold cuts.

name: Tasca d'Almerita  Regaleali Nero d'Avola
desc_en_short: Bright ruby-red color, this wine offers layered notes of cherry, mulberry and raspberry. On the palate, it is complex and supple, with ripe berry flavors framed by silky tannins. A delicious Sicilian red at a great value!

name: Tasca d'Almerita  Cygnus
desc_en_short: Intense ruby-red in color, Cygnus brilliantly captures the dark fruit and graphite aromas of Cabernet and the mulberry, mocha and cherry notes of Nero d'Avola. Additionally, aging in barrique imparts aromas of vanilla, tobacco, black pepper, which increases the complexity of this wine. On the palate, it is rich, generous and complete.

name: Tenuta dell'Ornellaia  Le Volte dell’Ornellaia
desc_en_short: Le Volte Dell'Ornellaia is a saturated red/ruby color and is a blend of 55% Cabernet Sauvignon, 40% Merlot, and 5% Petit Verdot, raised in used barrels for around 10 months. Always a wine leaning into the fruity and approachable side of things, the nose is fruity and fresh with aromas of candied flowers, crushed raspberries, red apples, and fresh stony earth. Medium to full-bodied, it’s very elegant with a joyful ease.

name: Main Divide by Pegasus Bay  Cabernet Sauvignon Merlot
desc_en_short: The bouquet and flavour suggest blackberries, purple plums, cassis, cigar box and vanilla pod. There is an initial impression of softness but the wine then expands in the mouth to become muscular with a generous spine of ripe tannins that support and draw out the lingering aftertaste.

name: Felton Road  Pinot Noir Bannockburn
desc_en_short: A real intensity to the perfume of rose and violets, and a potpourri of spice. The palate dances and while it certainly has power and weight, it is light on its feet and feels effortless. Vibrant raspberry, hints of crushed herbs, silky, but with a continuous seam of polished sinew supplying the muscle that keeps it aloft. The frame reveals itself in the finish and hints that the wine will cellar for the long haul and reward such patience fully.
