wine_color: Medium to deep garnet-purple in color.

name: Le Merle De Peby Faugeres  Saint Emilion Grand Cru
Chateau Bourgneuf  Pomerol
desc_en_short: Deep intense red black, semi-opaque to the rim with a nose of black skinned fruits, really intense, mineral with a hint of black cherry and raw cacao, with a distant floral too which grows in the glass. Strikingly similar on the palate with intense spiced black fruits, with note of black plums, light cedar, grilled, with substantial firm tannins and a note of grilled coffee behind before going to a long, dark fruited finish. Really impressive.

name: Chateau Palmer  Margaux 2015
wine_color: Deep purple color with black reflections
desc_en_short: Both extravagant and perfectly structured, Château Palmer 2015 is the archetype of the suave character that the estate’s wines display with such talent. Open and expressive, this wine has excellent ageing potential but can also be enjoyed now.

name: Mr.Riggs  'The Truant' Shiraz
desc_en_short:
The Truant Shiraz is a tribute to John William Riggs, Ben Riggs’ great-great-great-grandfather, and his colourful past. The Truant has as much character as the man himself.

It is a full flavoured McLaren Vale Shiraz, with notes of plum and blackberries, complimented by hints of vanilla and cinnamon spice.

Drink with either good food and great company or as a well deserved glass after a long day of work.

name: Mr.Riggs  'Burnt Block' Shiraz
desc_en_short: Evolving from the Scarce Earth project, our Burnt Block Shiraz is an expression of a single vineyard McLaren Vale Shiraz. The 2020 Burnt Block Shiraz is sourced from Ben Riggs Piebald Gully vineyard, located in McLaren Vale’s coolest sub-region, Clarendon. Onyx, and svelte, evocative, long, and intense, this keynote wine anchors an entire winemaking philosophy. Plums, molasses, violets and vibrant fruits funnel upward, lofty, swifting, and sensual.

name: Chateau Maris  Merlot Syrah (Organic)
desc_en_short: Pays d’Oc is an ocean of vineyards bathed in sunshine in the south of France, between the heath and a beautiful blue where the atmosphere is unique. It is in this wild setting that MARIS wines are made from organic grapes grown in an environment promoting biodiversity and sustainability.

name: Lucien Crochet  Sancerre La Croix Du Roy
desc_en_short: Smooth and round, confirming the fruity and floral flavors, velvety mouthfeel provided by deep and generous tannins, elegant hint of bitterness in the finish: all the delicacy of a Pinot Noir on limestone soil.

name: Gentile  2 Amanti Syrah Lazio Rosso IGP
Church Road  Grand Reserve Merlot Cabernet Sauvignon
Chateau Pape Clement  2018
desc_en_short:
Winemaker Notes :

With their smoky and spicy bouquet, the red wines are of an admirable quality and a very characteristic softness. The wine is both concentrated, fine and harmonious, with an aromatic palette as wide as it is precise. The depth and length in the mouth are exceptional. Quality of the terroir, sustained efforts and dynamism have borne fruit bringing Pape Clément to a level very close to that of the premiers crus.

name: Velenosi  Lacrima Di Morro DOC Superiore "Querciantica"
desc_en_short:
Intense ruby ​​red with purple hues.
Elegant aromas of cherry, violet, geranium, rose and cut grass.
In the mouth the structure is full-bodied, with a dry taste, with a balanced and well-harmonized tannic structure, full and persistent flavor and a full return to the aromatic perceptions that make it immediately pleasant and enjoyable.

name: Concha Y Toro  Casillero Del Diablo Devil's Carnaval Spectacular Cabernet
desc_en_short: A wine with sensational black fruit aromas that will captivate your senses. Its textures are equally spectacular, enveloping you in a mesmerizing experience. This wine is perfect for pairing with all types of meats and cheeses. It’s also great for celebrations and can be paired with tacos, barbecue ribs, or pizzas.

name: Maison 1982  'Atlantique' Bordeaux
desc_en_short: A classic style red wine made of the local grape varieties Merlot and Cabernet Sauvignon, with An easy to drink.

name: Luigi Bosca  De Sangre Malbec
desc_en_short: Luigi Bosca's De Sangre Malbec is a richly expressive Mendoza red bursting with ripe cherry, warming spice, and coffee-laced oak — full-bodied and vigorously structured with firm tannins and a long, compact finish that showcases everything Malbec does best.

name: Luigi Bosca  Los Nobles Malbec
wine_color: A deep violet red wine with ruby hues.
desc_en_short: Luigi Bosca Los Nobles Malbec is a richly expressive Mendoza red blending 94% Malbec with a touch of Petit Verdot, delivering layered red and black fruit, sweet spice, and delicate florals with velvety tannins and a long, complex finish.

name: Chateau Tour Bellevue Haut-Medoc
desc_en_short: Château Tour Bellevue is a structured Haut-Médoc red blending Merlot and Cabernet Sauvignon from the gravelly Left Bank, delivering dark fruit concentration, polished tannins, and layered complexity of spice, oak, and earthy minerality.

name: Chateau du Bergey  Fronsac
desc_en_short:
Aromas of black fruits, spices, tobacco, and smoke, with an earthy
base of dried herbs and graphite. Structure and balance backed up by fine tannins and acidity.

name: Chateau La Douce  Medoc
desc_en_short:
The 100% Merlot blend here makes for a juicy wine with
nose of chocolate and cherry and spices. The soft fruit combined with the oak ageing makes
this wines fruity, rich, silky and well structured.

name: Chateau Marjosse  Grand Vin de Bordeaux Entre deux-Mers
desc_en_short: A powerful and elegant nose of red and dark berries, featuring blackberry and blackcurrant. It’s big and round in the mouth, with silky tannins revealing its richness

name: Chateau Lafaurie Puisseguin-Saint-Emilion
desc_en_short: Fruity and fresh with bright blackberry, violet, raspberry, cherry kirsh, floral hints, and a touch of pepper. Juicy and balanced with flavors of cherry, red berries, cassis, violet, fresh blond tobacco, and a hint of toasted almond. Finishes with a subtle oaky sweetness.

name: Chateau Ducru Beaucaillou  Madame de Beaucaillou Haut -Medoc
flavor_tags: Graphite, Mineral, Tobacco, Cassis, Cedar, Game, Oak
food_matching: Red Meat, Grilled Steak, Lamb, Hard Cheese, BBQ
desc_en_short: Madame de Beaucaillou is the second wine of the legendary Château Ducru-Beaucaillou — a Saint-Julien Second Growth — offering elegant, refined Haut-Médoc character with cassis, cedar, graphite, and the polished structure that defines this prestigious estate.

name: Chateau Premeaux  Cote de Nuits Villages
desc_en_short: Wild and powerful nose combining aromas of blackcurrant and blackberry, spices and earthy aromas. Pleasantly medium (+) bodied and long finish.

name: Baron Philippe de Rothschild  Baron Carl AOC Saint-Emilion
wine_color: brilliant shimmering purple color. At the edges, there is also a color transition to garnet red.
desc_en_short: In the glass, the Baron Carl Saint-Émilion from the house of Baron Philippe de Rothschild reveals a brilliant shimmering purple color. At the edges, there is also a color transition to garnet red. If you give it some air by swirling, this red wine is characterized by a fascinating brilliance that makes it dance lively in the glass. This French cuvée reveals wonderfully expressive notes of blueberries, black currants, mulberries and blackberries in the glass. These are joined by hints of dark chocolate, cinnamon and gingerbread spice.

name: Rocca di Frassinello  Poggio alla Guardia
Bodega Aleanna El Enemigo  Cabernet Franc
Martin Ray  Pinot Noir Sonoma Coast
Martin Ray  Synthesis Cabernet Sauvignon Napa Valley
Two Hands  Angels' Share Shiraz McLaren
Two Hands  Sexy Beast Cabernet Sauvignon McLaren
Two Hands  Yacca Block Shiraz Eden Valley
Two Hands  Holy Grail Shiraz Barossa
desc_en_short: Two Hands Holy Grail Shiraz is an estate single-vineyard wine from the prized Seppeltsfield sub-region of the Barossa Valley — a meticulously planted site delivering concentrated, terroir-driven Shiraz that stands among Two Hands' most coveted single-vineyard expressions.

name: Two Hands  Waterfall Block Shiraz Adelaide
Two Hands  Coach House Block Shiraz Barossa
Two Hands  Secret Block Shiraz Barossa
Two Hands  Ares Shiraz Barossa Valley
Poggio Al Lupo  Morellino Di Scansano
desc_en_short:
Morellino di Scansano is a DOCG wine whose production is
permitted in the territory of Scansano and part of the province of
Grosseto. A fresh, fruity and immediate Sangiovese; it identies a
type and a territory in a juicy, owing and satisfying sip, with soft and
delicate tannins that caress the palate accompanied by a trail of
savoriness. A sangiovese that tells of the identity bond between the
Moretti Cuseri family and the Maremma.

name: Pietradolce  Etna Rosso
desc_en_short: Pietradolce Etna Rosso is a wine obtained only from Nerello Mascalese grapes, grown between 700 and 800 meters above sea level on the northern slopes of Mount Etna, in Solicchiata. The soils are sandy-loam, with abundant volcanic rock. The manual harvest takes place during the first half of October. The vinification involves, after crushing and destemming, a maceration of approximately 18 days, followed by three months in oak barrels. Fragrant fruity and floral notes anticipate a full and elegant mouth.

name: Chateau Clerc Milon  2020
wine_color: The wine is a deep cherry red with garnet highlights.

name: Lacroix Martillac  Pessac Leognan AOC
wine_color: A rich garnet red with purple reflections.

name: Grand Napa Vineyards  Los Carneros Pinot Noir
wine_color: An intense and bright garnet red color.
desc_en_short: Los Carneros Pinot Noir offers an intense and bright garnet red color. The nose is welcoming and intense with black cherry and vanilla aromas. On the palate, the texture is soft and dense with black cherry and red plum in the forefront while the return of vanilla and toasted cardamon bring depth and intensity to a long finish.

name: Intipalka  Syrah
wine_color: Deep purple color with hints of ruby.
desc_en_short: Deep purple color with hints of ruby. Violets, and blueberries with some herbal and woody notes on the nose and palate backed by great acidity, tannins, and structure that show the characteristics of a well-made wine.

name: Intipalka  Tannat
desc_en_short: Wild blueberries, shortcake with clotted cream and oregano. A beautifully balanced wine with diverse flavors, supple tannins, and a long, satisfying finish.

name: Los Cerros De San Juan  Cuna De Piedra Estate Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: An intense ruby ​​red colour. Spicy aromas that taste of pepper, red fruits such as strawberries, blueberries and a touch of liquorice. What is perceived in the mouth is the same, with powerful but ripe tannins, complex and naturally fresh.

name: La Chasse Des Princes  Chateauneuf du pape
desc_en_short: This ruby red wine is very complex and elegant with aromas of red currant, red cherries, black berries with spicy overtones such as lavender, thyme and rosemary. Excellent balance in the mouth, tannins are elegant and silky. Rather than showing just concentration, the wine is showing finesse and elegance.

name: La Chasse Des Princes  Vacqueyras
wine_color: uby red color and limpid with purple reflections.

name: Francis Coppola  'Diamond Collection' Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Francis Coppola's Diamond Collection Cabernet Sauvignon blends fruit from multiple California appellations — including Sonoma, Paso Robles, and Monterey County — to deliver a fruit-forward, multi-dimensional red with supple tannins, dark berry richness, and a touch of spice that's ready to enjoy the moment it's opened.

name: Shumi  Saperavi Dry
desc_en_short: The wine has a rich deep pomegranate colour, with a ripe cherry, blackberry, cedar and tobacco aroma. It has a strongly developed, complex bouquet and a balanced, harmonious taste.

name: Casarena Reservado Malbec
wine_color: Intense deep red color with purplish hues.
desc_en_short: Grapes go through a double manual cluster and berry selection. After a careful destemming, the berries go through a cold whole-berry fermentation. To assure its maximum aromatic expression, a natural alcoholic fermentation is triggered first, at low temperatures. In oak barrels, the wine experiments a spontaneous malolactic fermentation and then it is naturally clarified.

name: Casarena DNA Malbec
wine_color: Deep red color with purplish hues.
desc_en_short: Once the grapes were harvested, a thorough double grape and berry selection process was carried out. After a careful destemming, the pre fermentation cold maceration was done during 7 to 10 days (-5 °C/23 °F) and a complete maceration between 45 and 80 days. The fermentation is done with indigenous yeasts and the malolactic fermentation is spontaneous once the wine is in oak barrels.

name: Casarena Icono Blend
wine_color: Deep red in color with violet hues.
desc_en_short: Deep red in color with violet hues. On the nose, Malbec offers notes of red and black fruit. Likewise, notes of peppers and spices provided by the Cabernet Sauvignon and Cabernet Franc stand out, combined with subtle touches of coffee provided by the aging in oak barrels and a lively profile by the Syrah. On the palate it appears as a complex wine, with great structure and freshness. Its elegance and liveliness stand out. It is an extremely captivating wine.

name: Di Majo Norante Contado Aglianico Riserva DOC
wine_color: A ruby red color with garnet reflections.
desc_en_short: Contado is obtained from pure Aglianico grapes that are grown on the hills of Molise in the Camarda vineyard. The vinification is then carried out through slow fermentation with maceration in small steel fermenters. The wine is then aged for about three years, one of which in barriques and tonneaux.

name: Idi Di Marzo  Vulgaris Montepulciano D'Abruzzo DOC
wine_color: Ruby ​​red color, enriched by purple hues.
desc_en_short: Idi di Marzo's Vulgaris Montepulciano d'Abruzzo is a characterful, full-bodied red from Italy's sun-drenched Abruzzo hills, delivering deep ruby colour, generous berry and currant aromas, and a well-structured palate with balanced tannins and a satisfying, lingering finish.

name: Idi Di Marzo Amarne Montepulciano D'Abruzzo DOC - Organic
desc_en_short: Amarne di Idi di Marzo, a wine born from the De Cerchio family's passion for viticulture, dating back to 1910, is a product of a rigorous selection of the best Montepulciano grapes from the Idi Di Marzo estate. This wine stands out for its intense ruby ​​red color, enriched by garnet reflections. Its aroma is rich, evoking berries and blackberry jam, with hints of tobacco, coffee and cocoa powder that emerge on the finish. On the palate, Amarne reveals itself as a complex, soft and round wine, well balanced and pleasantly persistent. The finish is characterized by notes of chocolate and black pepper. Amarne di Idi di Marzo pairs beautifully with structured first courses and meat-based second courses. It is particularly recommended with pork tenderloin. A real pleasure for the palate!

name: Pajaru Primitivo Solu IGT - Organic
desc_en_short: The color is bright ruby red. The aromas present notes of red fruit jam, especially plum with hints of cocoa that we then find in the mouth along with pleasant spicy notes Ideal with cured meats, cheeses, meat dishes.

name: Pajaru Nero Di Troia Auru IGT - Organic
desc_en_short: From the sun-scorched heel of Italy's boot, Pajaru's Nero di Troia Auru is a compelling organic expression of Puglia's most characterful indigenous red grape — rich with ripe plum, dark chocolate, and cocoa in a full-bodied, organically farmed package built for the table.

name: Pajaru Negroamaro Paritaru IGT - Organic
wine_color: An intense red wine with violet reflections.
desc_en_short: It has a powerful and persistent nose, revealing notes of blackcurrant, blackberry, and cloves, which are also present on the palate along with hints of dark chocolate and a spicy finish. It is full bodied, intense and with soft and pleasant tannins.

name: Pajaru Primitivo Picuraru IGT - Organic
desc_en_short: A deep ruby red color, exuding intensity. Its captivating aromas of ripe red fruits transform into flavors of dark chocolate, leather, and pepper on the palate. It is a warm, persistent, and moderately tannic wine that gains even greater expression when aged for a couple of years.

name: Ballade De La Pointe Pomerol Second wine of Chateau La Pointe
flavor_tags: Black Cherry, Dried Herbs, Dark Fruit, Mushroom, Mineral, Cherry, Earthy, Gravel, Plum, Oak
desc_en_short: Ballade de La Pointe is the second wine of Château La Pointe, one of Pomerol's largest estates — an elegant, approachable Right Bank Bordeaux showing the appellation's trademark Merlot richness with dark fruit, subtle earthiness, and silky tannins.

name: Pomerol By Clinet
flavor_tags: Blackberry, Truffle, Earthy, Cocoa, Plum, Oak
desc_en_short: Pomerol by Clinet is the second wine of the prestigious Château Clinet estate — a plush, approachable Right Bank Bordeaux with concentrated dark plum, blackberry, truffle, and velvety Merlot richness that showcases Pomerol at its most accessible.

name: Chateau Cos Labory  Saint Estephe 5Ème Cru Classé
desc_en_short: Black fruit and dark-chocolate aromas are followed by fragrant black-currant flavors with a balanced core of tannins. Now owned by neighboring Cos d'Estournel, this estate is beginning to show signs of a new life. Drink from 2027. — Roger Voss

name: Chateau Talbot  Saint Julien 4Ème Cru Classé
desc_en_short: Offers a solid core of crushed plum and black currant fruit, underscored by savory and tobacco accents and a light sanguine edge. Possesses just enough flesh to stave off the vintage's grainy side as a late iron note echoes. Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot and Petit Verdot. Best from 2025 through 2035.

name: Fantini Montepulciano D'Abruzzo
wine_color: Ruby red color with garnet highlights.
desc_en_short: Ruby red color with garnet highlights. Intense, persistent and fruity, with a strong aroma of wild berries. A full-bodied wine, well balanced, slightly tannic with a clean aftertaste.

name: Fantini Don Camillo Sangiovese & Cabernet Sauvignon (Gold Collection)
desc_en_short: Intense ruby red color ; fruity, with notes of jam and cherry preserved in alcohol ; spicy notes of licorice, aromas of vanilla and faded flowers. A full-bodied wine, good tannins, with a pleasant sour aftertaste ; ready to drink.

name: Fantini Three Dreamers Rosso Vino Ottenuto Da Uve Appassite
wine_color: Deep ruby red with shades of black plum.
desc_en_short:
Deep ruby
red with shades of black plum. The
aromas are deep and complex: ripe
fruit, raisins, blackberries, sour
cherries, cinnamon with touches
of vanilla and dark chocolate. The
palate has a powerful rush of cocoa
powder, with notes of jammy
blackcurrant and hints of mocha
espresso and caramel toffee. The
seamlessly integrated palate of
powdery tannins frame the perfect
acidity, giving a long texture on the
finish.

name: Chateau Bellevue St.Emillion Grand Cru Classe 2017
brand: Chateau Bellevue St.Emillion Grand Cru Classe

name: Chateau Mouton Rothschild  2019 (Premiers Crus)
flavor_tags: Dark Chocolate, Blackcurrant, Dark Fruit, Chocolate, Cigar Box, Graphite, Mineral, Cassis, Oak
food_matching: Red Meat, Grilled Steak, Lamb, Hard Cheese, BBQ
desc_en_short: Château Mouton Rothschild 2019 is a landmark vintage from Pauillac's most celebrated First Growth — an opulent, majestic Cabernet Sauvignon-dominated blend with extraordinary concentration, precision, and the architectural grandeur that defines great Bordeaux.

name: Cantine Petrosino Petros Syrah
wine_color: This Syrah shines a deep ruby with violet glimmers.
desc_en_short: Vibrant Sicilian Syrah with bold cherry and raspberry notes, silky tannins, and elegant spice. Perfect with rich Italian dishes and red meats.

name: Chateau La Croix Meunier Saint -Emilion Grand Cru
wine_color: Deep garnet red with violet reflections.
desc_en_short: Elegant Saint-Émilion Grand Cru blending Merlot and Cabernet Franc, with deep dark fruits, soft spices, and silky tannins — perfect for red meats and fine dining.

name: Chateau Cazauviel Margaux
wine_color: Deep ruby red with glimmers of garnet.
desc_en_short: Classic Margaux elegance, blending Cabernet Sauvignon and Merlot — rich dark fruits, soft tannins, and hints of oak and spice, perfect for fine dining.

name: Domaine Boyer de Bar Pinot Noir - Les Rives de l'Estang
wine_color: Showing a deep ruby red hue
style: Pinot Noir (พิโนต์ นัวร์)
desc_en_short: Elegant Pinot Noir from Languedoc with delicate red fruits, silky tannins, and a refreshing finish — perfect for light meats and cheeses.

name: Domaine Boyer de Bar Cabernet Sauvignon - Combe Croze
desc_en_short: Elegant Cabernet Sauvignon with rich dark berries, silky tannins, and spice notes — perfect for grilled meats and game dishes.

name: Chateau de la Graveirette Bon ju Red
desc_en_short: Lively French red blend with juicy red and black fruits, soft spices, and gentle tannins — a perfect everyday wine for meats, stews, and cheeses.

name: Chateau Haut-Brion  1er Grand Cru Classe 2019
wine_color: The color is a beautiful purplish red.

name: Chateau Haut-Brion  Le Clarence de Haut-Brion 2015
brand: Chateau Haut-Brion  Le Clarence de Haut-Brion

name: Echo de Lynch Bages AOC Pauillac 2018
brand: Echo de Lynch Bages AOC Pauillac

name: Chateau Faugeres  Saint Emilion Grand Cru 2020
wine_color: Deep garnet-purple with dense, youthful concentration
brand: Chateau Faugeres  Saint Emilion Grand Cru
desc_en_short:
Château Faugères is located on the prized limestone-rich slopes of the Saint-Émilion appellation. The estate spans over 37 hectares and is owned by Silvio Denz, a renowned entrepreneur and wine lover, with consulting by the legendary Michel Rolland.

The 2020 vintage benefited from an ideal growing season, yielding a wine of remarkable ripeness, balance, and depth. Modern winemaking facilities and gravity-fed systems allow for delicate handling and precise vinification—resulting in a structured yet expressive Grand Cru.

name: Riporta  Nero D'Avola Sicilia
wine_color: A deep and brilliant red wine with purple highlights.
desc_en_short: A deep and brilliant red wine with purple highlights. Aromas of spices, licorice and cloves and prune, cherry, blackberry and blackcurrant. It is rich, full of black cherries, plums and redcurrants, all accompanied by elegant spice and some delicate oak flavours.

name: Riporta  Primitivo Di Manduria
desc_en_short: Ruby red colour with violet dark hints. Intense, complex, fruity aroma, with notes of small red fruits, cherries and blackberries. Velvety and soft texture, warm and quite tannic. with long persistence. Excellent with savory pasta dishes, lamb, game with rich sauces, seasoned cheeses.

name: Cueva del Viento  Misma Luna
desc_en_short: Deep garnet red. Intense and persistent, with notes of cherry and blackcurrant, herbs, cinnamon, cloves, cocoa, licorice and hints of mineral. Great structure, velvety tannins, very persistent with a long finish; ready to drink or well suitable for ageing.

name: Cueva del Viento  Monastrell
desc_en_short: An intensely bright red wine, with aromas of red fruits characteristic of the grape, with smoked notes and slightly toasted and balanced tons, in the mouth it presents body, acidity and tannins balanced with freshness and a persistent finish.

name: Borga  Cabernet Sauvignon
wine_color: ruby red transparent colour with deep purple reflections.
desc_en_short: This excellent full-bodied wine is a ruby red transparent colour with deep purple reflections. On the nose there are notes of dark red fruits, blackcurrants and plums, along with light herbaceous and peppery notes. On the palate, this wine is fresh with some tannings.

name: Tornatore  Etna Rosso
wine_color: Light ruby red with faint purplish
desc_en_short: Light ruby red with faint purplish reflections they, typical of the variety that is not very rich in color. Hints of small red fruits, morello cherry, black cherry are evident on the nose. The palate is distinguished by its typical balanced tannicity and surprising fullness, savoriness and length.

name: E. Guigal  Cote-Rotie La Landonne
wine_color: Red black with deep dark tints.
desc_en_short: The Côte-Rôtie "La Landonne" completes the famous trilogy. A massive and pure wine, with great intensity of flavors and color, it is the ultimate wine for aging.

name: District Series Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: This concentrated, medium-bodied wine has aromas and flavors of blackberries, licorice and black currents. Enjoy this Napa Valley Cab with steak, lamb chop or pasta with red sauce.

name: Corryton Burge  South Australian Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: A fruit-driven South Australian Cabernet Sauvignon from Corryton Burge, offering deep aromas of black cherry, liquorice, and leather with a palate of ripe cherry, dark chocolate, and gentle spice, all wrapped in characteristically soft, velvety tannins.

name: Corryton Burge  Barossa Shiraz
desc_en_short: Displaying characteristics seen in many Shiraz dominant wines from the region from the exceptional. The palate is rich and bold with its fruit and chocolate flavours however the tannin levels are subdued, leaving the palate with a sense of roundness ready for consumption. The flavours of milk chocolate and sweet spice linger long on the palate.

name: Corryton Burge  South Australian Shiraz
desc_en_short: Deep ruby red with purple hues, strawberry, raspberry and vanilla aromas . Rich fruit-forward characters of raspberry and plums tantalise the palate. There is a soft toasty oak influence that enhances the vanilla and spice. Subtle tannins leave the palate quite moreish and a delight to keep coming back to.

name: Voyager Estate  Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short:
A bright, juicy, and youthful Cabernet that celebrates our coastal patch of land,
and the certified organic vines that call it home.

name: Piccini  Sasso al Poggio Rosso Toscana IGT
desc_en_short: The wine exhibits fragrances of black cherry, licorice, forest floor, and minerals, with a tasteful layer of vanillin oak. On the palate, it is rich, fullbodied, and velvety, with a succulent fruit core, impeccably integrated tannins, and a profoundly enduring finish.

name: VIK  Millahue
grape_variety: Cabernet Sauvignon, Carmenère, Cabernet Franc, Merlot, Syrah
desc_en_short:
VIK Millahue – The Ultimate Wine from the “Golden Valley” Awarded a Perfect 100 Points by James Suckling

VIK Millahue is the flagship wine of the VIK brand, born from the vision of Alexander Vik, a Norwegian investor who dreamed of "creating the best wine in the world." He and his team of experts selected over 4,300 hectares of land in the Millahue Valley, which translates to "Place of Gold," to establish a vineyard that integrates unique terroir, science, and winemaking artistry.

VIK Millahue is the pinnacle of that philosophy — a wine that not only brilliantly showcases the potential of the Millahue region but also embodies "a wine that reflects time, patience, and perfect refinement."

name: Viu Manent  Estate Collection Reserva Carmenere
wine_color: Deep red in color with violet glints.
desc_en_short: Deep red in color with violet glints. On the nose the aromas are of black fruit, including black currant and blackberry, accompanied by a subtle note of pink peppercorn. On the palate the wine has a medium body, rounded tannins, and moderate acidity that lend the wine a nice balance on the center, adding a long finish with a hint of cassis

name: T' Spot  Bordeaux Red
desc_en_short: T' Spot Bordeaux Rouge is an approachable, fruit-forward Bordeaux blend led by Merlot, delivering ripe cherry, raspberry, and plum with a touch of vanilla — classic Left Bank charm with smooth, well-integrated tannins and an easy-drinking finish.

name: Montgras  Day One Merlot
wine_color: A deep, bright ruby ​​red with violet hues
desc_en_short: A deep, bright ruby ​​red with violet hues, its aromas of blackcurrants and plums stand out, along with subtle hints of cocoa and vanilla. It has a rich texture, along with juicy tannins, and a long, pleasant finish.

name: Tenuta dell'Ornellaia  Ornellaia Bolgheri DOC "La Generosità" (Artist Label) 2021
wine_color: he intense and dark colour heralds a wine of beautiful

name: Laura Hartwig Single Vineyard Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: A single-vineyard Cabernet Sauvignon from Chile's Cachapoal Valley, Laura Hartwig delivers deep cassis and red fruit aromas layered with tobacco, dark chocolate, and elegant spice — all framed by a silky, full-bodied structure that speaks to the precision of this boutique estate.

An intense ruby color. Easy

a balanced mouth and silky
finish.

name: Miguel Domecq Entrechuelos
wine_color: This wine is opaque with a vivid, intense ruby red color.
style: Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, Tintilla De Rota
desc_en_short:
This wine is opaque with a vivid,
intense ruby red color. It offers
intense aromas of ripe red berries,
cinnamon, cocoa, and a hint of
vanilla. On the palate, sweet
tannins and a generous, fullbodied mouthfeel stand out, with
balsamic notes and bitter chocolate
emerging with oxygenation. Long
bottle aging has made this wine
extraordinarily complex.

name: Roodeberg Black
wine_color: An intense layer of dark ripe fruit entwined in deep toasted oak.
style: Petit Verdot, Pinotage, Petite Sirah, Malbec, Shiraz Tannat, Cabernet Sauvignon Tempranillo, Grenache Noir
desc_en_short:
Roodeberg Black is our Classic
Red Blend wrapped in an intense
layer of dark ripe fruit entwined
in deep toasted oak. On the nose,
pristine red and black fruits with
vanilla and mocha lingering in
the background. The palate is
markedly fresh yet intense with
quality dark fruits balancing the
mocha, vanilla and spice. The
finish is smoky, rich and intense;
long and persistent like a burning
ember, reminiscent of the fire that
gave life to this blend.

name: Cantine Di Ora Amarone Della Valpolicella D.O.C.G.
wine_color: Intense ruby red with garnet hints.
desc_en_short:
Intense ruby red with garnet hints.
Complex fruity bouquet with notes
of cherry, black cherry, mixed
berries, vanilla, raisins and tropical
fruits. In the mouth, it is full-bodied,
rich, soft, and velvety.

name: Terre Di Rai 931 Vino Rosso
desc_en_short: A characterful Veneto red blending Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, and the native Raboso grape, Terre Di Rai 931 delivers vivid aromas of cherry and sour cherry with balsamic undertones, and a soft, well-balanced palate of blackberry and plum framed by gentle tannins.

name: Sir Maiale Rosso Barbera Rubicone
desc_en_short:
This wine offers rich flavors of
blackberries, plums, and black
currant, with good tannins and
freshness typical of its grape
variety. Balanced alcohol content
and a smooth texture from
excellent barrel aging enhance its
complexity.

name: Astrale Vino Ross0 D’Italia
desc_en_short:
The nose unravels fruity aromas
of forest fruit avnd dried plums
together with black pepper and
coffee. Round, warm and full
body supported by velvety tannins,
bringing together different layers
of flavours.

name: Valiano 6.38 Gran Selezione Chianti Classico D.O.C.G.
wine_color: Bright ruby colour with purple hues.

Bright ruby colour with purple hues.
Spicy notes such as ginger, orange

fresh, and juicy palate dominated by
dark cherries. Generous finish with
black pepper, liquorice, and black fruit
flavours

name: Nativ Blue Onice Irpinia Aglianico D.O.C.
desc_en_short:
Brilliant red color with spicy taste
typical of “Maiatica” cherry of
Taurasi.

Full, soft, and harmonious, with a

Red wine color with intense redviolet reflections. Intense and

strong notes of plum jam are
mixed with the balanced presence
of blackcurrants.

name: Tagaro Piè Del Monaco Primitivo Valle D’Itria Igp
desc_en_short: The premium red wine is ruby red with garnet-purple reflections. Full and characterful red fruits mixed with spicy notes. The wine has a somewhat jammy character. A full-bodied, very serious wine.

name: Chateau de G  Gran Reserva carmenere
desc_en_short: The taste is rich but smooth, easy to drink, not too astringent or dry, suitable for those who are just starting to drink red wine. It has flavors and aromas of blueberries, prunes, cherries, and pepper mixed with smoke and pine scents.

name: Ricossa  Barbera Appassimento Piemonte DOC
wine_color: Deep red color with violet hues that turn to garnet in the aging process.
desc_en_short: We have a special, biting red wine from 2020 for you, which is a source of enthusiasm among many wine connoisseurs. The winemaker from the Italian winery Ricossa is absolutely proficient in his craft. Style and finesse are the characteristics of this red wine, which originates in the sunny and picturesque Piedmont countryside. Flaschenpöstler culinary tip: This Barbera is ideal to serve with stews or Piedmontese dishes.

name: Chateau Lilian Ladouys  Saint-Estephe 2021
style: Cabernet Sauvignon, 40% Merlot, 6% Petit Verdot And 1% Cabernet Franc.
desc_en_short: With a proportion of Merlot identical to the 2009 and 2010 vintages, Château Lilian Ladouys 2021 is characterized by elegant notes of fresh fruit, a rich, charming and captivating nose revealing spice-filled aromas of incense and bitter cocoa. The ample and velvety mouth presents a well-bound, fine and structured frame, supported by Cabernet Sauvignon.

name: Chateau Gloria  Saint Julien 2017
style: Cabernet Sauvignon, 26% Merlot, 8% Petit Verdot, 5% Cabernet Franc
desc_en_short: Dark and winey in profile, with steeped plum, blackberry and black currant fruit that is youthfully coiled up, laced with bramble, apple wood and anise notes. Offers a compact finish but the energy is there. Let this unwind in the cellar. Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, Petit Verdot and Cabernet Franc.

name: VIK  La Piu Belle
desc_en_short:
La Piu Belle is the goddess of nature, love, fertility, beauty and art. She is the goddess of VIK, our place of gold in the Millahue Valley. She is the mystical world’s personification of our incredible terroir. She embodies the sun enlightening the mist covering the Millahue Valley at dawn. She incarnates the freshness of the Pacific coastal and Andean mountain breezes cooling our grapes during the luminescent summer. She is the gentle rains giving life to our vines, enhancing and liberating the fragrance of the green and luxurious native flora and fauna surrounding our vineyard. She is the complexity of our soils, the roundness of our hills and beauty of our valleys.

La Piu Belle is intensely emotional and very beautiful; the most beautiful. She has been given to VIK to give us our beautiful wines. She gave birth to our vineyards and cries tears of red gold out of joy for what she has created. These tears of red gold, our wines, are her gifts to the world.

name: VIK  Stonevik
desc_en_short: An extraordinary natural wine from VIK's Millahue Valley estate, Stonevik blends Cabernet Franc, Cabernet Sauvignon, and Carménère fermented by the lunar cycle in oak barrels, then aged in hand-crafted clay amphorae aligned in an astronomical mandala atop a 1,000-metre peak.

name: J. Lohr  Seven Oaks Cabernet Sauvignon
wine_color: Dense and dark at the core.
style: Cabernet Sauvignon, 12% Petite Sirah, 4% Petit Verdot, 3% Merlot, 2% Malbec
desc_en_short: Velvety richness and supple tannins. Dense and soft, this wine boasts ripe flavors of black currant and cherry, enhanced by a bouquet of vanilla and spice from one year of barrel aging, and is an excellent companion to grilled beef, lasagna, or dark chocolate.

name: Georges Duboeuf Beaujolais Villages Nouveau 2025
desc_en_short:
Beaujolais-Villages Nouveau is considered to be a fuller-bodied
alternative to Nouveau. It is a more complex wine for Beaujolais connoisseurs looking for
a singular expression of “primeur” Gamay. The grapes are sourced from the same 38
Villages of the Beaujolais-Villages AOC, where there is more granite and schist in the
terroir, compared to Beaujolais AOC. A difference in altitude and latitude influences the
style of the wine. Some of the grapes were picked manually, in whole clusters, while
others were machine-harvested. The average age of the vines are 50 years old, and they
were trained in the Goblet Trellis System.

name: Georges Duboeuf Beaujolais Nouveau 2025
wine_color: A brilliant garnet color with purple reflections.
desc_en_short:
The grapes are sourced from the southern part of the
Beaujolais region, which is a patchwork of terroir ranging from sand, clay and
limestone to granite and schist. Differences in altitude and latitude influence the
style of wine produced. Some of the grapes were picked by hand, in whole
clusters, while others were machine harvested. They come from vines over 20
years old that were trained in the Guyot Trellis System.

name: Chateau Brane Cantenac Margaux 2017
style: Cabernet Sauvignon, 21% Merlot, 4% Cabernet Franc, 1% Petit Verdot
desc_en_short: An elegant Second Growth Margaux (1855) from Château Brane-Cantenac — refined layers of cassis, violet, and cedar with silky tannins and a graceful, long finish. A hallmark of finesse from the 2017 vintage.

name: Famille Masse Givry1er Cru Vieilles Vignes
desc_en_short:
The name Givry carries a long and storied history—once the favorite wine of King Henry IV, and still today a symbol of the Côte Chalonnaise, representing both elegance and great value. The term Vieilles Vignes on the label refers to “old vines” aged between 40–60 years. Though they yield fewer grapes, the fruit is more concentrated and complex, giving the wine a depth that younger vineyards cannot achieve.

Winemaking : Pinot Noir from Premier Cru vineyards undergoes long maceration to extract maximum color and aromatics, followed by 12–14 months of aging in French oak, with around 30% new barrels. This careful balance preserves the freshness of the fruit while adding structure and refinement.

Character : Opens with ripe cherry and blackcurrant, layered with spice and wild floral notes. Fine-grained yet powerful tannins are lifted by vibrant acidity, giving the wine both immediate charm and the structure to age gracefully, revealing even greater depth over time.

“Dense and refined, with aging potential.” – James Suckling

name: Domaine Piguet Girardin Auxey Duresses 1er Cru Rouge
desc_en_short:
Though Auxey-Duresses may not be as widely recognized as its celebrated neighbors Meursault or Volnay, it is often hailed as one of Burgundy’s hidden gems—a village whose wines linger in memory once discovered. Nestled among hillside vineyards with limestone soils, Auxey-Duresses produces wines with a distinct charm: aromatic brightness paired with delicate structure, offering a taste of “true Burgundy” without relying on the fame of more illustrious appellations.

Winemaking: Pinot Noir from Premier Cru vineyards, hand-harvested with care, then vinified using traditional Burgundian methods to preserve fruit character and achieve balanced structure. Aged 10–12 months in French oak to add roundness and complexity, while keeping the fruit’s natural purity intact.

Character: Fragrant notes of raspberry and violet, layered with subtle hints of wet earth that speak of the terroir. Silky, fine-grained tannins provide structure and length, making this wine both approachable in its youth and elegant enough for short-term cellaring.

“Supple fruit and perfumed bouquet — an irresistible Premier Cru.” – Wine Enthusiast

name: Domaine Piguet Girardin Chassagne Montrachet 1er Cru Rouge
desc_en_short:
When people think of Chassagne-Montrachet, the mind often goes straight to its world-renowned Chardonnay. Yet this village also produces Pinot Noir of remarkable power and individuality. The reds here reflect the complex terroir of the Côte de Beaune—combining intensity with refinement. This wine demonstrates that Chassagne-Montrachet Rouge is not merely the “shadow of its whites,” but a wine that stands proudly with its own character and charm.

Winemaking: Pinot Noir from Premier Cru vines over 40 years old, hand-harvested with care. The grapes undergo cold maceration to preserve vibrant fruit aromatics before being fermented and aged in high-quality French oak. The process builds structure and depth without overwhelming the wine’s natural fruit expression.

Character: Aromas of black cherry and blackberry unfold alongside dried rose and roasted oak spice. The palate is concentrated and layered, with powerful yet polished tannins and impressive length. It is equally rewarding when enjoyed young for its vivid fruit or cellared further to develop greater complexity.

“Structured, brooding, and contemplative.” – La Revue du Vin de France

name: Bodega Volcanes de Chile Cabernet Sauvignon
wine_color: Deep ruby red with hints of purple at the rim.
desc_en_short: A bold yet refined Cabernet Sauvignon that expresses both depth and vitality — the essence of volcanic terroir

name: Borsao Seleccion Garnacha
desc_en_short: A juicy, expressive red bursting with ripe fruit and soft spice.

name: Catena D.V. Historico Red Blend
desc_en_short: A vibrant, polished red combining mountain freshness with old-world grace.

name: Les Licornes De Cantenac Brown Margaux 2016 (Second Label of Château Cantenac Brown)
desc_en_short:
From the storied Château Cantenac Brown, a Third Growth (Troisième Cru Classé) estate of the 1855 Bordeaux Classification, comes its refined second wine — Les Licornes de Cantenac Brown. The château, founded in the early 19th century by John-Lewis Brown, a Scottish-born artist and visionary, is one of the most architecturally striking in Margaux, with its Tudor-style façade symbolizing both heritage and creativity.

The name “Les Licornes” (The Unicorns) reflects the emblem of the Brown family and the estate’s enduring pursuit of rarity and grace. Crafted with the same care as the Grand Vin, but sourced from younger vines and select parcels, this wine captures the signature silkiness, perfume, and balance that define the Margaux appellation. The 2016 vintage, one of the greatest of the decade, offers remarkable harmony — power and purity wrapped in velvet.

name: Montes Alpha Cabernet Sauvignon Year Of The Snake
wine_color: Deep ruby (รูบี้เข้ม)
desc_en_short: A collector's edition of Chile's most iconic Cabernet Sauvignon, this Year of the Snake release from Montes Alpha brings the brooding power of Maipo Valley to a beautifully commemorative bottle — dark fruit, spice, and structure in perfect balance.

name: Concha Y Toro Frontera Merlot
wine_color: Bright ruby red with youthful purple reflections.
desc_en_short: Concha y Toro's Frontera Merlot is a soft, fruit-forward Chilean red from the Central Valley, offering ripe plum and berry flavours with smooth, low tannins — an approachable, easy-drinking bottle perfect for everyday occasions.

name: Barefoot Cabernet Sauvignon
wine_color: Deep ruby red with purple highlights.
desc_en_short: The Cabernet Sauvignon reflects this philosophy clearly: a smooth, easygoing expression of Cabernet that highlights ripe fruit and soft structure rather than power or austerity. It is crafted to be enjoyed without ceremony, whether paired with food or sipped on its own.

name: Edenvale Cabernet Sauvignon (Non-Alcoholic Wine)
desc_en_short: A smooth, full-flavored alcohol-removed Cabernet with genuine varietal character.

name: Edenvale Shiraz (Non-Alcoholic Wine)
desc_en_short: A rich, velvety Shiraz with generous fruit and gentle spice minus the alcohol.

name: Pierre Chavin  Le Petit Etoile Cabernet Sauvignon (Non-Alcoholic Wine)
desc_en_short: The non-alcoholic drinks of the Le Petit Etoilé brand are made from great organic French grape varieties such as Chardonnay in white and Cabernet Sauvignon for red. Le Petit Etoilé is also available in rosé and sparkling white for a complete aromatic palette.

name: San Marzano Crus Collezione Cinquanta 50 Vino Rosso D’Italia (Red Blend)
wine_color: Ruby red colour with purple reflections
desc_en_short:
Ruby red colour with purple reflections; an intense and complex bouquet with fruity notes of prune and red jam, and a spicy scent of vanilla and licorice.
Intense on the palate, full-bodied and soft with a long aftertaste

name: La Linda Private Selection Old Vines Malbec
desc_en_short: A soft, approachable, and fruit-forward Malbec from old vines, known for its rich texture and dark fruit profile.

name: Alto Los Romeros Reserva Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: A structured, concentrated, and savoury Cabernet Sauvignon, showcasing the depth of a Chilean Reserva.

name: Montecillo Crianza Rioja
wine_color: The wine displays a bright cherry red colour with indigo highlights.
desc_en_short: Bodegas Montecillo's Crianza from Rioja blends 88% Tempranillo with 12% Garnacha for a classic Spanish red — ripe cherry and plum fruit lifted by gentle spice and well-integrated oak, delivering elegance and approachability in every glass.

name: Il Bastardo Sangiovese di Toscana
desc_en_short: A spirited, everyday Tuscan red from the Masi family, Il Bastardo delivers classic Sangiovese character — ripe cherry, bright acidity, and a smooth finish — with an unpretentious, approachable style that's made for sharing around the table.

name: Renzo Masi Contrappasso Rosso di Toscana
desc_en_short: A bold, expressive Tuscan red where the freshness of Sangiovese meets the depth and plush texture of semi-dried Syrah — a modern blend rooted in tradition.

name: Finca Fella Altado Monastrell Tinto
desc_en_short: From bush-trained vines at over 1,000 metres in Alpera, southeastern Spain, Finca Fella's Altado Monastrell delivers the brooding intensity and rustic elegance that defines high-altitude Monastrell — bold, sun-ripened fruit balanced by cool-night freshness and a genuine sense of place.

name: Château Lafon-Rochet 2019
desc_en_short: Château Lafon-Rochet 2019 is a polished, confident Saint-Estèphe from a landmark vintage, where clay-rich soils and Basile Tesseron's meticulous stewardship produced a Cabernet Sauvignon-led blend of ripe, sun-soaked fruit, stony minerality, and impressive cellar potential.

name: Château Dauzac 2019
desc_en_short:
Château Dauzac, recognizable by its striking yellow label, has established itself as a laboratory of innovation in the Margaux appellation. Under the recent leadership of Laurent Fortin, the estate made headlines by becoming the first 1855 Classified Growth to produce a wine certified as purely vegan, using plant-based fining agents instead of traditional egg whites. The 2019 vintage is a shining example of this modern, ethical approach, capturing the generosity of the year without compromising on finesse.

The estate's vineyard is situated on a unique terroir of deep gravel over a layer of clay, which proved vital in 2019. The clay subsoil acted as a water reservoir during the hot, dry summer, allowing the Cabernet Sauvignon to ripen fully while maintaining freshness. The winemaking team also utilizes wooden vats and terracotta amphorae for aging, a technique that preserves the purity of the fruit and softens the texture.

Dauzac 2019 is a wine of conviction. It represents a bridge between the history of the 1855 classification and the future of sustainable viticulture. It is lush, fruit-forward, and polished, offering a drinking experience that is both hedonistic and aligned with contemporary values of transparency and respect for nature.

name: Comte Desclos Bordeaux
style: Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot And Cabernet Franc.
desc_en_short: Comte Desclos is a classic Bordeaux red blend of Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, and Cabernet Franc, offering aromas of red currant and cherry alongside a well-balanced palate of red berry, leather, and spice — an approachable, everyday expression of traditional Bordeaux character.

name: Baron Philippe de Rothschild Mouton Cadet Majorie Collas
wine_color: Deep, brilliant ruby red with purple highlights.
desc_en_short: A limited-edition Bordeaux Rouge featuring a stunning artistic collaboration with Marjorie Colas, offering rich fruit and elegant spice.

name: Torbreck The Pict 2006
wine_color: Deep, glass-staining ruby with garnet hues.
desc_en_short: A powerful, single-vineyard expression of Barossa Mataro that combines richness with wild, earthy complexity.

name: Torbreck Descendant 2008
wine_color: Deep, inky purple with a vibrant, glass-staining magenta rim.
desc_en_short: Torbreck Descendant is a pioneering Barossa Valley Shiraz co-fermented with Viognier — a first in the region when introduced — sourced from a single vineyard on Roennfeldt Road planted in 1994 with cuttings from some of Australia's oldest genetic vine material.

name: Chateau Clerc Milon  2022
wine_color: The wine is a deep cherry red with garnet highlights.
style: Cabernet Sauvignon, 32% Merlot, 8% Cabernet Franc, 1% Carmenère
desc_en_short: A Fifth Growth Pauillac of remarkable ambition, Château Clerc Milon 2022 delivers the classic marriage of Cabernet Sauvignon power and Merlot richness from some of the Médoc's finest gravel and clay-limestone terroirs — structured, mineral, and built unmistakably for the cellar.

name: Chateau Clerc Milon  2023
wine_color: Deep red with a garnet hue
style: Cabernet Sauvignon, 19% Merlot, 6.5% Cabernet Franc, 1.5% Carménère, 1% Petit Verdot
desc_en_short: Deep red with a garnet hue, the wine reveals refined, elegant bilberry and blackcurrant aromas accompanied by subtle hints of cedarwood and pepper. Creamy smoothness and precision are underpinned by well-structured, stylish tannins, imparting great complexity. The dense, full-bodied texture typical of great Cabernet Sauvignon is lifted by an attractive burst of fruit. The freshness lingers on the finish, enhanced by touches of cocoa-bean and licorice.

name: Viticcio Chianti Classico DOCG
desc_en_short: Brilliant ruby red in color, on the nose this wine offers scents of red fruits, plums, and violets. Also evident are notes of blond tobacco, graphite, damp underbrush, and toasty notes. On the palate, it is pleasantly refreshing, with elegant and balanced tannins that leave a long finish of toasted and bitter cacao notes, which come from aging in wood.

name: Viticcio Chianti Classico Riserva DOCG
desc_en_short:
Opulent, this red is maturing, with black cherry, blackberry,
plum, leather and mineral flavors that are beginning to transform into woodsy,
dried fruit notes. This is still fresh, focused and balanced, nevertheless, with
plenty of time ahead. Sangiovese, Merlot and Syrah. Best from 2026 through
2043.

name: Viticcio Prunaio Gran Selezione Chianti Classico DOCG
wine_color: The wine is a dense ruby red in color
desc_en_short: Viticcio's Prunaio Gran Selezione is a single-estate Chianti Classico DOCG built from hand-selected Sangiovese clones, weaving ripe plum and floral iris into a wine of striking elegance, concentration, and a beautifully long finish.

name: Viticcio Bolgheri DOC
desc_en_short: Concentrated ruby red in color. Its intense aromas recall coffee, cacao, and sour cherry, with a rich background of wet earth. In the mouth, it is powerful and savory, with decisive tannins that blend into a fresh finish of ripe fruit.

name: Chateau de la Vieille Tour Bordeaux Supérieur AOP & Roses
desc_en_short:
Château de la Vieille Tour Bordeaux Supérieur AOP & Roses

For those seeking a Bordeaux experience with added depth and character, Château de la Vieille Tour Bordeaux Supérieur AOP & Roses offers a refined and confident expression. This Bordeaux Supérieur reveals a more structured profile while remaining smooth and balanced, with aromas of dark fruits such as blackcurrant and ripe cherry, complemented by gentle spice and subtle oak that bring elegance and complexity to the glass.

Paired with fresh roses, this set transforms wine into a meaningful gesture—ideal for a special dinner, a private celebration, or an occasion where thoughtful details truly matter. For optimal enjoyment, serve at 16–18°C and allow brief aeration before drinking.

A graceful choice for creating a memorable moment—polished, expressive, and quietly impressive.

name: Kings of Prohibition  Shiraz
desc_en_short: Kings of Prohibition Shiraz is a bold, fruit-forward Australian red with ripe dark berries, warming spice, and a smooth, generous texture — crafted for modern drinkers who want intensity without pretension.

name: La Puerta Alta Malbec
wine_color: Deep ruby red with violet hues.
desc_en_short: A smooth, fruit-driven Malbec with ripe dark berries, gentle spice, and soft tannins—approachable, balanced, and easy to enjoy.

name: Odfjell Armador Cabernet Sauvignon
wine_color: Deep ruby red with garnet highlights.
desc_en_short: A structured yet approachable Cabernet Sauvignon with ripe black fruit, fresh herbal notes, and refined tannins—classic Maipo in style, balanced and food-driven.

name: Penfolds St Henri Shiraz Gift Box Lunar New Year Horse Edition (750 ml)
wine_color: Impenetrable deep crimson with dark purple hues.
desc_en_short:
Celebrate an auspicious new year with Penfolds St Henri, an alternative, yet time-honoured Shiraz. The Year of the Horse signifies a new beginning driven by curiosity and renewed possibilities.

A timeless gift to treasure for decades to come. Encased in this limited-release gift box is the 2021 vintage. Instantly recognised for its fruit-forward quality and distinctive style.

name: Xanadu Circa77 Cabernet Sauvignon
wine_color: Deep ruby with dark garnet hues.
desc_en_short: Xanadu Circa 77 is a classically expressive Margaret River Cabernet Sauvignon, delivering concentrated cassis and dark fruit with fine, polished tannins and carefully integrated oak — structured yet approachable, with the poise to age beautifully.

name: Billecart Salmon  Le Rose
wine_color: A pale yet radiant pink colour adorned with warm glints of gold.

name: Deutz  Brut Rose
wine_color: The colour is therefore deep and beguiling.

name: Opera Prima  Brut
food_matching: Oysters, Caviar, Fried Foods, Appetizers, Celebration
desc_en_short: This fine sparkling white wine, with a bright pale yellow color, presents an intense aroma of fresh citrus fruits, an expression of herbs and hints of flower petals. Delicate, elegant, small bubb-les caress the palate leaving a dry, smooth finish. Ideal on its own or with all kinds of Mediterranean dishes.

name: Cavicchioli & Figli  Cavicchioli Lambrusco Emilia Amabile
food_matching: Oysters, Caviar, Fried Foods, Appetizers, Celebration
desc_en_short: Cavicchioli's Lambrusco Emilia Amabile is a lightly sparkling, gently sweet red that captures the heart of Emilian table culture — fresh red cherry, strawberry, and a hint of violets, with soft bubbles and an easy, food-friendly character.

name: Cavicchioli  Lambrusco Grasparossa di Castelvetro Amabile
flavor_tags: Dark Chocolate, Blackberry, Chocolate, Cherry, Violet, Plum
food_matching: Oysters, Caviar, Fried Foods, Appetizers, Celebration
desc_en_short: Grasparossa di Castelvetro is the most structured of the Lambrusco varieties — this Amabile version from Cavicchioli delivers deep ruby colour, intense dark cherry and plum fruit, bold tannins, and gentle sweetness with satisfying effervescence.

name: Nino Franco  Prosecco Spumante Superiore "Brut" DOCG
desc_en_short: Pale straw-colored, bright. Very fine, persistent, crisp, flowery and fruity. Refreshing and balanced. Apple and pear flavors that echo on the aftertaste.

name: Corte Giara by Allegrini  Treviso Prosecco DOC
desc_en_short: Bright straw yellow. Fresh bouquet with abundantly fruity aromas of apple, pear, apricot and pineapple and hints of citrus tapering into the scent of wild flowers. Well structured, soft but at the same time dry, due to accentuated acidity. The harmonious palate conferred by the sugars is balance by an appropriate, satisfying tannin. Excellent as an aperitif, or with raw fish, clam consomm? and shellfish.

name: Villa Sandi  Prosecco Spumante Brut Millesimato Valdobbiadene
Chamdeville  Blanc de Blanc Brut
desc_en_short: A value-priced bubbly Chamdeville Blanc de Blanc has aromas of pear and apple with subtle notes of wild honey and toasted almonds. Made in a fresh style with a creamy palate of brioche, citrus and pear, it is crisp and lively with nice length.

name: 7 Cascine  Conegliano Valdobbiadene Prosecco Superiore DOCG
desc_en_short: Prosecco is a sparkling white wine from north-eastern Italy, specifically the Veneto and Friuli-Venezia Giulia wine regions. It's very refreshing and well-balanced. Pairing with seafood, especially with calamari and crabmeat.

name: Moet & Chandon  Ice Imperial (750 ml)
desc_en_short: Moët Ice Impérial, the first and only champagne especially created to be enjoyed over ice. A new champagne experience combining fun, fresh and free sensations while remaining true to the Moët & Chandon style, a style distinguished by its bright fruitiness, its seductive palate and its elegant maturity.

name: Deor  Gold Collection Vino Spumante Extra Dry
wine_color: Bright light yellow with lasting perlage.
desc_en_short: Bright light yellow with lasting perlage. Fresh, slightly aromatic and fruity aroma. fresh and fruity. The palate is great for a long aperitif. Excellent as aperitif and with light meals.

name: Pommery  Royal Brut
wine_color: Pale yellow with faint green highlights.
style: Pinot Noir, Pinot Meunier, And About One-third Chardonnay.
desc_en_short:
Winemaker's Notes :

This fine champagne is a blend of 40 carefully selected crus from the Champagne region. It is made up of three grape varieties: Pinot Noir, Pinot Meunier, and about one-third Chardonnay. This subtle blend is then aged in the Pommery cellars for about three years in order to develop its full aroma. Fresh and vivacious, with a supple, fruity finish. A composition that is light yet well-structured and full of charm.

name: Don Luciano  Brut
desc_en_short: This fine sparkling White wine, with a bright pale yellow color, presents an intense aroma of fresh citrus fruits, expression of herbs and hints of flower petals. Delicate, elegant, small bubbles caress the palate leaving a dry, smooth aftertaste. Ideal on its own or with all kinds of Mediterranean dishes. Serve it very cold, between 7 and 9 C˚.

name: Bottega  Diamond Brut
wine_color: Brilliant, fine and very persistent perlage. Straw yellow

name: Veuve Clicquot  Cuvee Rose
wine_color: A luminous color with attractive pink glints.
desc_en_short:
Winemaker Notes

This non-vintage Rose is the end result of a desire to create a Rose champagne with a delightfully luscious, fruit-based charm. Jacques Peters, the cellarmaster, and his team wanted a champagne that would be accessible and naturally engaging while conserving Veuve Clicquot's essential values in terms of style.

The wine has a luminous color with attractive pink glints. The nose is generous and elegant, with initial aromas of fresh red fruit (raspberry, wild strawberry, cherry, blackberry), leading to biscuity notes of dried fruits and Viennese pastries (almonds, apricots and brioche).

The fresh attack is followed by a fruity harmonious sensation on the palate. The wine is perfectly balanced in the best Veuve Clicquot style of pink champagnes, combining elegance and flair. The wine works its magic—this delectably full champagne can be enjoyed as a true delicacy. A deliciously fruity wine in earlybloom, this is a wonderful aperitif to be shared as a twosome or simply with friends. Made using 50 to 60 different crus, the cuvee is based on Brut Yellow Label's traditional blend: 50 to 55% Pinot Noir, 15 to 20% Pinot Meunier, and 28 to 33% Chardonnay.

It is an excellent accompaniment to any aperitif and interesting when paired with sliced meats, cured meats in general and mature cheeses.

name: Tosti  Moscato

name: Mionetto  Prosecco Treviso Brut DOC
wine_color: Light straw in color with bright yellow highlights
desc_en_short:
The grapes from the province of Treviso, an area that has always produced high quality Prosecco, give this sparkling wine a luminous straw yellow hue and for its emphatic yet stylish mousse. The bouquet is redolent of golden apple, while the palate is appealingly marked by aromatic notes of golden apple, white peach and honey.

Mionetto’s most classic line reflects its connections with the history of the winery in the elegant presentation of the bottle, which features an oblique label design that has always been a characteristic of the winery. The refined design of the label reflects the style of the products. Prestige, quality in every detail!

name: Don Luciano  Moscato
desc_en_short: Don Luciano Moscato is a natural sweet wine with yellow color and fine bubbles. On the mouth is light and elegant. This sparkling wine is excellent to be served with appetizers and desserts.

name: Bodegas Codorniu Raventos  Codorniu Clasico
wine_color: Brilliant yellow colour with green re ections.
desc_en_short: Very pale straw yellow. A fine elegant mousse. Prominent on the nose are the typical fruity aromas of these traditional varietals. A pleasant, fresh and balanced mouthfeel. Ideal as an aperitif, accompanying dried fruits and nuts, savoury pies, assorted canapés, etc.

name: Bodegas Codorniu Raventos  Anna De Codorniu Blanc De Blancs
wine_color: Brilliant yellow colour with green re ections.
desc_en_short: Brilliant yellow colour with green re ections. Fine, persistent bubbles forming continuous beads. On the nose, it displays citrusy and tropical fruit notes along with more complex ageing aromas (toast, brioche) that enrich the range of aromas. On the palate, it is creamy, wide and longlasting. These characteristics make it highly versatile and pairable with a great variety of food.

wine_color: bright strawberry in colour with plenty of bubbles

*Minimum Qty Allowed in Shopping Cart 12 Bottles.

Cordon Negro Rosé's bright, fruity personality envelops the senses in the glass with fresh raspberry and fruit cocktail aromas. The toasty palate mixes strawberry jam and red currant to deliver a pleasant mouth feel, wrapped up in a slow, light, sweet finish.

name: Taittinger  Prestige Rose
wine_color: Intense and brilliant body is bright pink in colour.
desc_en_short: Taittinger Prestige Rosé immediately stands out for its intense, shimmering hue whose secret lies in the fact that it is a blend, which is more complex and costly to produce. A quantity of still red wine (15%) produced from the best Pinot Noirs from Montagne de Reims and Les Riceys is in fact added to the final blend, to give this cuvée its unmistakable colour and vibrant intensity on the palate. The high proportion of Chardonnay (30%) that completes the blend brings the elegance and delicacy that underpin Taittinger’s signature style.

name: G.H. Mumm  Cordon Rouge Brut (750 ml)
wine_color: This champagne is a brightly sparkling, light golden yellow liquid with an abundance of fine and elegant bubbles.
desc_en_short: This champagne is a brightly sparkling, light golden yellow liquid with an abundance of fine and elegant bubbles. The nose reveals initial aromas of ripe fresh fruit (white and yellow peaches, apricots), tropical notes (lychee and pineapple). It then opens up with the fragrance of vanilla before developing notes of milky caramel, breadcrumbs and yeast, culminating in aromas of dried fruit and honey. An explosion of freshness in the mouth, followed by strong persistence. The complex aromas of fresh fruit and caramel perpetuate the intensity. Ideal as an aperitif and beyond, Mumm Cordon Rouge works as well as an accompaniment to white meat, as it does to fish or fine cured meats (Italian ham, smoked duck breast).

name: Eugenio Collavini  Il Grigio Royal Rose
wine_color: An intense pink ruby colour, lively, subtle and persistent perlage.
desc_en_short: The long Martinotti method allows us to obtain an excellent texture sparkling wine, with an intense pink ruby colour, lively, subtle and persistent perlage. Fresh nose, generous and fragrant, where strawberries, currant and raspberry melt together with a hint of bread crust. Intriguing, round and creamy taste. The aromatic harmony of the underbrush enhances the freshness and the complexity. Goes well with fish starters, mussels and it’s pleasant with fresh and mid seasoned cheeses.

name: Louis Roederer  Cristal Rose 2013
desc_en_short:
THE ESSENCE OF A GREAT FRAGRANCE Cristal Rosé

This wine, infused like a fine perfume, unfolds with a medley of eternally fresh and intermingling flavours. Its fragrance is one of soft tangy fruit and flower petals along with a profusion of almond, bread and spicy nuances. Cristal Rosé 2013 reflects the light from its soil, a few drops of a perfect distillate, cast into a pure mould. It is the quintessence of a great Champagne poised to transcend the boundaries of time!

Tasting Notes

With a very high proportion of Pinot Noir one is savouring what is nearly a Blanc de Noirs. A Champagne of great aromatic richness. The taste begins with stone fruits such as white vineyard peaches. A spicy note emerges in a powerful and complex mouthfeel. A vinous Champagne of grand complexity, with a characteristic touch of quince jelly.

desc_en_short:
Tasting Notes

Golden colour with copper hues. Nose of freshly pressed black grapes, of red, white and citrus fruits. Ample palate with flesh of vineyard peach and bouquet of aromatic herbs. spicy notes in the finish. A fine tightly knit Champagne of great purity

desc_en_short: A clear golden colour, fine, elegant bubbles. A delicate nose dominated by citrus fruit, with hints of fudge. Superb length, smooth with brioche aromas and subtle notes of honey, pine nuts and light tobacco.

name: Champagne Gremillet  Blanc de Blancs Brut
wine_color: Sublime, pale color with delicate greenish glints. Handsome, fine, long-lasting creamy bubbles, with a regular slow flow.
desc_en_short:
A bewitching and seductive champagne, that of the finest tables par excellence, whose lightness sublimates the most refined dishes. “Its freshness make it an easy champagne to drink, which give the irresistible desire for more”.

TO OBSERVE

Sublime pale golden color with delicate greenish glints. Handsome, fine, long-lasting creamy bubbles, with a regular slow flow.

TO BREATH

The nose is a bouquet of flowers in full bloom that invites to a second breath, with white hawthorn and honeysuckle blossoms, rose hips, followed by multicolored roses and peonies further revealing fresh hints of citrus fruit and citronella. Upon airing it opens slowly to reveal notes of bread, caramel and of candied fruit…

TO APPRECIATE

On the taste we find the same charming aromas as on the nose as we are carried away by this floral magic, perfect harmony between the wine and its “liqueur”. Its long, fragrant finish underlines its wonderful charm.

name: Dom Perignon  Rose (Luminated Label)
desc_en_short:
The beginning of winter was particularly rigorous in 2009. The Champagne region saw intermittent snowfall, and temperatures remained quite low. Spring was warm but rainy. The weather did not encourage flowering and there was a threat of mildew. 
The summer, despite stormy periods that raised concerns that the health of the vines might suffer, was dominated by sunshine, especially in August. The weather remained hot, dry and very sunny for five consecutive weeks. On September 4 a hailstorm hit the vineyards in Hautvillers, Verzenay and Chouilly. The summery weather returned the very next day, however, and the grapes continued to ripen in complete serenity.
The harvest thus began on September 12 under absolutely idyllic conditions. The grapes showed exceptional health and their maturity, underlined by a wonderful aromatic expression, was superlative.

name: French Bloom  Le Blanc Organic French Bubbly (750 ml) (Alcohol-Free)
desc_en_short:
A blend of dealcoholized organic French Chardonnay wines, French Bloom Le Blanc opens with a minerality with accents of pear, the inimitable signature of the house. Between acidity and depth, French Bloom Le Blanc reveals dazzling floral bursts in the heart. Its tropical notes are followed by an evolution of granny smith apple, accords of white flowers and slightly spicy citrus fruits with a sparkling freshness.

TASTING NOTES

Pear - White Flowers - Spicy Citrus

2023 WORLD SPARKLING AWARDS

World's Best AF Sparkling Winner

desc_en_short:
With a well-balanced complexity, the Rosé oscillates between minerality and freshness to reveal at its heart a true floral bouquet with vibrant notes. name: 19 Crimes  Blanc De Blancs
desc_en_short: Blanc de Blancs translates as ‘white of whites’ and to make this wine we stole grapes from our Hard Chard snatching them off the vine early to lock in their fresh crispness and light straw colour. A light bodied sparkling, clean and zesty style, with a crisp finish. A criminally easy wine to enjoy in many ways. Break out a bottle and celebrate with your gang!

name: Champagne Charles Orban  Blanc de Blancs Brut
desc_en_short: A pale yellow colour. A fruity nose with initial citrus fruits aromas followed by fresh, delicate notes of ginger and hawtorn. Lively on the palate, dominated by citrus fruits, with subtle notes of Viennese pastries and fresh bread and a chalky finish.

name: Mionetto  Prosecco Rose Extra Dry DOC
desc_en_short: This Extra Dry Millesimato Prosecco is obtained through soft pressing of the Glera and Pinot Nero grapes which have been left in contact with the skins to macerate for several days to give this Rosé its pale pink hue. Secondary fermentation (Charmat method) in temperature-controlled stainless steel for a prolonged maturation of 60 days gives it its honey and bread crust aromas.

name: Fontanafredda  Alta Langa Limited Edition Brut DOCG
desc_en_short: The cuvée is created with a meticulous blend of crus situated at an average altitude of 500m asl, which guarantee a fresh and fruity wine. A minimum maturing period of 30 months conveys perfect aromatic complexity. The colour is straw yellow with green highlights. The perfume is reminiscent of honey, white peaches, grapefruit and basil. The wine has a savoury feel in the mouth, with a persistent sparkle and a sweet, lingering finish.

name: Dom Perignon 2015
wine_color: Glistening Colour With Light Amber Highlights.
desc_en_short: The 2015 winegrowing year was marked by striking contrasts in climate, starting with a particularly cold spring, followed by a prolonged period of hot, dry weather that lasted until the end of August. When the harvest began on 7 September, in brilliant sunshine, the vines were impeccably healthy, revealing the exceptional generosity and balance of the grapes. This vintage aromatic wine promises a remarkable aromatic richness, capturing the unique essence of the year.

name: Franzini Prosecco DOC Extra Dry
wine_color: A beautiful pale yellow color with fine, lively bubbles.
desc_en_short: Elegant Prosecco from Veneto, Italy — light, fresh, and bubbly with floral and fruit notes. A perfect choice for celebrations, aperitifs, and desserts.

name: Borga  Prosecco Treviso Brut Millesimato
wine_color: Pale Straw Yellow with Fine Perlage
desc_en_short: The olfactory profile reveals itself on fresh white flowers, notes of pear and hints of citrus on a background of perceptible minerality. The sip is well balanced, enveloping, with full freshness and gustatory persistence. The finish has a savory trail.

name: Champagne Chavost Assemblage Brut Nature
desc_en_short:
Our estate was created in 1946 by the will of our elders, winegrowers of Chavot-Courcourt.

Chavost is the ancestral name of the village, which formerly was located between the Saint-Martin Church and the Mount Felix hill, upon which a castle was established.

Our ancestors have given us their strong collective values, solidarity, sharing, and the love of our lands. Now more than ever, we put all our forces in common to grow high quality grapes, giving us the chance to elaborate unique wines of Champagne.

Our commitment in preserving the environment, our land and the excellence of our wines, is expanding along with a deep conviction. In harmony with our philosophy and values, we decided to produce and launch a new range of wines :

Thanks to a mastered vinification, that does not include added sulfites, the range « Et sans sulfites ajoutés ! » ( meaning « No added sulphites ! »), is composed of a singular and atypical wines. It comes in addition to the traditional range.

desc_en_short:
Greenish yellow color with fine and

on the nose, with hints of white
