Fresh and delicate taste, balanced
and with a good persistence.

name: Champagne Andre Clouet Grand Reserve Grand Cru Brut
desc_en_short: Rich and concentrated with excellent fruit, this elegant 100% Pinot Noir Champagne is sourced exclusively from grand cru vineyards in the village of Bouzy. Broad, complex and biscuity.

name: Champagne Andre Clouet Un Jour De 1911 Grand Cru Classé Brut
desc_en_short: The House of André Clouet invites you to enjoy  « Un jour de 1911 » the revival of a rediscovered gem from one of the best vineyards in the world. Working with the finest craftsmen, we bring you the magical renaissance of champagne production from the 1900s.

name: Montelvini Prosecco Doc Rose Treviso Brut (Serenitatis Collection)
desc_en_short: From the vineyards most suited for obtaining sparkling wines we produce our Cuvée Prosecco Rosé composed of 85% Glera and 15% Pinot Noir. The first vintage of Montelvini's Prosecco DOC Rosé Treviso Brut Millesimato was 2019 one year after the Consortium introduced this type to the appellation, to enhance the finesse of Pinot Noir in blending with the Glera grape through a prolonged rest on the lees.

name: Montelvini Prosecco Doc Treviso Extra Dry (Serenitatis Collection)
desc_en_short: Cuvée dell'Erede owes its birth and name to Alberto Serena, son of the founder of Montelvini. Precious Prosecco DOC Treviso in a Extra Dry version, which meets everyone's taste thanks to its versatility and pleasantness.

name: Montelvini Asolo Prosecco Superiore Docg Extra Dry
desc_en_short: The Extra Dry version has always been the best known and most appreciated interpretation of Prosecco.  Montelvini's Asolo Prosecco Superiore DOCG enhances the aromaticity and fruity hints typical of the Glera grapes , which ripen around mid-September.

name: Diamante  Prosecco Spumante Extra Dry
wine_color: Light straw yellow in colour with greenish reflections.
desc_en_short: Light straw yellow in colour with greenish reflections. Very bubbly when poured maintining a persistent perlage to the end. It has a fine and elegant bouquet with a good presence of fruity notes, particularly green and golden apple followed by floral notes of wisteria blossom. Excellent length and persistence, this is a harmonious and well balanced Prosecco.

name: Domaine Coustarret Elevation Pet Nat
wine_color: Bright straw yellow with fine, natural bubbles
desc_en_short: A lively and natural sparkling wine (Pét-Nat) from Jurançon, France — crafted from Gros Manseng with fresh citrus, white flowers, and a gentle creamy fizz. Perfect for summer gatherings and aperitifs.

name: Enjoy It Non Alcoholic Sparkling
desc_en_short: This non-alcoholic sparkling wines are made of Cuvee of Riesling and chardonnay. It has the aroma of green apple, lemon and citrus, and fresh acidity balanced with the sweetness of the wines, very harmonized in the palate. It's great as drinking alone as an aperitif or pairs with salad and pizza and some spicy Asian cuisine.

name: Perrier-Jouet  Blason Rose (750 ml)
desc_en_short: Perrier-Jouët Blason Rosé is like a rose petal, with a delicate texture on the top and, hidden underneath, the veins which bring strength, structure and tension.

name: Zonin Prosecco Rose Brut
desc_en_short: A bright, light‑hearted sparkling rosé with fruity clarity and crisp finish.

name: Edenvale Pink Moscato (Non-Alcoholic Wine)
desc_en_short: A lightly sparkling, aromatic, and beautifully balanced Pink Moscato.

name: Masottina Contradagranda Prosecco Superiore Brut DOCG
wine_color: Pale yellow with greenish highlights and fine, lingering perlage.
desc_en_short: A top-tier, structured, and dry Prosecco Superiore, showcasing the finesse and minerality of the DOCG hills.

name: Rive della Chiesa Spumante Moscato
wine_color: Brilliant straw yellow, with fine and elegant perlage.
desc_en_short:
Our Moscato is an experience of fragrant sweetness
captured in a bottle, where light bubbles dance among
intense aromas of flowers and citrus. Perfect for celebrating
festive moments or adding a touch of sweetness to a special
occasion. Each sip takes you on a journey through delicate
aromas and fresh sensations, wrapping the senses in an
elegant and harmonious embrace. A toast that turns every
occasion into an unforgettable memory.

name: Campo Viejo Cava Brut (750 ml)
desc_en_short: A vibrant and refreshing Spanish sparkling wine that offers fine bubbles, lively fruit and elegant balance — a versatile choice for celebrations or casual pairing.

name: Jacob's Creek Reserve Sparkling Rose (750 ml)
desc_en_short: A fresh and elegant Australian sparkling rosé with vibrant fruit and soft mousse — perfect for any celebration or relaxed gathering

name: Zonin  "Classico" Pinot Grigio
wine_color: Appealing straw-yellow color green with delicate reflections.
desc_en_short: Appealing straw-yellow color green with delicate reflections. Delicately fruity, relatively full and ample with an ensemble of aromas of great finesse. Lightly dry yet extremely fresh. Its pleasantly balanced and elegant structure makes this an unusually refined and aristocratic wine. It combines well with white meats, and steamed or grilled fish. In addition, it makes a fine aperitif and is highly suited to every occasion outside meals.

name: Banrock Station  Chardonnay
desc_en_short:
Pale straw color with intense fruit aromas of citrus and peach with hints of tropical
fruits. Delicate oak overtones. Fresh, juicy flavors of peach, melon on and citrus with a
light delicate oak influence. Soft and creamy with a full-bodied texture, balanced acid
and excellent length.

name: Robert Mondavi   Private Selection Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: Aromas of freshly cut grass, Meyer lemon, grapefruit, and lime zest with steely mineral notes. Flavors of lemongrass, citrus zest, guava, mango,and honeydew melon complement the nose. A bright, clean acidity makes it crisp and expressive. Enjoy this superior Sauvignon Blanc with crab salad, calamari, prosciutto-wrapped pears, and roasted chicken.

name: Baron Philippe de Rothschild  Mapu Reserva Chardonnay
desc_en_short: The Mapu Reserva Chardonnay is fruit driven and up front in style with fresh melon and soft apple fruit flavours. Medium bodied - good quality. Great with asparagus, grilled scallop skewers, smoked salmon, trout.

name: Baron Philippe de Rothschild  Mapu Sauvignon Blanc (Screw Cap)
desc_en_short: Sauvignon Blanc gives vivacious dry wines of great refinement. The Mapu range of wines is made by Baron Philippe de Rothschild in Chile. Fresh gooseberry fruit and cut grass notes. Well balanced and clean on the palate - good quality. Enjoy drinks with seafood, tarragon chicken and stuffed crab.

name: San Pedro  Gato Negro Chardonnay
desc_en_short:
This Chardonnay has a clean pale yellow colour; Its intense wine that show tropical aromas like peach, pineapple and hints of banana perfectly blended with sweet notes of vanilla. A perfect acidity improve the fresh fruity sensation an give a perfect balance with the sweet sensation that make a long pleasant finish . Excellent persistence .

Serving Suggestion: Ideal with poultry and game birds, veal and pork, fish and pasta preparations which feature cream or butter, mushrooms.
Ideal temperature for drinking: 10-12°C

name: San Pedro  Gato Negro Sauvignon Blanc
wine_color: Pale-yellow in color with greenish hues.
desc_en_short:
This Sauvignon blanc has a pale yellow colour with hints of green tones. Intense where you can find a blend of the herbals notes like tomato leaf and the fresh tropical fruit such a grapefruit, pineapple and mango. It’s a wine the fresh style with a balanced acidity that improve the fruity mouth sensation and give a long pleasant finish.

Serving Suggestion: First courses, seafood, ethnic dishes-pastas, curries, salsas, spicy sausages, vegetables dishes, luncheon salads, olive oil based dishes, tomato sauces, goat cheese. Ideal temperature for drinking: 10-12°C

name: Conte Placido  Placido Pinot Grigio
desc_en_short: Pale-straw in color. Fresh and fruity aromas of pears as well as citrus and grapefruit. The palate is full, fresh and lively, with notes of ripe pear on the finish. Perfect for a range of foods including appetizers, fresh salads, seafood, and grilled poultry.

name: Catena Zapata  Alamos Chardonnay
wine_color: A straw-yellow color with light shades of green.
desc_en_short: Alamos Chardonnay shows a straw-yellow color with light shades of green. The nose offers ripe tropical fruit aromas with citrus and floral notes. The mouthfeel is full and rich, with concentrated ripe pear and fig fruit mingled with vanilla and sweet spice oak flavors. The finish is clean and fresh with bright, crisp acidity.

name: Wente Vineyards  Wente Morning Fog Chardonnay
desc_en_short: 92 Points in Decanter “Morning Fog Chardonnay is an great expression of Livermore Valley Chardonnay, with diverse alluvial fans of soil consistently creating Chardonnay with beautiful and lingering minerality, which coupled with the natural acidity from the long and cool growing season, creates a beautiful wine” - Karl D. Wente, Fifth Generation Winemaker

name: Castello Banfi  San Angelo Pinot Grigio
desc_en_short: This 100% Pinot Grigio belongs to Castello Banfi estate-bottled single-varietals range. Thanks to the Montalcino microclimate our Tuscan Pinot Grigio adds to the typical aromas of this variety an unusual body, flavour and balance.

name: Domaine Laroche  Chablis Les Chanoines AOC
desc_en_short: Brilliant yellow. Crisp, fresh and mineral on the nose. The mouth is refreshing, smooth and harmonious. food matching with dessert and cheese.

name: Santa Cristina by Antinori  Orvieto Classico "Campogrande" DOC
flavor_tags: Green Apple, Mineral, Citrus, Acacia, Apple
desc_en_short: Campogrande is Antinori's flagship Orvieto Classico — a fresh, elegant Umbrian white from the Castello della Sala estate, blending Trebbiano and Grechetto for a clean, aromatic wine with citrus, white flowers, and delicate mineral freshness.

name: Santa Helena  Varietal Chardonnay
desc_en_short: Clean pale-yellow. Tropical aromas such as peach, pineapple and banana hints combined exquisitely with sweet vanilla notes. The fresh-fruit sensation isenhanced by the wine’s perfect acidity, which balances sweetness and gives a long pleasing finish.

name: Santa Helena  Varietal Sauvignon Blanc
wine_color: Pale-yellow in color with greenish hues.
desc_en_short: Pale yellow with green tones. fairly intense tropical fruit aromas stand out, such as pineapples and mangos in aromas. The palate is fruit flavour, good acidity, fresh young character, vivid and pleasant finish, good persistence.

name: Vigneti Del Vulture  Pippoli Bianco Basilicata IGT
desc_en_short: Pale lemon in colour, with perfumes of citrus and a touch of Apricot. Rich yet fresh with a lime zest character which comes from the Greco fruit, balancing the richness of the Fiano. A stunning, utterly drinkable white from the deep south of Italy.

name: Alois Lageder  Muller Thurgao Alto Adige DOC
wine_color: Brilliant, straw-yellow colour with a green shimmer.
desc_en_short: Brilliant straw-yellow colour with a green shimmer. Pronounced, fruity, forward varietal aroma with a delicate muscat note. Medium-bodied, elegant, grapey flavour with a crisp, refreshing finish.

name: Allegrini  Soave Classico DOC
desc_en_short: A smooth and graceful wine, releasing a sensation of freshness and persistent aromatic notes. It is vinified purely in stainless steel, which balances the mineral flavours.

name: Paul Jaboulet  Parallele 45 White
desc_en_short: Pale yellow colour with greenish hues. Aromatic and fresh with white flowers and citrus fruit on aromas. Ample and warm, with an attractive fresh final note on the palate.

name: Craggy Range  Chardonnay Kidnappers Vineyard
desc_en_short: Shows lemon zest, almond, and mineral aromas and flavors, with a coastal acidity and freshness. This medium-weight, textured wine has a remarkable length of flavor. Pairs perfectly with a variety of shellfish dishes.

name: Bodegas Salentein  Portillo Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: Greenish yellow, with golden tints. A wine with supple aromas, reminiscent of citrus fruits like pink grapefruit, tropical fruits, most noticeably, white ripe peach, intermingled with rue. Crispy, persistent palate, with marked acidity. Ideal for seafood, salads, pizza, sushi, white meat or to drink as an aperitif.

name: Errazuriz  Estate Reserva Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: 88 points in Wine Spectator - "In the mouth the varietal intensity lessens a little with a wine that is clean, fresh and smooth. Appearing to slightly lack complexity after the nose, there are rounded lime and tropical fruits such as guavas and papayas that mould smoothly into a grassy and rounded finish."

name: Errazuriz  Estate Reserva Chardonnay
desc_en_short: "Vivid straw color. Pungent aromas of orange pith, lime zest and pear, with a melony flourish emerging with air. Pliant and dry, showing very good intensity to its juicy honeydew and citrus fruit flavors. Finishes spicy and persistent, with a sneaky mineral note adding lift and bite."

name: Torres  Vina Esmeralda
desc_en_short: A voluptuous, exotically perfumed nose, with deliciously well-defined primary aromas, complemented by secondary aromas derived from the wine’s controlled fermentation. Silky and sappy on the palate.

name: Two Oceans  Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short:
*Minimum Qty Allowed in Shopping Cart 3 Bottles.

Crisp, fresh and elegant with upfront tropical fruit, tangy gooseberry, a hint of green fig and fresh-cut grass. This wine has become a favourite in 80 countries. Pair it with grilled seafood, bouillabaisse, pasta and poultry dishes.

name: Frescobaldi  Remole Bianco Toscana IGT
wine_color: A straw-yellow colour with golden highlights.

name: Rawson's Retreat  Chardonnay
wine_color: Pale straw with light lemony hues.
desc_en_short: Bright with pale sun bleached hay golden hues, Creamy vanilla bean, Yellow peach, honeydew melon and grapefruit. Freshly stone fruits with hints of citrus, spicy, acid completes

name: Pala  Soprasole Vermentino Sardegna DOC
wine_color: Straw colour with greenish reflections, bright.

name: Wither Hills  Sauvignon Blanc
wine_color: Straw yellow, with evident greenish tinges.
desc_en_short: Wither Hills Sauvignon Blanc is amongst the very best examples of the famous Marlborough style. Always a standout, the Wither Hills is lively on the palate with herbal gooseberry and lemon-grass flavours.

name: Tahuna  Pinot Gris Hawke's Bay
desc_en_short: Tahuna Pinot Gris has classic aromatic peach flavours along with beautifully balanced acidity and a long finish. It is just off-dry and well suited to seafood, white meats and Asian food styles. Drink it young or cellar for 3-4 years. Recommended serving temperature 8-10°C.

name: Tahuna  Chardonnay Hawke's Bay
desc_en_short: Tahuna Chardonnay has citrus and nectarine flavours backed up with sweet oak and lees stirred complexity. It is made in an early drinking style, but will comfortably cellar for the next 2-3 years. Recommended serving temperature 8-10°C.

name: Tahuna  Sauvignon Blanc Marlborough
desc_en_short: Tahuna Sauvignon Blanc has ripe tropical and gooseberry fruit flavours with a zingy finish and impeccable balance. A great aperitif or seafood wine made for drinking young. Recommended serving temperature 6-8°C.

name: Agricola Querciabella  Batar Toscana IGT
wine_color: Bright straw-yellow core with golden hues.
desc_en_short: Bright straw-yellow core with golden hues. The bouquet is broad, aromatic and seductive with aromas of acacia flowers, chamomile, yellow peach, yellow plum and melon. Hints of passion fruit and fresh pineapple with light notes of saffron and cedar. On the palate, the wine is voluptuous yet elegant, showing great finesse. The mouthfeel is balanced, supported by great freshness. Tropical fruit repeats on the palate with striking minerality and a very long finish.

name: Joseph Drouhin  Macon Villages
wine_color: The colour of the wine is bright and limpid.

name: Nederburg  Lyric Sauvignon blanc Chenin Blanc Chardonnay
desc_en_short: This harmonious wine is made from Sauvignon blanc, Chenin blanc and Chardonnay. Crisp and refreshing with aromas of passion fruit and citrus, and hints of freshly-cut grass. Enjoy with seafood, salads, mild Indian curries and Thai noodles.

name: E.Guigal Condrieu Blanc AOC
desc_en_short: Brilliant clear golden yellow. Intensely flowery (violets), and fruity (apricot, peaches and citrus) in aromas. The palate is fresh and round. Rich, unctuous and full bodied. Harmonious with light acidity and round fleshy fruits.Delicate and elegant.

name: Langmeil  Spring Fever Chardonnay
wine_color: Mid straw with bright, light gold hues
desc_en_short: Mid straw with bright, light gold hues. luscious, creamy aroma of fresh peaches, blood orange and tropical hints with a touch of marzipan adding to the complexity. Zingy tropical fruits flow onto the palate morphing into peach and citrus flavours in the mouth. Food matching with mediterranean pastas, freshly grilled seafood or spicy chicken stir fry.

name: Marques de Caceres  Verdejo
desc_en_short: Pale straw color. Very fresh bouquet with citrus and floral notes. Deliciously refreshing in the mouth with pleasant vivacity and long-lasting flavors. This new addition complements our Marqués de Cáceres range of white wines with an area of production that offers great potential for the future. n ideal wine to relax with as a delicious aperitif or to accompany seafood, grilled fish and shellfish, rice and pasta dishes, etc. Also complements sushi and sashimi dishes.

name: Cordero Di Montezemolo  Langhe Arneis DOC
desc_en_short: Bright straw color; intense bouquet of peach and acacia flowers, chamomile, melon and yellow flowers. Inviting and fresh with a typical note of a slightly bitter finish. Splendid accompaniment for antipasti and springtime first courses including omelets with wild herbs, savory pies, vegetable soups, stuffed squash blossoms, freshwater seafood and 'vitello tonnato' (veal cutlets with tuna sauce). Excellent as an aperitivo.

name: Monchiero Carbone  Roero Arneis Cecu d la Biunda DOCG
desc_en_short: Bright, intense straw-yellow notes. Great intensity on the nose, showing great depth that evolves slowly into sensations of aromatic freshness, ranging from white currants to hints of mint to sage. The entry onto the palate is strongly marked by a splendid freshness of flavour, which gradually shows its true power and mouth-filling qualities, developing into a rich and very long finish on which white currants stand out. Its finesse on the nose and mouth make it a marvellous match for seafood risottos and oven-baked fish.

name: Weingut Robert Weil  Riesling Kiedricher Trocken
desc_en_short: Animating fruit with balanced acidity and sustainable body. By the juicy citrus and stone fruit flavors and subtle minerality a perfect accompaniment to meals to various dishes.

name: Cloudy Bay  Chardonnay
desc_en_short:
Winemaker Notes

Impressive in its youth, this is a wine to watch. A complex nose offers layers of white peach, spring florals and well integrated smoke. The palate is richly textured with fleshy stonefruit and lemon citrus. Our 2013 chardonnay is mouthfilling yet balanced with fresh acidity giving it shape and focus. An elegant wine with a lingering and lively finish

name: Echeverria  Reserva Chardonnay
desc_en_short:
Bright yellow with golden hues. Fresh and juicy, this delicate Chardonnay expresses aromas of pineapples, melon and peach combined with exquisite citrus notes. The palate is silky and vibrant with a long tasty finish.

Sustainable Winery

ISO 9001-HACCP

name: Cantina Terlano  Gewurztraminer DOC
desc_en_short:
full, intensive straw yellow in color. The stimulating aroma of the Gewürztraminer is reminiscent of lychee and mango with
delicate notes of honeysuckle. The aromatic spectrum also includes notes of rose petal, which
are typical of this variety.  The unique quality of the aromatic character of the wine is continued on the palate,
with fresh fruit and lively acidity combining with mineral notes to leave a very round and at
the same time firm impression.

name: Cannonball  California Chardonnay
desc_en_short:
Weʼve crafted a Chardonnay that we believe offers something a little different — balance.

Lush and expressive. Flavors of poached pear, lemon curd, yellow plum, and toasted almond.

name: Delheim  Chenin Blanc
wine_color: Light green tint on the hue.
desc_en_short:
Light green tint on the hue. Aromas of white- and yellow peaches, guava and pineapple. The fresh acidity and abundance of
clean fruit flavours lead to a well balanced palate. Green melon
flavours round off the lingering finish.

name: Duckhorn  Decoy Chardonnay
desc_en_short: This deliciously bright and inviting Chardonnay offers layers of apricot, citrus and green apple, as well as hints of fresh honeysuckle and cinnamon. On the palate, the lovely pure fruit flavors are underscored by delicate acidity and a supple richness from sur lie aging.

name: Far Niente  Chardonnay
desc_en_short: Far Niente Chardonnay offers tropical aromas of citrus and melon layered with honeysuckle, perfume and toasted oak. A juicy entry transitions to a vibrant, yet oily, palate, which builds to a clean and refreshing finish. This wine is well-integrated and beautifully concentrated, with lush citrus flavors and hints of minerality.

name: Grgich Hills  Chardonnay
desc_en_short: Straw-yellow. Musky peach, tropical fruits and a hint of soft citrus fruit, with complicating notes of flinty minerality and smoky, vanillin oak. Broad and rich on the palate, with chewy flavors of white peach, ripe lemon and stone. Finishes tactile and dry, with a light touch. From very cool vineyards in the extreme south of Napa Valley.

name: Peter Michael  Chardonnay Belle Cote
desc_en_short: Noticeably intense and powerfully hedonistic aromas of lychee nut, citrus, rose petal and orange blossom come to mind with a distinct background of mineral, bergamot orange, yellow peach, nutmeg, whole nut and toasted almond. The mouthfeel is weighty and rich creating a creamy, seamless palate. Notes of brioche and pain grillé coupled with crisp natural acidity make for a wonderfully balanced finish. The 2009 Belle Cote is already expressive and will continue to develop its unique character for at least a decade.

name: Pegasus Bay  Riesling
desc_en_short: The bouquet and flavour suggest peaches, apricots, lychees, frangipani, honeysuckle and mandarin. It is concentrated and mouth filling with a backbone of minerality and tangy acidity that complements it’s off dry finish and draws out its length. With careful cellaring it should develop a complex range of other nuances and live for a decade or more.

name: Martinborough  Vineyard Sauvignon Blanc Te Tera
desc_en_short: An inviting mix of guava and tropical fruits round out the bouquet leading to a zesty citrus flavor. The crispness on the tongue lend a hand to the dry, mineral finish that leaves you wanting more.

name: Lion's Cape  Coastal White Chardonnay (Fruit wine blend)
desc_en_short:
*Minimum Qty Allowed in Shopping Cart 6 Bottles.

This is a well-rounded and balanced wine with ripe notes of citrus and tropical fruits

name: Mar Y Sol  Selection SB (Sauvignon Blanc) (Fruit wine blend)
desc_en_short:
*Minimum Qty Allowed in Shopping Cart 6 Bottles.

Wonderful aromas of citrus and tropical fruits. On the palate the fruitiness is balanced by mild acidity and minerality just what one should expect from a fine and well assembled fruity Sauvignon Blanc. Serve slightly chilled for a true varietal expression

name: Signus  Crisp White (Sauvignon Blanc) (Fruit wine blend)
desc_en_short:
*Minimum Qty Allowed in Shopping Cart 6 Bottles.

This Sauvignon Blanc always winner it’s the perfect reflect of our compromise with the quality, bright, clean and clear yellow in colour. Fine, intense floral aromas stand out on the nose, mingled with citrus notes of grapefruit and subtle touches of green apple. Floral and fruit notes remerge on the palate, accompanied by a balanced acidity and unique freshness that nakes it a pleasing all occasion wine.

name: Torres  Pazo Das Bruxas Rias Baixas DO
desc_en_short: Brilliant, limpid, pale yellow. Fragrant on the nose, offering perfumed and citrus notes coupled with fruit aromas (white peach) over a touch of minerality characteristic of the terroir. Sweet upon entry, followed by a fresh, clean evolution across the palate and a long, elegant finish.

name: Joseph Drouhin  Laforet Chardonny de Bourgogne
Viu Manent  Estate Collection Reserva Chardonnay
desc_en_short: This Reserva Chardonnay presents a light greenish-yellow color with a very fresh and fruity nose with aromas of exotic fruits, green apples, melon, and mandarin orange. The palate shows tremendous freshness, balance, fruity, and very good volume and a subtle mineral touch.

name: Viu Manent  Gran Reserva Chardonnay
desc_en_short: Presents a light greenish-yellow color. The nose is fresh and fruity with complex aromas that recall ripe white fruits, citrus notes, and salinity due to its proximity to the sea. The palate offers rich structure marked by a fresh acidic backbone that provides freshness and a subtle touch of saline on the finish that lends it complexity and a sense of place.

name: Viu Manent  Rayuela Reserva Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: This wine is a clean, bright, pale, almost transparent yellow color with green highlights. It nose features standout citrus and exotic fruit aromas of lime, chili pepper and melon accompanied by more subtle mineral notes. The palate is refreshing and fruity, with moderate volume, a rich acidity, and good balance leading to a long mineral finish.

name: Pounamu  Special Selection Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: 90 points in Wine Advocate by Robert Parker, this single vineyard Sauvignon Blanc is truly special, spirited and authentic, revealing all the characteristics of New Zealand's famous Marlborough region. Fresh herbaceous and tropical fruit aromas burst from the glass. Its mouth-watering and pure taste make you craving for more. Well matched with seafood, chicken and salads or just by itself. Serve Chilled!

name: Trimbach  Riesling
desc_en_short: Its delicate bouquet, the fine balance between its dry personality, its distinguished fruitiness and its natural vitality contribute to its exceptional richness.

name: Trimbach  Gewurztraminer
desc_en_short: Trimbach Gewurztraminer is a bright pale gold color. Aromas of cinnamon, nutmeg, lychee and rose petals. The taste is rich, intense, luscious and well balanced with a dry, spicy finish.

name: Oxford Landing  Sauvignon Blanc
wine_color: Pale straw in colour with a tinge of green.
desc_en_short: Pale straw in colour with a tinge of green. Fresh and zesty aromas of guava, passion fruit pith, pineapple and mango. The palate shows layers of fresh lemongrass and papaya flavours. Fine, crunchy acidity helps to focus the taste buds on the finish which is persistent and utterly delicious when paired with Sainte-Maure de Touraine (an un-pasteurised goats milk cheese, rolled in wood ash from France) or you could try it with mushroom and barley risotto.

name: Zenato  Lugana San Benedetto DOC
wine_color: A white with a strong personality.
desc_en_short: A white with a strong personality, with fragrant scents that the presence of Lugana enriches in complex nuances, expanding the sensory experience. A full-bodied wine, with a pleasant persistence in the aftertaste, to be tasted fresh, excellent paired with Lake Garda dishes.

name: Kendall Jackson  Vintner's Reserve Chardonnay
desc_en_short: America's #1 selling Chardonnay for 24 years and counting! It's no wonder Vintner's Reserve Chardonnay is our most popular release. Handcrafted in small vineyard lots throughout the entire winemaking process, our grapes are from California’s cool, coastal growing regions. Vintner's Reserve Chardonnay is fruit-forward, divinely complex, approachable and exceptionally food-friendly.

name: Kendall Jackson  Grand Reserve Chardonnay
desc_en_short: Lush tropical fruit intertwined with lemon, lime and floral notes. Elegantly layered, this wine exhibits a rich texture and firm backbone with a hint of vanilla and spice to round out the long finish.

name: Montes Winemaker's Choice  Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: On the palate the wine is medium bodied with citrus fruits like pink grapefruit, fresh lemon-lime and tropical fruits as white peach and passion fruit are accompanied by the floral and vegetable notes that characterize this wine. Enjoy it with fresh salads, fish or simply on its own

name: Montes Winemaker's Choice  Chardonnay
desc_en_short: Medium gold in color. The nose features notes of fresh fruits such as peaches and apricots with a touch of citrus. The palate recalls bananas and a bit of asparagus. French oak lends notes of Vanilla and heightens the lactic notes with a backdrop of butter and yogurt. Pairing with Salmon ceviche, Sea bass with sautéed mushrooms.

name: Domaine Albert Mann  Pinot Gris
desc_en_short: Bright, deeper yellow. The honeyed/roast nut aromas draw you in and then there is a lick of spicy pineapple. Full and rich on the palate with a touch of honey sweetness filling out the flavours and adding to the texture. For a wine with such lovely power it dances lightly on the finish!

name: Domaine Huet  Le Clos Du Bourg Moelleux1Er Trie
desc_en_short: Première Trie means a wine from the first selection of grapes during harvest. This wine, now firmly closed up, as is expected with Chenin Blanc, is headed towards an opulent future, even though the fruit is kept firmly in check by the long-term aging potential.

name: Pieropan  Soave Classico Calvarino Doc
wine_color: Pale straw yellow with greenish reflections
desc_en_short: Pale straw yellow with greenish reflections when young. Golden with aging and perfume. The aroma is fresh and flowery with aroma of elder lemon and cherry. The palate is dry, well balanced and elegant with tremendous length and finesse.

name: Pio Cesare  Piodilei Langhe Chardonnay DOC
desc_en_short:
Spicy, creamy, intense, soft, long aftertaste, sweet fruit, hot and ripe, still very fresh, elegant touch of oak. Long life. Produced in very small quantity.

Piodilei has been produced by the Pio Cesare Family since 1985 vintage. It represents our desire to produce a white wine from our own vineyards in the Barbaresco and Barolo with the same body, complexity and ageing potential of the great reds historically produced in those areas.

name: Domaine Champalou  Vouvray "Le Portail"
desc_en_short: Pale straw with aroma ripe green apple, grapefruit and nectarine and mineral complexity. A taste of freshness and richness with steely mineral length. This is truly gastronomical wine: its roundness, fullness and fruitness will marry perfectly with crustaceans, such as crab, lobster or scallops. It will also work wonderfully with other fish and meats, and can cope with anything that is slightly spiced. Don't hesitate to drink Le portail alongside a cheeseboard. To enhance this wine, we advise you to decant it approximately an hour before serving at 12°C.

name: Sato  Central Otago Riesling
desc_en_short: Straw yellow colour. Gentle but uplifting nose of lemon, citrus, splash of lime, crushed apple, touch of pine resin followed by creamy yeast, baked bread like complexity. Soft suppleness on the pallet. Great texture. Tasty bright citrus fruit. Splashing beautiful acidity runs through in the mouth and leads to the long finish supported by wet stone minerality.

name: Villa Maria  Private Bin Chardonnay
desc_en_short: This wine is fruit-driven in style, exhibiting ripe peach and pear aromas with underlying citrus and fig notes. On the palate these initial fruit flavours are followed by a creamy texture with integrated oak characters. A medium bodied wine that is soft and styled for enjoyment now and over the next two to three years. Enjoy with an antipasto platter, chicken Caesar salad or seafood dish.

name: Black Oak  Chardonnay
desc_en_short: The Black Oak Chardonnay is golden straw in color, it is pretty and bright.  Wonderful aromas of summer-ripe peaches with tropical fruits and flowers.  The silky and smooth flavors are reminiscent of baked apples, and toasty vanilla bean.  The lively acidity makes this an extremely well-balanced Chardonnay.  The finish is long and fruity, with an interesting hint of hazelnuts.  Overall, this wines taste profiles I would tend to characterized as creamy, with apricots and lemons.

name: Corte Viola  Pinot Grigio IGT
desc_en_short: Straw yellow with greenish hints. Pleasantly fresh, with floral and fruity notes of green apple and citrus, with a light almond aftertaste. Well balanced, dry and sapid, medium-body, leaves a pleasant sensation of cleanliness and freshness.

name: Little Beauty  Marlborough 'Limited Edition' Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: Aromas of honeydew melon, lemon grass and capsicum with a smoky, mineral character. Refreshing and medium bodied on the palate with citrus notes beautifully balanced by flavours of pink grapefruit and basil.

name: Bodegas Muga  Blanco Rioja DOC
wine_color: Bright, straw-yellow colour which does not give a sign of its time in the cask.
desc_en_short: Bright, straw-yellow colour which does not give a sign of its time in the cask. An open, complex nose in which you can find aromas of aromatic herbs such as fennel, citrus fruit (lime), stone fruit (peach) and slight toasted nuances. A fresh wine on the palate with good acidity. Balanced and silky smooth with a very long aftertaste. Perfect pairing for grilled fish, shellfish and rice dishes, among others.

name: Domaine Thibault Liger-Belair  Bourgogne Aligote "Clos des Perrieres la Combe"
Jacob's Creek  Classic Chardonnay (375 ml)
desc_en_short:
*Minimum Qty Allowed in Shopping Cart 12 Bottles.

Attractive melon and fresh fruit flavours complemented by subtle toasty oak that are all hallmarks of this fresh crisp variety.

Wine Score : 89 POINTS, Decanter (Apr-18)

Award : PLATINUM, Critics Challenge 2018

name: Jacob's Creek  Reserve Chardonnay (750 ml)
desc_en_short:
Jacob's Creek Reserve Chardonnay has attractive melon and fresh fruit flavors complemented by subtle toasty oak are hallmarks of this fresh crisp wine. Premium wines that capture the character of Australia’s best wine regions.

 

Wine Score : 90 POINTS, Jane Faulkner - Halliday Wine Companion 2018 (Aug-17)

Award : GOLD, China Wine & Spirits Awards 2018

name: George Wyndham  Bin 222 Chardonnay (750 ml)
desc_en_short:
Generously flavoured with a creamy texture that is held together with soft acidity. Rich stone fruit and citrus with balanced oak and malo-lactic ferment flavours. The wine has obvious presence by combining fruit intensity, oak aging and malolactic fermentation for a modern twist on a classic style.

Award : SILVER, Sydney Royal Wine Show 2018

name: G7  Reserva Chardonnay
desc_en_short: Prominent yellow with greenish gleams. Expression nose, with scents of bananas, white peaches and apricots mixed with notes of vanilla, toffee and dried fruits. It is soft, ample and generous with balanced natural acidity and a persistent finish.

name: Greywacke  Riesling
desc_en_short: A virtual fruit salad of mandarin segments, white fleshed peaches and crisp apples, sprinkled with lemon blossom and a dollop of honey. A lively, aromatic off-dry style that delivers a sherbet-like balance of bright, natural acidity and a subliminal touch of sweetness.

name: Greywacke  Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: A vibrant mix of nectarines, yellow peaches and cassis combines with the bright fragrance of lemon zest laced with musky, jasmine-like floral nuances..The palate is packed with ripe stone fruit, melons and mandarin creating a succulent tropical-fruited style with that classic Marlborough zing.

name: Russian Jack  Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: This wine is made by Martinborough Vineyards, who have branched out from their home in New Zealand's North Island, sourcing their Sauvignon grapes from certified sustainable vineyards across the water in Marlborough's Wairau Valley. Typically intense and concentrated, offering a backbone of gooseberry and passion fruit flavours supported by aromas of lime blossom and elderflower. Incisive citrus acidity provides a clean finish. Drink with spicy oriental salads.

name: Eugenio Collavini  Blancfumat Sauvignon DOC
wine_color: Pale straw yellow with greenish highlights.
desc_en_short: Pale straw yellow with greenish highlights.Very varietal and minerally, but not cloying, with hints of yellow peppers, sage and melon.The palate is fresh-tasting, full-bodied, confidently aromatic and long. A wine for fish-based starters, fish served in sauce and especially crustaceans, whether boiled or grilled. Risottos and herb soups.

name: Ca’Dei Frati I Frati Lugana Doc
desc_en_short: it is fresh, linear and furnished with great sophistication and elegance with delicate hints of white balsamic flowers, traces of apricot and almond. Time enables it to evolve, allowing the mineral notes to be expressed with greater determination, thereby acquiring its complexity with traces of iodates, spices and candied fruit.  In the mouth, it is capable of enveloping the whole palate thanks to a significant savoury essence, accompanied by strong, exuberant acidity.

name: Terre del Vulcano  Lava Greco di Tufo DOCG
desc_en_short: Bright straw yellow. Intense aroma, quite persistent, fruity. Medium-bodied, well balanced, quite intense and persistent. Best Served with: Easy to drink, great as aperitif, matches light main courses, white meat, young cheeses, ideal with fish.

name: Penfolds  Max's Chardonnay
desc_en_short: Penfolds Max’s Chardonnay is a tribute to former Chief Winemaker Max Schubert 1948 1975, a legend in Penfolds history. Max’s constant pursuit of excellence paved the way for those who followed in his footsteps and also allowed the status and heritage of Penfolds to grow. Max’s Chardonnay continues the evolution of the Penfolds white wine program, drawing inspiration from the legacy and spirit of the many wine trials of Max Schubert.

name: Penfolds  Koonunga Hill Chardonnay
desc_en_short: A light to medium bodied Chardonnay with rockmelon and grapefruit at the fore. A gentle creamy texture gives excellent mouthfeel without being cloying, while spicy French oak plays a minor supporting role. Subtle citrus like acid ensures refreshing length on the finish.

name: Angove  Long Row Riesling
wine_color: Bright pale-medium straw colour with some green hues.
desc_en_short: Bright pale-medium straw colour with some green hues. This delicious Riesling has a flamboyant lifted nose displaying floral citrus and tropical notes. These characters carry through on the palate, underpinned with lime and citrus, and a hint of guava with a soft finish of surprising length.

name: Angove  Long Row Chardonnay
wine_color: Medium straw with brilliant pale gold hues are highlighted in the glass.
desc_en_short: Medium straw with brilliant pale gold hues are highlighted in the glass. Aromas of stone fruit, ripe melons and a hint of toasty oak consume the senses. Abundant ripe tropical fruit flavours fill the mouth followed by some nutty and toasty characters and a long soft finish.

name: Mount Riley  17 Valley Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: Our Seventeen Valley range is a considered, handcrafted wine for connoisseurs. Our best fruit goes into this range and it's made with our best efforts and only in our best vintages. A special occassion wine, available very selectively.

name: Antigal  Estimulo Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: This wine is clear with tints of green. on the nose Lemon and Grapefruit. on the palate Vibrant flavours of Mangoes, passionfruit and underpinned freshly cut herbs. enjoy with a warm summer's day and Fresh Seafood.

name: Antigal  UNO Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: A Fresh Tasting wine that offers fresh nose with herbal notes such as rue, cut grass, mint and tropical like passion fruit, grapefruit, and pineapple. In mouth is fresh with good balance sugar/acidity, round and excellent volume.

name: Livon  Braide Alte Grand Cru IGT
wine_color: Intense straw yellow color, with golden reflections.
desc_en_short: Intense straw yellow color, with golden reflections. The bouquet is intense, very complex, with spicy hints. On the palate it is warm, full-bodied, very elegant and complex. It evolves in the glass with the temperature changes.

name: Livio Felluga  Pinot Grigio DOC
wine_color: brilliant yellow with rosy and coppery tones.
desc_en_short: brilliant yellow with rosy and coppery tones. Complex, powerful and enveloping. Rich and multi-layered: the flower contribution of orange blossom, daisy and white wisteria develops in ripe fruit notes: apricot, Percoca peach, white melon and yellow peach. Sweet sensations of custard and crème brûlé are in perfect balance with the freshness of citrus fruit.  Crisp, ample and compact. Full, progressive. The attack is complex and velvety, fresh, embracing. Excellent aromatic accord with the nose: pineapple, melon, Nashi pear, yellow peach and sweet pastry notes enhanced by lively freshness and pleasant savoury notes. The finish is fresh, tense and very persistent with citrus and white fruit aftertaste.

name: Jermann  Vintage Tunina DOC
grape_variety: Chardonnay, Ribolla Gialla, Malvasia, Sauvignon Blanc
flavor_tags: Apricot, Truffle, Mineral, Floral, Mango, Honey, Oak
food_matching: Lobster, Creamy Pasta, Roasted Chicken, Rich Fish
desc_en_short: Vintage Tunina is Jermann's most iconic wine — a complex, age-worthy white blend from Friuli of extraordinary depth and aromatic intensity, combining Sauvignon, Chardonnay, Ribolla Gialla, and Malvasia Istriana into a wine of rare richness and mineral elegance.

name: Jermann  Chardonnay DOC
flavor_tags: Minerality, Hazelnut, Mushroom, Vanilla, Truffle, Mineral, Creamy, Peach, Mango, Apple
food_matching: Lobster, Creamy Pasta, Roasted Chicken, Rich Fish
desc_en_short: Jermann's Chardonnay is a beautifully crafted Friulian white — barrel-fermented and aged on its lees for added richness, delivering golden apple, peach, toasted oak, and buttery complexity balanced by the region's signature freshness and mineral precision.

name: Monteverro  Chardonnay IGT
wine_color: Beautiful grey gold with touches of mercury and green.
desc_en_short: It owes its golden yellow colour, complexity and notes of caramel and toasted bread to ageing in barriques and concrete eggs, and its aromas of lemon, pear, quince and pineapple, of almonds and ripe apple to the ideal climatic conditions.

name: Domaine De Baronaques  "Chardonnay" By Baron Phillippe De Rothschild
food_matching: Lobster, Creamy Pasta, Roasted Chicken, Rich Fish

name: Bodegas Garzon  Reserva Albarino
wine_color: A pale yellow colour with greenish reflections
desc_en_short: Pale yellow with greenish reflections, this Albariño is intense in the nose, with peach and citrus notes. The freshness and minerality mid-palate is superb, with remarkable acidity and a round, crisp finish. Excellent pairings for this wine are cod with cockles, citrus prawn salad, or traditional grilled seafood with a warm mango salad and beans. It is delightfully well suited to Asian and Peruvian cuisine, ceviche, or a fresh tuna salad.

name: Talamonti  Trebi Trebbiano D'Abruzzo DOC
wine_color: Pale straw color with light green hues.
desc_en_short: Pale straw color with light green hues. Intense bouquet of ripe apples, peaches. Refreshing ripe apple and peach notes end with a gentle acidity. A rich, full, round and persistent wine. Perfect as an aperitif and well suited for seafood and shellfish.

name: Cuvaison  Chardonnay
desc_en_short:
WINEMAKER NOTES

A year of warmth and opulence, the 2017 Estate Chardonnay offers aromas of honeysuckle, jasmine, vanilla and clove spice. The honeyed aromatics give way to unctuous fruit tones of pear and peach, with lemony brightness that carries along the rich spice and toasty brioche notes. This is a rich, plush and pleasing Chardonnay balanced beautifully by oak and refreshing fruit tones.

name: Wolf Blass  Bilyara Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: Bilyara Sauvignon Blanc is a fresh, bright white wine with lifted, fruity aromas of passionfruit, grapefruit, guava and gooseberry. The palate is light-bodied, clean and crisp, with juicy tropical flavours and a lingering fruit finish. Great with crumbed calamari with tartare sauce, or creamy chicken and leek pie.

name: Wolf Blass  Yellow Label Moscato
wine_color: Pale straw with subtle green tinges.
desc_en_short: Yellow Label Moscato is a refreshing, crisp, lightly spr itzed white wine with notes of citrus, florals and musk. The palate is sweet, lush and mouth-filling, with a soft fruitiness and perfectly balanced acidity. Pairs well with spicy Asian cuisine, charcuterie and antipasto, as well as light, nutty or fruity desserts, and soft to medium cheeses.

name: Wolf Blass  Gold Label Adelaide Hills Chardonnay
wine_color: Vibrant straw with fine green hues.
desc_en_short: Our Adelaide Hills vineyards grow elegant, complex Chardonnays with clarity of fruit and regional expression. Select parcels of fruit were hand picked and whole-bunch pressed before fermentation in small batches using a combination of wild and cultured yeast and natural malo-lactic fermentation. The wine was left to mature on lees with regular barrel stirring to build texture and complexity.ctural line.

name: Yalumba  Samuel's Collection Eden Valley Chardonnay
wine_color: Very pale green gold in colour.

name: Vasse Felix  Icon Range Heytesbury Chardonnay
Vasse Felix  Premier Range Chardonnay
wine_color: Deep straw with a green tinge.

name: Maxville  Sauvingon Blanc Napa Valley
desc_en_short: Our Sauvignon Blanc is made with 100% Estate Grown "Musqué" clone and was bottled at our Chiles Valley ranch. Pail staw in color. The complex nose is richly expressive blending Jordan almond with lemon aromas. The palate has flavors of lemon cream and guava with a crisp clean finish. To achieve the crisp minerality and bright acidity in the wine, we harvest at night for optimal fruit freshness that ensures our signature style Sauvignon Blanc.

name: La Belle Angele  Chardonnay
desc_en_short: This wine has a lovely golden colour. Aromatic, elegant and generous, it has delicious aromas of pear and pineapple. This Chardonnay will perfectly match fish and chicken dishes. It is also excellent served on its own, as an aperitif. Serve at 10°C.

name: Wolf Blass  Red Label Chardonnay
desc_en_short: A bright, fresh Chardonnay designed to be enjoyed while young and vibrant. Fruit driven and bursting with flavours of stone fruits and subtle, spicy oak, the palate is soft, round and textural with a long, creamy finish.

name: Sterling  Vintner S Collection Chardonnay
desc_en_short: Crisp Gala apple, Bartlett pear and hints of pineapple are layered by lovely pie spices and toasty vanilla notes. The palate is long and round with rich viscosity that comes from partial malolactic fermentation and barrel aging. Clean, ripe citrus flavors extend the finish and add a refreshing lift to the rich fruit. A go-to Chardonnay, this wine has the perfect poise for any occasion. Pair it with grilled chicken, seafood or light pastas.

name: 19 Crimes  Hard Chard (Chardonnay)
desc_en_short: Straw yellow colour with Lifted aromas of stonefruits, peaches & cream, and spicy oak. Notes of melons coupled with stonesfruits all carried onto the palate & supported by a creamy oak backbone. The fruit sweetness is balanced by the acidity which drives the lingering finish of butterscotch & spice.

name: Royal Tokaji  Furmint Dry Vineyard Selection (750 ml)
wine_color: The wine is light yellow with subtle greenish highlights.  More: https://eng.winestyle.ru

name: Domaine Leflaive  Bienvenues Batard Montrachet Grand Cru
desc_en_short:
WINE MAKING

Biodynamic.
Manual harvesting with grape sorting and optimisation of choice of date through parcel-by-parcel ripeness monitoring.

name: Messenez Family  Chateau M Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: Golden with green reflexes in color.  Aroma of grapefruit, fresh grass. Creamy, very good balanced on the palate. Pairing with appetizers, sea Food, white Meat or deserts.

name: Lucien Crochet  Sancerre Blanc "Les Calcaires"
desc_en_short: Smooth and supple attack, offering a juicy mouthfeel delivered by flavours of yellow fruits. Generously textured and fleshy, freshness provided by the yellow fruit aromas. Warm finish perfectly balanced by the solid mineral backbone. There you feel the terroir!

name: Moulin de Gassac  Sauvignon Blanc IGP
desc_en_short: Clear pale gold. Expressive, exotic peach flavour. Very open, friendly and fruity. Well balanced, good length, very clean. Pairing with Asparagus and salmon quiche, Pizza, Fish and shellfish, Cheese soufflé

name: Altano  Vinho Branco Douro DOC
desc_en_short: Bright pale straw in colour, this wine reveals vibrant aromas of passion fruit and pineapple with a subtle touch of vanilla. Exuberantly fresh on the palate, it delivers focused citrus and green apple flavours with a hint of melon, underscored by crisp acidity

name: 7 Cascine  Moscato d'Asti DOCG
desc_en_short: Pale yellow. Ample and very intense bouquet, with a note of overripe fruit that is the unique aroma of Moscato. Pleasant and very persistent taste, reflecting the richness of the bouquet. The wine is enhanced when served with desserts and fresh fruit. It may also be consumed very well on its own, at any time of the day.

name: Georges Duboeuf  Macon Village (VDF D'OC)
desc_en_short: A bright golden colour, this Mâcon-Villages reveals elegant, fresh aromas dominated by white blossom with a scent of honey and lime blossom on the finish.

name: Georges Duboeuf  Chardonnay  (VDF D'OC)
desc_en_short: A pale, golden straw colour. The nose is powerful and delicate, with intense pear, fig, pineapple and roasted hazelnut aromas and discreet hints of honey. Unctuous and lively on the palate, with hints of fig and vanilla.

name: Georges Duboeuf  Sauvignon Blanc (VDF D'OC)
desc_en_short: A pale crystalline yellow color. This Sauvignon offers an intense nose with notes of citrus, fruity with great finess. It has a nice bite and persistant armoas. It is balanced on the palate, ample and harmonious.

name: Max Ferd. Richter  Estate Riesling
desc_en_short: Produced from grapes of “Prädikat”-wine quality but vinified somewhat drier this is the calling card wine of our Estate. It’s produced from replanted vineyards, less than 15 years in terroir, where due to its youth the expression of the single vineyard is not fully developed yet. Luscious and quintessential Mosel Riesling.

name: 19 Crimes  Sauvignon Block
desc_en_short: Light but unique in character, this approachable Sauvignon Blanc is filled with aromas of passion fruit, grapefruit, gooseberry and guava. 19 Crimes Sauvignon Block is light bodied with a fresh, crisp finish and a light straw color. A criminally easy wine to enjoy.

name: Baron Philippe de Rothschild  Mouton Cadet Reserve Sauternes
desc_en_short: A scintillating golden yellow. The nose opens on a delicate mixture of acacia blossom and crystallized quince, followed by a touch of vanilla and apple. The beautifully round attack is followed by an explosion of fruit with notes of baked apple and white blossom, leading into a fresh and smooth finish with a hint of mild spice.

name: Cabriz  Cohleita Dao Branco
wine_color: Bright yellow color, with greenish highlights.

name: Noble Hill  Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: Noble Hill Sauvignon Blanc has a Delicate aroma eliciting gooseberry, green apple and shiso leaf. The wine tastes cool and juicy with a crisp natural acidity. The finish is elegant and balanced.

name: Domaine De Rochebin  Vieilles Vignes Chardonnay
wine_color: Pretty, sustained yellow hue with green tints
desc_en_short: Pretty, sustained yellow hue with green tints, nice ripe aromas of citrus (grapefruit) and hazelnut on the noce, fresh on the palate, with lovely long lasting flavours.

name: Notte Rossa  Vermentino  Salento IGP
desc_en_short: Straw yellow colour; delicate aroma of white flowers with notes of citrus and Mediterranean maquis. Elegant, fresh and mineral on the palate with hints of thyme and rosemary

name: Michele Chiarlo  Roero Arneis Le Madri DOCG
wine_color: Intense straw yellow with brilliant green hues
desc_en_short: Intense straw yellow with brilliant green hues, the wine offers notes of peach, tropical fruits, and acacia flower with an enjoyable savory finish.

name: Granmonte  Verdelho
wine_color: Light green tint on the hue.
desc_en_short: The wine is generously layered with a burst of tropical fruit, orange blossoms and banana lollies. On the palate, the wine reveals honeycomb, fig, nectarines, and spices. Aromatic yet masculine with luscious and dry palate with long lingering finish of white pepper.

name: Granmonte  Gradient Verdelho
wine_color: Light green tint on the hue.
desc_en_short: This Wine is Reeks of Brie, cheese, yeast on the nose, strong first impression. Off dry, pepper, hay, savoury, umami, hint of banana and guava with honey undertones.

name: Angove  Chalk Hill Blue Semillon Sauvignon Blanc
wine_color: Pale straw in colour with attractive green hues
desc_en_short: Pale straw in colour with attractive green hues. herbaceous and tropical characters typical of perfectly ripened sauvignon blanc are followed by delicate citrus notes from the semillon. these flow seamlessly onto the palate with crisp tropical fruit and a clean finish.

name: Aromo  Chardonnay
desc_en_short: This wine is Pale yellow with green sparks. Refreshing citrus aromas with tropical fruit notes. Fresh and well-structured, with a markedly varietal character, medium tones and persistence, and a pleasant finish.

name: Barton&Guestier  Partager Blanc
desc_en_short: Light and fruity, this is a wine that has some sweetness, a gentle series of white fruits, acidity and lemon zest at the end

name: La Chablisienne  Chablis 1er Cru Montmains
wine_color: Pale yellow in color, limpid and brilliant with some bronze reflections.

name: Gerard Bertrand  Orange Gold
style: Chardonnay, Grenache Blanc, Viognier, Marsanne , Mauzac, Muscat
grape_variety: Chardonnay, Grenache, Viognier, Marsanne, Mauzac, Muscat

name: Serra Ferdinandea  Bianco IGT
wine_color: Yellow color slightly tinged with sea green.

name: Wither Hills  Chardonnay
wine_color: Straw yellow, with evident greenish tinges.
desc_en_short: A vivid, stylish and elegant Chardonnay. The distinctive fruit profile of nectarine, fresh grapefruit and minerality is interlaced with the spicy, cashew nut nuances of fine grained French oak. Beautifully intense and expressive.

name: Escorihuela Gascón Familia Gascón Chardonnay
wine_color: Pale yellow color with delicate golden highlights.

name: Sartori Arco dei Giovi Pinot Grigio delle Venezie DOC
wine_color: Straw in colour with light golden hues.

name: Domaine du Vieux Bourg  Clos du Vieux Bourg Beaujolais Blanc
Maison Castel  Grande Réserve Chardonnay IGP Pays d’Oc
wine_color: Attractive yellow robe with green hints

name: Dog Point  Chardonnay
desc_en_short: A pure, bright and youthful citrus driven chardonnay with complex smokey, flint, toast and biscuit notes derived from extended barrel aging on full solids. The hallmarks of Dog Point chardonnay are ever present here with pure saline and crisp palate structure. This vintage will have the ability to age well. Perfect match with scallops, white fish, poultry and BBQ pork.

name: Max Ferd. Richter  Brauneberger Juffer Riesling Kabinett
flavor_tags: Green Apple, Honeysuckle, Minerality, Mineral, Petrol, Peach, Apple, Slate, Lime
desc_en_short: From one of the Mosel's most historic estates, this Kabinett Riesling from the famous Brauneberger Juffer vineyard is a delicate, off-dry masterpiece — gossamer light with green apple, peach, honeysuckle, and a rapier-sharp slate minerality.

name: Schieferkopf  Pfalz Gewurztraminer Trocken Sec
flavor_tags: Tropical Fruit, White Pepper, Lychee, Floral, Ginger, Pepper, Slate, Rose
desc_en_short: Schieferkopf's Gewurztraminer Trocken is a dry, aromatic Alsatian white of striking intensity — lychee, rose petal, ginger, and exotic spice leap from the glass, followed by a richly textured palate that finishes dry and long.

name: Richland  Moscato
wine_color: Straw yellow in colour with light golden hues.

name: Opawa  Sauvignon Blanc Marlborough
wine_color: This wine is bright lemon colour with a hint of green.

name: Mr.Riggs  'Watervale' Riesling
desc_en_short: The Watervale Riesling is sourced from Clare Valley’s cooler sub-region Watervale. The wonderfully delicate nose carries lime oil and soft citrus blossom characters seamlessly to the palate. Mouth feel is abundant and vibrant. This is a crisp, tangy and delicate example of a Clare Valley Riesling.

name: Chateau Maris  Viognier Grenache (Organic)
desc_en_short: Pays d’Oc is an ocean of vineyards bathed in sunshine in the south of France, between the heath and a beautiful blue where the atmosphere is unique. It is in this wild setting that MARIS wines are made from organic grapes grown in an environment promoting biodiversity and sustainability.

name: Domaine De La Cornasse  Chablis
wine_color: Very beautiful pale white gold color with green highlights. Brilliant, bright, clear.
desc_en_short: Powerful with a beautiful mineral imprint highlighting the fruit, and the fine plant. Ample and lively in a strong and racy structure.

name: Heim  Gewurztraminer Imperial
desc_en_short: Golden-yellow robe. Exuberant nose associating exotic fragrances to spicy and rose aromas. Unctuous and well-structured, this wine persists for a long time in the mouth displaying the same spicy and exotic fruits aromas revealed on the nose and ends with honey notes.

name: Spy Valley  Envoy Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: Roast nuts, citrus, and melon, with a distinctive banana passion-fruit aroma that is typical of this wine. Crisp acidity is a feature, and even after full malolactic fermentation it retains a fresh, mineral acid structure. Layers of citrus fruit and dried herb flavours unfold and are supported by the smoky, creamy influences of oak maturation.

name: Beau Reve De Tradition  Moelleux Bordeaux Aoc
flavor_tags: Orange Blossom, Apricot, Blossom, Orange, Peach, Lemon, Honey
desc_en_short: Beau Rêve de Tradition is a sweet Moelleux from Bordeaux — gently honeyed and luscious with ripe apricot, peach, orange blossom, and a refreshing acidity that prevents any heaviness, making it an accessible and charming dessert wine.

name: Domaine du Chardonnay  Chablis Paradis
desc_en_short: Lemony nose with notes of lime trees and vanilla. Powerful, round and delicious palate, aromas of citrus fruits and toast.

name: Domaine du Chardonnay  Chablis ler Cru Montmain
desc_en_short:
Ripe lemon, white flowers, and a minty aroma. Beautifully lively with a long finish, featuring notes of
lemon and tropical fruit.

name: Louis Latour  Macon-Lugny Les Genievres
wine_color: A bright pale yellow color with green hues.

name: Los Cerros De San Juan  Cuna De Piedra Estate Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: On soil with abundant bedrock, in Los Cerros de San Juan, with a lot of agronomic work, and a conscientious vinification, this wine presents a very important varietal expression, with aromas of white peach, freshly cut grass, citrus, very intense, in the mouth, fruity, persistent, fresh and mineral.

name: I Vigneri  Palmento Caselle Etna Bianco Superiore DOC
desc_en_short: PALMENTO CASELLE: The 100% Carricante vine of this small parcel is the fruit of one particular mass wine selection made by Salvo Foti in over 20 years of work. The vineyard was planted in part with the ancient Etnean technique of the “Mallet cuttings” or “Magliuoli”: direct production, without grafting on American vine (ungrafted). Vineyard cultivation is done by hand using natural products. Biotechnologies are not used in winemaking. Transfer and bottling are carried out according to the phases of the moon.

name: Jacob's Creek  Classic Sauvignon Blanc (750 ml)
desc_en_short: Jacob's Creek Classic range offers fresh, great tasting wines across a wide selection of popular varieties and blends. Jacob's Creek Classic Sauvignon Blanc is a crisp, refreshing Sauvignon Blanc that is a perfect accompaniment to all occasions. The nose is lifted and fragrant with passionfruit and varietal asparagus, while the palate offers tropical and herbaceous flavours and a delightful crisp finish. Enjoy on its own or with sushi and fresh green salads.

name: Casarena Estate Torrontes
desc_en_short: This wine is straw yellow with intense and slightly sweet aromas of roses and violets with a touch of aniseed. Light bodied and refreshing.

name: Fantini Calalenta Pecorino Terre di Chieti IGT
wine_color: Straw yellow color with greenish highlights.
desc_en_short: Straw yellow color with greenish highlights. Aromas of white pulp fruit, especially pears, and balsamic notes that reveal the good quality of the wood.

name: Maison Jaffelin  Saint-Veran Blanc
wine_color: Pale yellow gold, brilliant and crystal-clear.

name: Santa Sofia Pinot Grigio Grada DOC
style: Pinot Grigio (พิโน กรีโจ)
desc_en_short: Elegant Pinot Grigio from Garda, Italy — bright, fresh, and fruity with aromas of peach, lemon, and apricot. Perfect for seafood, salads, and light pasta dishes.

name: Voga Italia  Pinot Grigio
wine_color: Pale straw yellow with shimmering clarity
style: Pinot Grigio (พิโน กรีโจ)
desc_en_short: Award-winning Pinot Grigio with crisp apple and floral notes, elegant freshness, and perfect pairing for seafood, white meats, and creamy pasta.

name: Tornatore  Etna Bianco
wine_color: Pale straw yellow with intense greenish reflections
desc_en_short: Pale straw yellow with intense greenish reflections on the eye; pleasant hints of green apple, grapefruit, white peach and aromatic herbs mark the nose of this wine, which shows its true identity on the palate with a very pleasant savoriness and freshness complemented by an extraordinary minerality; exclusive notes that invite the second glass.

name: Corryton Burge  South Australia Chardonnay
desc_en_short: A lively, rich, round and creamy South Australian Chardonnay. Pale to yellow straw. Aromatic white nectarine, with hints of peach and pear. Palate provides generous fresh stone fruit and honey dew melon with a hint of creamy short bread richness all brought together with moderate acidity to provide balance.

name: Corryton Burge  Eden Valley Riesling
desc_en_short: This is a classic example of one of the world's best grape varieties, in one of the regions in which it is at its most individually expressive. Aromatic and complex with vibrant, bright yellow and green fruit flavours, lime peel and even the famed monoterpenes of kerosene, this is a generous and delicious wine that will keep you coming back for more, while searching out others from this wonderful region.

name: Le Puy Marie-Cecile
desc_en_short: The Amoreau family,15 generations of winemakers since 1610. Located at the top of the same clay and fossil-rich limestone plateau as Saint-Emilion, overlooking the districts of Pomerol and Saint-Emilion, le Puy dominates the Dordogne Valley. At an altitude of 107m, it is the second-highest geodesic point of the Gironde department. This position lent its name to the site as of Roman times; le Puy means a high place, a podium, or a mountain peak.

name: Castelli The Sum Riesling
wine_color: Very pale straw with green tinges in appearance.
desc_en_short:
Very pale straw with green tinges in appearance.
A pronounced nose of citrus, mineral, slate
and tropical notes. Light in body with very
crisp lemon and lime acidity and hints of talc.
Finishes dry, long and refreshing.

name: Pictor Sauvignon Blanche
desc_en_short:
Pale bright yellow color. The
aroma of blended citrus notes,
lime, and grapefruit. On the
palate, it is a fresh and crisp
wine with citrus notes mixed
with floral touches

name: La Rue De L'Amour Premium Selected Blanche
desc_en_short:
Fresh and fruity, it reveals
an intense nose with a perfect
balanced mouth.

name: Viña Valoria Blanco Rioja D.O.
wine_color: Straw-yellow in color, clean and bright.
desc_en_short:
Straw-yellow in color, clean
and bright. On the nose it
presents powerful primary
aromas of white fruits with
herbaceous notes. On the palate
it is well balanced, full-bodied
and fresh with a clean aromatic
finish.

name: Askaneli Tsinandali
desc_en_short:
This wine is aged in oak barrels
for a short time, which gives it a
slight oaky taste and a pleasant
complexity. And characterized
by notes of citrus, green apple,
and a hint of honey. It has a
light to medium body with a
refreshing acidity

name: Askaneli Rkatsiteli White
desc_en_short:
A delightful and complex
profile with an inviting amber
hue from fermentation in
qvevri, Georgia’s traditional
clay vessels. The palate is bright
and friendly, showcasing notes
of ripe citrus, nectarine, and
passionfruit, accompanied by
hints of dried figs and thyme.
The wine is balanced with racy
acidity, making it both easy to
drink and food-friendly

name: Reguta Müller Thurgau Tre Venezie I.G.P.
desc_en_short:
Straw yellow with greenish tinge. On the
nose, it is delicate, floral and fruity. Fresh
and aromatic, well-balanced and a sapid
mouth feel.

name: Reguta Ribolla Gialla Venezia Giulia I.G.P.
desc_en_short:
Straw yellow. On the nose it is delicate
and well-expressed with tinge of wild
flowers, herbs, and grapefruit. On the
palate, it is slightly sour and fresh, an
elegant mouthfeel.

name: Vasu Vasu Pinot Grigio Colline Pescaresi I.G.P.
flavor_tags: Green Apple, Mineral, Citrus, Apple, Pear
desc_en_short: Vasu Vasu Pinot Grigio is a fresh, light-bodied white from the Abruzzo hills — clean and approachable with crisp green apple, pear, subtle citrus, and a gentle mineral note on the finish.

name: Cantine Paolini Sicilien Chardonnay Sicilia D.O.C.
desc_en_short:
Intense and marked fruity
notes on the nose. Light and
lively on the palate.

name: Santa Helena Sweet White
desc_en_short: The muscatel lends complexity to the peach f.lavours for a well-balanced wine. The acidity provides freshness, and the sweetness contributes roundness and a pleasing finish.

name: Maison Jaffelin  Meursault
desc_en_short:
Meursault has long been regarded as the crown jewel of the Côte de Beaune, a name coveted by collectors and critics alike. Celebrated for producing legendary Chardonnay with creaminess, complexity, and timeless elegance, this Meursault from Maison Jaffelin interprets the village with both grandeur and a sense of modern drinkability.

Winemaking : Chardonnay from limestone-clay soils, fermented and aged in French oak (partly new), with bâtonnage on the lees to enrich texture and creaminess.

Character : Hazelnut, toasted almond, and buttery brioche, unfolding into layers of fresh lemon, golden apple, and precise limestone minerality. Dense and long on the palate, balancing richness with bright acidity. A classic Meursault that impresses both now and with cellaring potential.

“Creamy yet precise, a Meursault of remarkable depth.” – Wine Advocate

name: Argiolas Iselis Nasco Bianco Di Cagliari
desc_en_short: A refined Sardinian white floral, textured, and gracefully mineral.

name: Little Beauty  Marlborough 'Black Edition' Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: Very aromatic; fresh tropical fruit characters like ripe mango. Hints of passionfruit, blood orange. Notes of hot toffee, marmalade, baking danish pastry (from the time on lees). Reminiscent of Crème brulee or crème caramel. Alluring. The palate is slightly creamy, rich in texture, complex - thanks to the ‘wild’ yeast – upfront, there is an explosion of flavour, succulent. Wild herbs, passionfruit skin, kumquat. To follow, caramelised citrus fruits, flinty lees, poached stone fruits. It’s wonderfully persistent, long and generous. A powerful and opulent wine. Very well suited to the gastronomic scene.

name: Enjoy It Non Alcoholic Sauvinon Blanc
desc_en_short: The sauvignon Blanc has wonderful expressive gooseberry, tropical fruit and delicate grassy and lime aromas of a typical Sauvignon Blanc grape variety. Enjoy this wine with white meat, fish,salad and pasta. It's good also on its own.

name: Banfi La Pettegola Vermentino
desc_en_short: A lively wine with character, in which the breeze of the Tuscan coast meets the aromaticity of Vermentino.

name: Edenvale Chardonnay (Non-Alcoholic Wine)
desc_en_short: A lively, fruit-forward Chardonnay that’s clean, fresh, and full of flavor.

name: Edenvale Sauvignon Blanc (Non-Alcoholic Wine)
desc_en_short: A crisp, aromatic Sauvignon Blanc with bright fruit and zesty freshness.

name: Pierre Chavin  Le Petit Etoile Chardonnay (Non-Alcoholic Wine)
desc_en_short: The non-alcoholic drinks of the Le Petit Etoilé brand are made from great organic French grape varieties such as Chardonnay in white and Cabernet Sauvignon for red. Le Petit Etoilé is also available in rosé and sparkling white for a complete aromatic palette.

name: Golden Paws Chardonnay
desc_en_short: A soft, fruit-forward, and lightly oaked Chardonnay, designed for easy drinking.

name: Alto Los Romeros Reserva Chardonnay
desc_en_short: A balanced Chardonnay that blends fresh fruit with subtle, integrated oak complexity.

name: Montecillo Albarino
wine_color: Crystalline and with a seductive brilliance, a lemon yellow tone with greenish highlights.
desc_en_short: A vibrant and refreshing Albariño with bright citrus, white peach, and saline minerality—crisp, aromatic, and beautifully coastal.

name: Bodegas Volver Paso a Paso Verdejo
wine_color: A yellow colour, with light verdant reflections.
desc_en_short: A crisp, vibrant, and highly aromatic white wine made from the indigenous Verdejo grape.

name: Neleman Organic Vineyards Hey You White
desc_en_short: A fresh, organically crafted Mediterranean white with bright citrus, crisp orchard fruit, and lively acidity—clean, vibrant, and effortlessly drinkable with modern Spanish charm.

name: La Bastarda Bianco di Toscana
desc_en_short: A bright and value‑driven Tuscan white from the Masi family stable, offering clean fruit, fresh acidity and a lively, accessible profile.

name: Finca Fella Cala Rey Verdejo Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: A lively white blend that fuses Verdejo’s herbal freshness with Sauvignon Blanc’s zippy citrus character — crisp, expressive, and perfect for warm days.

name: Elena Walch Chardonnay Alto Adige DOC
desc_en_short: Our Chardonnay shines in brilliant straw yellow with a fruity bouquet of exotic notes, ripe apples and light floral aromas. On the palate, the wine is elegant and mild with an interesting finish.

name: Elena Walch Beyond the Clouds Bianco Alto Adige DOC
style: A Selection Of Our Finest White Grapes, Predominantly Chardonnay.
desc_en_short: The argentum bonum Beyond the Clouds convinces with a rich lush golden yellow. The nose opens with a colorful bouquet of aromas: a juicy fruit cocktail with a touch of exoticism and hints of grapefruit and oranges, as well as a stimulating spiciness with slightly smoky notes and well-integrated honey notes. On the palate, the wine impresses with an exciting harmony between youthful charm and complex maturity, between crisp freshness and great potential, between alpine coolness and southern flair.

name: Albert Bichot Macon Villages
desc_en_short: This vineyard is located in the Mâconnais, in southern Burgundy, which differs from northern Burgundy, especially due to its climate, which is less harsh, as well as its vineyards, which cover the hills and valleys of over 80 communes.

name: Jacob's Creek Moscato White (750 ml)
wine_color: Pale straw with delicate green highlights.
desc_en_short: A light, gently sweet Moscato bursting with fresh grape, peach, and floral notes—vibrant, refreshing, and effortlessly enjoyable.
